notes.zh: 台盼蓝接触时间 ≤5 min（否则活细胞也会着色）。每格理想计数 100–200 个细胞。计数线上细胞：计上不计下，计左不计右。清洗计数板：70% 乙醇擦拭，勿用超声。自动计数仪（Countess, TC20）更准确但需校准。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 21; Louis & Bhatt (2015) Methods Mol Biol 1235:31

usage.en: Count cells and assess viability using a hemocytometer with trypan blue exclusion.
usage.zh: 使用血球计数板和台盼蓝排斥法计数细胞并评估活力。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 15 minutes，实操: 15 minutes

name: Cell Cycle Analysis (PI)

components.name: 4. PI staining: 50 µg/mL PI + 100 µg/mL RNase A

notes.en: RNase A essential (PI binds RNA). Gate singlets via FSC-H vs FSC-A. G1=2N, S=between, G2/M=4N. Fixed cells stable weeks at -20°C.
notes.zh: RNase A 必需（PI 也结合 RNA）。FSC-H vs FSC-A 门控去除双联体。G1=2N, S=中间, G2/M=4N。固定后 -20°C 可保存数周。

ref: Krishan (1975) J Cell Biol 66:188

usage.en: Analyze cell cycle distribution by PI staining of fixed cells and flow cytometry.
usage.zh: PI 染色固定细胞，流式细胞术分析细胞周期分布。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–5 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: −20°C in 70% ethanol (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C in 70% ethanol (最长 1 month)

name: Cell Freezing (Cryopreservation)

components.name: 1. 选择 70–90% 汇合度、活力 >90% 的细胞
6. 冻存液重悬 (1–5×10⁶/mL)
components.note: 90% FBS + 10% DMSO; 或商用 CryoStor CS10

notes.en: Standard cryopreservation protocol. Controlled-rate freezing (-1°C/min) in 10% DMSO/90% FBS. Use Mr. Frosty or CoolCell. Transfer to liquid nitrogen within 24–48h. Essential for cell banking.
notes.zh: 细胞应处于对数生长期。10% DMSO/90% FBS 冻存液。-1°C/min 程序降温防止冰晶损伤。标记细胞系、代次、日期。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed.; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

usage.en: Cryopreserve mammalian cells for long-term storage in liquid nitrogen.
usage.zh: 冻存哺乳动物细胞，液氮长期保存。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes + overnight，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: Transfer to liquid N₂ after 24 h (up to indefinite)
note.zh: Transfer to liquid N₂ after 24 h (最长 indefinite)

name: Cell Passaging (Subculture)

components.name: 3. PBS 洗涤 1–2 次 (去除血清)
4. 加胰酶-EDTA (0.05–0.25%)
components.note: T75: 2–3 mL; 均匀覆盖底面

components.name: 5. 37°C 孵育 2–5 min
components.note: 轻拍瓶壁, 镜下确认脱落

components.name: 6. 加含血清培养基终止消化
7. 吹打混匀成单细胞悬液
8. 按比例接种到新瓶
components.note: 常用传代比: 1:3–1:10; 记录代数

components.name: 9. 补足培养基, 标记, 放入培养箱

notes.en: Over-confluence causes contact inhibition and phenotypic changes. Some cell lines are trypsin-sensitive (e.g., HEK293) — use Accutase or TrypLE instead. Suspension cells: dilute directly. Track passage number — characteristics may change after 20-30 passages. Freeze backup samples at each passage. Use Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free PBS.
notes.zh: 过度汇合会导致接触抑制和表型变化。部分细胞系对胰酶敏感（如 HEK293），用 Accutase 或 TrypLE 代替。悬浮细胞直接稀释传代。记录传代数——超过 20–30 代后细胞特性可能改变。每次传代预留样品冻存。用不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 PBS。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 13; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

usage.en: Subculture adherent mammalian cells by trypsinization and re-plating.
usage.zh: 通过胰酶消化传代贴壁哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 20–30 minutes，实操: 20 minutes

name: Cell Thawing (Recovery)

components.name: 4. 转移至 9 mL 预热培养基
components.note: 逐滴加入, 缓冲 DMSO 浓度变化

components.name: 5. 离心 200×g, 5 min (推荐) 或直接铺板
components.note: 大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO; 极脆弱细胞可跳过直接铺板

components.name: 6. 弃上清, 新鲜完全培养基重悬, 接种培养瓶
8. 次日换液去除残余 DMSO 和死细胞碎片
9. 恢复 1–2 代后开始实验

notes.en: Quick-thaw to recover frozen cells. Key is speed — DMSO is cytotoxic at 37°C. Most cell lines: centrifuge to remove DMSO. Very fragile cells (e.g., primary neurons): dilute directly without centrifugation. Check viability >90% after recovery. Allow 1–2 passages before experiments.
notes.zh: 关键是速度——DMSO 在 37°C 对细胞有毒。解冻至剩小冰晶即可。大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO；极脆弱细胞（如原代神经元）可直接稀释铺板。恢复后确认活力 >90%。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells; ATCC Cell Thawing Protocol

usage.en: Recover cryopreserved mammalian cells from liquid nitrogen storage.
usage.zh: 从液氮中复苏冻存的哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 20 minutes，实操: 20 minutes

name: ChIP Protocol (Chromatin IP)

components.name: 1. 交联: 1% 甲醛 10 min RT
3. 冷 PBS 洗 2×, 收细胞
5. 超声 (200–500 bp 片段)
components.note: Bioruptor: 30s on/30s off, 15–25 cycles, high; 探针超声: 10s pulse × 10, 30% amplitude; 需对每种细胞系优化

components.name: 8. 加抗体 + Protein A/G beads 4°C 过夜
11. 解交联: 65°C 过夜 + Proteinase K

notes.en: Optimize sonication conditions for each cell line. Positive control: H3 antibody; negative: IgG. Recommend ≥1×10⁶ cells. Express results as % Input or Fold Enrichment.
notes.zh: 超声条件需针对不同细胞系优化。阳性对照: H3 抗体；阴性对照: IgG。建议每次至少 1×10⁶ 细胞。结果用 % Input 或 Fold Enrichment 表示。

ref: Nelson et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:179–185; Collas (2010) Mol Biotechnol 45:87–100; Haring et al. (2007) Plant Methods 3:11

usage.en: Chromatin immunoprecipitation to study protein-DNA interactions at specific genomic loci.
usage.zh: 染色质免疫沉淀，研究特定基因组位点的蛋白-DNA 相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3 days，实操: 8 hours

note.en: −80°C in SDS lysis buffer (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −80°C in SDS lysis buffer (最长 6 months)

note.en: −80°C (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 6 months)

note.en: −20°C (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 6 months)

name: Circulating Tumor Cell (CTC) Detection by PCR
nameCn: 循环肿瘤细胞 (CTC) PCR 检测方案

components.name: Step 1 (Blood collection): Harvest 100 µL cheek blood into 1.5 mL tube containing 4 µL EDTA solution.
Step 2 (RBC lysis): Add 400 µL 1× RBC lysis, RT 5 min. Add 700 µL DMEM to stop. Centrifuge 10,000 rcf 2 min. Remove supernatant.
Step 3 (DNA extraction): Adjust to 220 µL with PBS. Add 4 µL proteinase K + 200 µL Buffer AL. Vortex. Incubate 56°C 10 min (dry bath preferred over oven).
Step 4: Add 200 µL ethanol (96-100%). Mix by pipetting. Transfer to DNeasy spin column. Centrifuge ≥6000 g 1 min.
Step 5: Wash with 500 µL Buffer AW1 (spin 1 min), then 500 µL Buffer AW2 (spin 1 min). Dry spin 20,000 g 3 min.
Step 6: Transfer column to new tube. Air-dry 5 min. Elute with 35 µL Buffer AE (incubate 5 min RT, spin 1 min). Measure concentration on Nanodrop.
Step 7 (PCR): 2.5 µL 10× buffer + 0.5 µL dNTPs + 0.5 µL each primer (100 µM, 4× diluted) + 2.5 µL Q buffer + 15.5 µL H₂O + 1 µL Taq + 2 µL DNA = 25 µL total.
Step 8 (Cycling): 94°C 5 min → 12 cycles (94°C 45 s, 64→58°C touchdown -0.5°C/cycle 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 35 cycles (94°C 45 s, 58°C 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 72°C 10 min → 4°C hold.

note.en: Adjust 35 cycles to 30-45 based on DNA concentration.
note.zh: 根据 DNA 浓度调整 35 个循环为 30-45 个。

components.name: Step 9 (Gel): 2.5% agarose gel, 150 V for 30 min. Load 18 µL (3 µL 6× loading buffer + 8 µL sample + 7 µL H₂O) + 6 µL ladder.

note.en: Expected bands: Flox Pten ~1000 bp, wildtype ~814 bp, Cre'd-out ~210 bp.
note.zh: 预期条带：Flox Pten ~1000 bp, 野生型 ~814 bp, Cre 切除 ~210 bp。

notes.en: Touchdown PCR reduces non-specific amplification. The 210 bp Cre'd-out Pten band indicates presence of CTCs carrying the tumor-specific deletion. Cycle number (30-45) should be adjusted based on DNA yield from Nanodrop.
notes.zh: Touchdown PCR 降低非特异性扩增。210 bp Cre 切除 Pten 条带表明存在携带肿瘤特异性缺失的 CTC。循环数（30-45）根据 Nanodrop DNA 产量调整。

ref: Internal genotyping protocol (2024); QIAGEN DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit handbook

usage.en: Detects circulating tumor cells in mouse blood by PCR targeting Cre-excised (floxed) Pten allele. Distinguishes Flox Pten (~1000 bp), wildtype (~814 bp), and Cre'd-out (~210 bp) alleles.
usage.zh: 通过 PCR 检测小鼠血液中循环肿瘤细胞，靶向 Cre 切除的 Pten 等位基因。区分 Flox Pten (~1000 bp)、野生型 (~814 bp) 和 Cre 切除 (~210 bp)。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 2 hours

name: Clonogenic (Colony Formation) Assay

components.name: 1. Seed 200-1000 cells/well (6-well)
components.note: 高 PE 细胞 (HeLa): 200 cells; 低 PE 细胞: 500–1000; 先做预实验确定最佳密度

notes.en: Plating efficiency = colonies/cells × 100%. Surviving fraction = PE(treated)/PE(control). Triplicate.
notes.zh: 接种效率 = 克隆数/细胞数 × 100%。存活分数 = PE(处理)/PE(对照)。三重复。

ref: Franken et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:2315

usage.en: Measure the ability of single cells to form colonies (clonogenic survival assay).
usage.zh: 检测单个细胞形成克隆的能力（克隆形成实验）。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 weeks，实操: 2 hours

note.en: 37°C incubator (up to 10–14 days (colony growth))
note.zh: 37°C incubator (最长 10–14 days (colony growth))

note.en: RT, air-dried (up to indefinitely)
note.zh: RT, air-dried (最长 indefinitely)

name: Co-IP Protocol

components.name: 1. 裂解 (IP Lysis Buffer, 冰上 30 min)
4. 预清除: Protein A/G beads 1 h 4°C
5. 加目标抗体 (1–5 µg) 4°C 过夜
8. 加 2× Loading Buffer 煮沸洗脱
9. WB 检测 bait + prey 蛋白

notes.en: Negative control: matched isotype IgG. Do not use RIPA (SDS disrupts protein interactions). Adjust NP-40 concentration to interaction strength (0.1–1%). Recommend ≥500 µg total protein.
notes.zh: 阴性对照: 同种属 IgG。勿用 RIPA (SDS 会破坏互作)。裂解液中 NP-40 浓度根据互作强度调整 (0.1–1%)。建议每样 500 µg–2 mg 蛋白。

ref: Miernyk & Thelen (2008) Plant J 55:415–425; Kaboord & Bhatt (2008) Methods Mol Biol 424:349–364

usage.en: Co-immunoprecipitate interacting proteins to study protein-protein interactions.
usage.zh: 免疫共沉淀检测蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

materials.name: Protein A/G magnetic beads or agarose beads

note.en: −80°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: Eluted in Laemmli buffer, −20°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: Eluted in Laemmli buffer, −20°C (最长 1 month)

name: Colony PCR Protocol

components.name: 1. 挑取单克隆至 PCR 管 (牙签/枪头)

notes.en: Initial 5 min denaturation at 95°C lyses bacteria to release template DNA. Use M13 universal primers (for pUC vectors) or gene-specific primers. Positive clones should be sequence-verified. Streak colonies onto a master plate in parallel.
notes.zh: 初始变性 5 min 用于裂解菌体释放模板。引物可用 M13 通用引物 (pUC 系列) 或基因特异引物。阳性克隆应送测序验证。同时划线保存菌落至新 LB 平板。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed.; Bergkessel & Guthrie (2013) Methods Enzymol 529:141–149

usage.en: Screen bacterial colonies for correct insert by direct PCR without plasmid isolation.
usage.zh: 菌落 PCR 直接筛选含正确插入片段的克隆，无需提质粒。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3 hours，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: Bacterial colonies on LB agar plate

note.en: 4°C or −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C or −20°C (最长 1 week)

name: Comet Assay (Alkaline)

components.name: 1. Embed cells in 0.5% LMP agarose on slides

notes.en: Detects SSBs, DSBs, alkali-labile sites. All steps 4°C and dim light. Metrics: % tail DNA, tail moment. Positive control: H₂O₂ 100 µM 10 min.
notes.zh: 检测 SSB、DSB、碱不稳定位点。全程 4°C 避光。指标：尾部 DNA 百分比、尾矩。阳性对照：H₂O₂ 100 µM 10 min。

ref: Singh et al. (1988) Exp Cell Res 175:184

usage.en: Detect DNA damage at the single-cell level using single-cell gel electrophoresis (comet assay).
usage.zh: 单细胞凝胶电泳（彗星实验）检测单个细胞 DNA 损伤。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 5 hours

materials.name: Lysis buffer (2.5 M NaCl, 100 mM EDTA, 10 mM Tris, 1% Triton X-100)
Alkaline electrophoresis buffer (300 mM NaOH, 1 mM EDTA)

safeStops.afterStep: Cells embedded in agarose on slides

note.en: 4°C in lysis buffer (up to overnight to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C in lysis buffer (最长 overnight to 1 week)

note.en: 4°C in humid box, dark (up to 24 hours)
note.zh: 4°C in humid box, dark (最长 24 hours)

name: Coomassie Brilliant Blue Staining (SDS-PAGE)

components.name: 1. 固定：50% 甲醇 / 10% 乙酸, 30 min
components.note: 轻柔摇晃, 防止凝胶变形

components.name: 3. 脱色 I：50% 甲醇 / 10% 乙酸, 30 min
4. 脱色 II：5% 甲醇 / 7% 乙酸
components.note: 换液 2–3 次直到背景清晰; 加纸巾吸附色素加速

notes.en: Sensitivity: ~100 ng protein/band. For higher sensitivity use Colloidal Coomassie (Neuhoff method, ~10 ng) or silver stain (~1 ng). CBB G-250 (Colloidal) requires no fixation and has lower background. Microwave shortcut: stain 30s MW → rock 5 min → destain 30s MW → rock 5 min, complete in ~15 min. Store gel in 7% acetic acid or dry.
notes.zh: 灵敏度：~100 ng 蛋白/条带。更灵敏可用 Colloidal Coomassie (Neuhoff 法, ~10 ng) 或银染 (~1 ng)。CBB G-250 (Colloidal) 不需固定步骤且背景更低。微波加速法：染色液微波 30 s → 摇 5 min → 脱色液微波 30 s → 摇 5 min，可在 15 min 内完成。凝胶可保存在 7% 乙酸中或干燥保存。

ref: Neuhoff et al. (1988) Electrophoresis 9:255; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: Visualize protein bands in SDS-PAGE gels using Coomassie Brilliant Blue staining.
usage.zh: 考马斯亮蓝染色可视化 SDS-PAGE 胶中的蛋白条带。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 hours，实操: 45 minutes

note.en: Store in ddH₂O or 7% acetic acid (up to weeks)
note.zh: Store in ddH₂O or 7% acetic acid (最长 weeks)

name: CRISPR sgRNA Cloning (pX459)

notes.en: pX459 (Addgene #62988) = Cas9 + puromycin. pLentiCRISPRv2 (#52961) for lentiviral. Include non-targeting control.
notes.zh: pX459 (Addgene #62988) = Cas9 + 嘌呤霉素。pLentiCRISPRv2 (#52961) 用于慢病毒。包含非靶向对照。

ref: Ran et al. (2013) Nat Protoc 8:2281

usage.en: Clone sgRNA oligos into CRISPR/Cas9 expression vectors for gene editing.
usage.zh: 将 sgRNA 寡核苷酸克隆到 CRISPR/Cas9 表达载体中进行基因编辑。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–5 days，实操: 4 hours

materials.name: LB agar plates with appropriate antibiotic

note.en: −20°C (up to months)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 months)

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 week)

note.en: 4°C (sealed with parafilm) (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C (sealed with parafilm) (最长 1 week)

name: CUT&RUN (Cleavage Under Targets and Release Using Nuclease)
nameCn: CUT&RUN 染色质靶向切割技术

components.name: 1. Harvest 5×10⁵–5×10⁶ cells (no crosslinking); pellet 600×g 3 min RT

note.en: Native conditions — no formaldehyde. Fresh or cryopreserved cells both OK. Low input possible (~5,000 cells).
note.zh: 天然条件——无需甲醛交联。新鲜或冻存细胞均可。最低 ~5,000 细胞。

components.name: 2. Wash 2× with Wash Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM spermidine, protease inhibitors)

note.en: 600×g 3 min RT. Keep cells at RT (not ice) at this stage.
note.zh: 600×g 3 min RT。此阶段保持 RT（非冰上）。

components.name: 3. Bind cells to ConA magnetic beads: 10 µL beads/5×10⁵ cells, RT 10 min, rotate

note.en: Bangs Labs BioMag ConA beads. Magnetically capture cells in subsequent steps.
note.zh: Bangs Labs BioMag ConA 磁珠。后续步骤磁性捕获细胞。

components.name: 4. Permeabilize: add 0.01% digitonin in Wash Buffer, 5 min RT

note.en: Digitonin permeabilizes plasma membrane; nuclear envelope stays intact (unlike NP-40 or Triton X-100).
note.zh: Digitonin 透化细胞膜，核膜保持完整（区别于 NP-40 / Triton X-100）。

components.name: 5. Primary antibody: 1 µg/rxn in Antibody Buffer (Wash + 0.01% digitonin + 2 mM EDTA), 4°C 2 h or overnight

note.en: EDTA prevents premature MNase cleavage. Use ChIP-grade validated Ab. Controls: IgG neg, H3K4me3 pos.
note.zh: EDTA 防止 MNase 提前切割。用 ChIP-grade 验证抗体。对照：IgG 阴性，H3K4me3 阳性。

components.name: 6. Wash 2× Dig-Wash (Wash + 0.01% digitonin); remove unbound Ab

note.en: Magnetic capture between washes.
note.zh: 磁性捕获后洗涤。

components.name: 7. Bind pA-MNase (700 ng/mL) in Dig-Wash, 4°C 1 h

note.en: For mouse primary Ab: use pA/G-MNase or bridge anti-mouse secondary.
note.zh: 小鼠一抗需用 pA/G-MNase 或桥接抗小鼠二抗。

components.name: 9. Activate MNase: add 2 mM CaCl₂, incubate 0°C ice-water bath 30 min

note.en: Ca²⁺ activates MNase → targeted DNA cleavage. 0°C is critical for controlled digestion. Longer = smaller fragments.
note.zh: Ca²⁺ 激活 MNase → 靶向 DNA 切割。0°C 是控制消化的关键。时间越长片段越小。

components.name: 10. Stop: add STOP Buffer (340 mM NaCl, 20 mM EDTA, 4 mM EGTA, 0.01% digitonin, RNase A 0.05 mg/mL, spike-in 25 pg/mL)

note.en: EDTA/EGTA chelates Ca²⁺. E. coli spike-in DNA for normalization (optional).
note.zh: EDTA/EGTA 螯合 Ca²⁺ 终止反应。E. coli spike-in DNA 用于标准化（可选）。

note.en: Cut fragments diffuse out of nuclei.
note.zh: 切割片段从核内扩散到上清。

note.en: Pellet = uncut chromatin.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 未切割染色质。

components.name: 13. DNA extraction: 0.1% SDS + Proteinase K 100 µg/mL, 50°C 1 h; SPRI beads or column cleanup

note.en: Elute in 20–50 µL TE or ddH₂O.
note.zh: 20–50 µL TE 或 ddH₂O 洗脱。

components.name: 14. Library prep for sequencing or qPCR validation

note.en: Bioanalyzer: expect mono/dinucleosome (150/300 bp). NEBNext Ultra II; 10–14 cycles PCR amplification.
note.zh: Bioanalyzer：预期单/双核小体模式（150/300 bp）。NEBNext Ultra II 建库；PCR 10–14 个循环。

notes.en: Advantages over ChIP: no crosslinking artifacts, very low background, works with ≥500 cells, no sonication. Key: 0.01% digitonin only (not Triton), MNase at 0°C. Validate new antibodies with known marks (H3K4me3, H3K27ac) first.
notes.zh: 相比 ChIP 优势：无交联伪影、极低背景、≥500 细胞即可、无需超声。关键：仅用 0.01% digitonin（非 Triton）；MNase 在 0°C 激活。新抗体先用已知修饰（H3K4me3、H3K27ac）验证。

ref: Skene & Henikoff (2017) eLife 6:e21856; Meers et al. (2019) eLife 8:e46314; Kaya-Okur et al. (2019) Nat Commun 10:1930

usage.en: Profile histone modifications and transcription factor binding using CUT&RUN (cleavage under targets and release using nuclease).
usage.zh: CUT&RUN 技术分析组蛋白修饰和转录因子结合谱。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 6 hours

note.en: 4°C (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C (最长 overnight)

note.en: −20°C (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 6 months)

name: CyTOF Combined Surface & Intracellular Staining
nameCn: CyTOF 联合表面和胞内染色方案

components.name: Step 1 (Optional stimulation): Stimulate/treat 1×10⁶ cells per sample. To stop signaling: add 16% PFA 1:10 (100 µL/tube), 10 min RT. Spin 600 g 6 min 4°C. Wash 3× with wash buffer.

note.en: PFA fixation before surface staining may affect some antibody epitopes.
note.zh: 表面染色前 PFA 固定可能影响部分抗体表位。

components.name: Step 2 (Surface staining): Resuspend ≤1.5M cells in 35-40 µL staining buffer. Add Ab mix (10-15 µL, total 50 µL). Incubate 30-60 min RT.
Step 3: Wash 2-3× with 1.5 mL wash buffer. Vortex to mix.
Step 4 (Optional viability): Stain with 1:500 Rh103 in PBS for 20 min, OR 25 µM cisplatin for 1 min.
Step 5 (Fixation): Add 300-500 µL 1.6% PFA in PBS. Incubate 10 min (or 1 h) RT. Spin, discard supernatant (no wash needed).
Step 6 (Permeabilization): Leave ~100 µL on pellet, break up by vortexing. Add cold 100% methanol (0.9 mL per 10⁶ cells, final 90%). Incubate 10 min 4°C (prefer -20°C for 20 min).

note.en: Can store at -20°C up to 24 h, or -80°C up to 1 month.
note.zh: 可 -20°C 保存 24 h，-80°C 保存 1 个月。

components.name: Step 7: Wash 2-4× with >1 mL wash buffer.

note.en: BSA precipitates in methanol — add >1 mL buffer to dissolve.
note.zh: BSA 在甲醇中沉淀——加 >1 mL 缓冲液溶解。

components.name: Step 8 (Intracellular staining): Resuspend in 35-40 µL buffer + Ab mix (10-15 µL), total exactly 50 µL. Incubate 30-60 min RT with gentle agitation.
Step 10 (Ir-intercalator): Add 0.5 mL of 1:1000 Ir-intercalator in PBS + 1.6% PFA. Incubate ≥30 min RT (preferred: overnight at 4°C).
Step 11: Wash 2× with wash buffer. Wash 1× with MilliQ water (use 0.1% BSA in MilliQ if cells stick to plastic). Filter through 35 µm cap. Add EQ beads for acquisition.

notes.en: Staining concentrations matter especially for phospho-proteins. Ab bank mixes are designed for 50 µL final volume. Some cells stick to plastic in MilliQ water wash — add 0.1% BSA. For autosampler: resuspend in 50 µL MilliQ, add 50 µL EQ beads, transfer to 96-deep-well plate. Ideal: 0.5M cells per injection of 400 µL.
notes.zh: 染色浓度对磷酸化蛋白尤其重要。抗体库配方按 50 µL 终体积设计。某些细胞在 MilliQ 水洗涤时粘壁——加 0.1% BSA。自动进样：50 µL MilliQ 重悬 + 50 µL EQ beads。最佳：0.5M 细胞/400 µL。

ref: Adapted from Fluidigm CyTOF protocol (AH Mar 2012, DM Mar 2015)

usage.en: Combined surface and intracellular staining protocol for mass cytometry (CyTOF) with optional stimulation, methanol permeabilization, and Ir-intercalator DNA staining.
usage.zh: 质谱流式（CyTOF）联合表面和胞内染色方案，包含可选刺激、甲醇通透和 Ir-intercalator DNA 染色。

label.en: Protocol — 6-8 hours (or overnight with Ir-intercalator), hands-on: 3 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 6-8 hours (or overnight with Ir-intercalator)，实操: 3 hours

materials.name: Wash buffer: PBS + 0.5% BSA + 0.02% sodium azide

note.en: -20°C in methanol (up to Up to 24 hours)
note.zh: -20°C in methanol (最长 Up to 24 hours)

note.en: -80°C in methanol (up to Up to 1 month)
note.zh: -80°C in methanol (最长 Up to 1 month)

note.en: 4°C in Ir-intercalator/PFA (up to Up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C in Ir-intercalator/PFA (最长 Up to 1 week)

name: Density Gradient Centrifugation (Principles and Applications)
nameCn: 密度梯度离心（原理与应用指南）

components.name: 1. Choose gradient medium based on application

note.en: Sucrose: osmotic, inert, inexpensive. Use for organelles (ER, Golgi, lysosomes), viruses, ribosomes. Percoll (colloidal silica): iso-osmotic at all densities, low viscosity, self-forming. Use for cells, mitochondria, synaptosomes. Ficoll: high MW polymer, low osmolality. Use for PBMCs, leukocytes. Iodixanol (OptiPrep): iso-osmotic and iso-osmolal at all densities. Best for most organelles and EV sub-populations.
note.zh: 蔗糖：高渗透压，惰性，便宜。用于细胞器（ER、Golgi、溶酶体）、病毒、核糖体。Percoll（胶体二氧化硅）：所有密度等渗，低黏度，可自动成梯度。用于细胞、线粒体、突触体。Ficoll：高分子聚合物，低渗透压。用于 PBMC、白细胞。碘克沙醇（OptiPrep）：所有密度等渗等渗透压。最适合大多数细胞器和 EV 亚群。

components.name: 2. Gradient mode selection: rate-zonal (velocity) vs isopycnic (equilibrium)

note.en: Rate-zonal: short spin; particles separate by size + sedimentation coefficient (S). Best for: particles of similar density but different size (ribosomes, RNA). Isopycnic: long spin until equilibrium; particles band at their buoyant density. Best for: organelles, viruses, DNA/RNA.
note.zh: 速率区带（velocity）：短时间离心；按大小 + 沉降系数（S 值）分离。最适合：密度相似但大小不同的颗粒（核糖体、RNA）。等密度（isopycnic）：长时间离心至平衡；颗粒在其浮力密度处成带。最适合：细胞器、病毒、DNA/RNA。

note.en: Pipette denser solution first (bottom of tube), carefully layer less dense solution on top using slow pipetting against tube wall. Chill tube on ice between layers. Use ≥3 steps for good resolution. Typical: 4 layers in 11 mL SW-41 Ti tube.
note.zh: 先加最高密度溶液（管底），沿管壁缓慢加入较低密度溶液。加层间冰上冷却。≥3 层获得良好分辨率。典型：11 mL SW-41 Ti 管中 4 层。

note.en: Use gradient maker (two-chamber device). Pour high-density into mixing chamber, low-density into reservoir; pump into tube from bottom with peristaltic pump. Or: freeze-thaw a step gradient once at −80°C → thaw at 4°C generates linear gradient.
note.zh: 使用梯度仪（双腔装置）。高密度液加入混合腔，低密度液加入储液腔；蠕动泵从管底注入。或：将阶梯梯度 −80°C 冻 1 次 → 4°C 解冻自动形成线性梯度。

components.name: 5. Load sample (volume ≤10% of gradient volume) gently on top or bottom

note.en: Top loading: standard for rate-zonal. Bottom loading (injection): better for equilibrium banding (uses underlayer needle). Sample in same buffer as lightest gradient layer.
note.zh: 顶部上样：速率区带标准方式。底部注射：平衡成带效果更好（用针头在底部注入）。样品用最轻一层梯度相同的缓冲液配制。

components.name: 6. Centrifuge: use swing-bucket rotor (SW-41 Ti for 11 mL; SW-28 for 38 mL)

note.en: SW-41 Ti: 100,000×g (25,000 rpm) = RCF at tube bottom. For rate-zonal: 20,000–40,000×g 1–3 h. For isopycnic: 100,000×g 16–18 h. Always 4°C. No brake.

components.name: 7. Fractionate from top: use fractionator, syringe, or pipette

note.en: Automated: BioComp Gradient Station. Manual: pipette from top in 0.5–1 mL fractions. Alternative: needle puncture at tube bottom, collect drops. Number fractions sequentially from top (#1) to bottom (#n).
note.zh: 自动：BioComp Gradient Station。手动：从顶部吸取 0.5–1 mL 组分。替代：底部针穿刺，收集滴液。组分从顶部（#1）至底部（#n）顺序编号。

components.name: 8. Analyze fractions: assay-specific markers, measure density (refractometer), then assay activity or WB

note.en: Measure refractive index (RI) of each fraction to calculate density. Plot RI vs fraction number to confirm gradient profile. Then assay by WB, enzyme activity, or qPCR depending on application.
note.zh: 用折光仪测量各组分折射率（RI），计算密度。绘制 RI vs 组分编号图确认梯度分布。然后根据应用进行 WB、酶活力或 qPCR 分析。

notes.en: Density reference: nuclei 1.30–1.45, mitochondria 1.18, lysosomes 1.10–1.12, ER 1.14–1.17, Golgi 1.08–1.10, plasma membrane 1.06–1.10, cytoplasm 1.06, exosomes 1.10–1.18 (varies). Rotor k-factor: lower = more gentle separation. Iodixanol (OptiPrep 60% w/v) is currently preferred for most applications over sucrose due to iso-osmolality.
notes.zh: 密度参考：细胞核 1.30–1.45、线粒体 1.18、溶酶体 1.10–1.12、ER 1.14–1.17、Golgi 1.08–1.10、质膜 1.06–1.10、细胞质 1.06、外泌体 1.10–1.18（可变）。转子 k 因子越低 = 分离越温和。碘克沙醇（OptiPrep 60% w/v）因等渗透压特性，目前优先于蔗糖用于大多数实验。

ref: Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.6.1; Bhatt (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450; Rickwood et al. (1994) Preparative Centrifugation (IRL Press); Griffiths (2018) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 78:3.1.1

usage.en: Separate cellular components or particles by density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: 密度梯度离心分离细胞组分或颗粒。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–20 hours，实操: 2–4 hours

materials.name: Sucrose, Percoll, or Ficoll gradient solutions
Sample (cell lysate, organelle suspension, or blood)
Gradient maker or manual layering pipettes

note.en: 4°C, do not disturb (up to 2 hours)
note.zh: 4°C, do not disturb (最长 2 hours)

note.en: 4°C or −80°C depending on application (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C or −80°C depending on application (最长 varies)

name: DNA Ligation (T4 Ligase)

components.name: Linearized vector
components.note: 去磷酸化可降低自连背景

components.name: Insert DNA
components.note: 摩尔比 vector:insert = 1:3–1:5 (粘性末端) 或 1:5–1:10 (平末端)

components.name: 10× T4 Ligase Buffer
components.note: 含 ATP, 勿反复冻融

components.name: 2a. 粘性末端：室温 10 min 或 16°C 过夜
2b. 平末端：16°C 过夜（或室温 2 h 用高浓度酶）
4. 转化 2–5 µL 连接产物

notes.en: Controls: (1) no ligase → assess background; (2) no insert → assess vector self-ligation; (3) uncut vector → assess transformation efficiency. Insert calculation: ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio. Quick Ligation Kit (NEB) completes in 5 min.
notes.zh: 对照组：(1) 无连接酶对照 → 评估自连背景; (2) 无 insert 对照 → 评估载体自连; (3) 未切 vector 对照 → 评估转化效率。Insert 计算公式：ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio。Quick Ligation Kit (NEB) 可 5 min 完成。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; NEB T4 DNA Ligase protocol

usage.en: Ligate DNA insert into linearized vector using T4 DNA ligase.
usage.zh: T4 DNA 连接酶将 DNA 插入片段连接到线性化载体中。

label.en: Protocol — 2 hours or overnight, hands-on: 20 minutes
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 hours or overnight，实操: 20 minutes

materials.name: Insert DNA (purified PCR product or restriction fragment)

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 week)

name: Dual-Luciferase Reporter Assay

components.name: 1. 共转染 Firefly 报告质粒 + Renilla 内参质粒
components.note: 比例 10:1 (如 500 ng Firefly + 50 ng Renilla/24 孔); 加实验质粒或 miRNA mimics

components.name: 2. 24–48 h 后弃培养基, PBS 洗 1×
3. 加 1× PLB 裂解
components.note: 24-well: 100 µL/孔; 96-well: 20 µL/孔; 摇床 15 min RT

components.name: 4. 取 20 µL 裂解液至检测板
components.note: 白色不透明板减少串扰

components.name: 5. 加 100 µL LAR II → 读 Firefly (2 s delay, 10 s read)
6. 加 100 µL Stop & Glo → 读 Renilla
components.note: Stop & Glo 猝灭 Firefly 同时激发 Renilla

components.name: 7. 计算 Ratio = Firefly RLU / Renilla RLU
components.note: 归一化后比较各组差异

notes.en: Firefly = experimental reporter, Renilla = internal control for transfection efficiency. LAR II and Stop & Glo should be at RT before use. Prepare only enough for immediate use (LAR II stable ~8h at RT). Background: <100 RLU. Triplicate wells minimum. For 3'UTR/miRNA target validation: clone target site into psiCHECK-2 (Renilla is the reporter).
notes.zh: Firefly = 实验报告基因，Renilla = 内参控制转染效率。LAR II 和 Stop & Glo 使用前恢复至室温。LAR II 室温稳定约 8h，现配现用。背景 <100 RLU。至少 3 个重复孔。3'UTR/miRNA 靶标验证：用 psiCHECK-2（Renilla 为报告基因）。

ref: Sherf et al. (1996) Promega Notes 57:2; Promega Dual-Luciferase Reporter Assay System Technical Manual TM040

usage.en: Measure promoter activity or pathway activation using dual luciferase reporter assay.
usage.zh: 双荧光素酶报告基因实验检测启动子活性或信号通路激活。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Luminometer or plate reader with luminescence mode

note.en: −80°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 1 month)

name: Electrocompetent E. coli Preparation
nameCn: 电转感受态大肠杆菌的制备

components.name: 1. Inoculate 5 mL LB from glycerol stock; 37°C 250 rpm overnight

note.en: Use DH10B, DH5α, or XL1-Blue for cloning; BL21 for expression. Pre-chill centrifuge to 4°C the night before.
note.zh: 克隆用 DH10B、DH5α 或 XL1-Blue；表达用 BL21。提前将离心机预冷至 4°C。

components.name: 2. Dilute 1:100 into 500 mL fresh LB; shake 37°C 250 rpm to OD₆₀₀ = 0.4–0.6

note.en: This takes 2–3 h. Monitor every 30 min after OD = 0.3. Do not exceed OD 0.6 — competence declines.
note.zh: 通常需要 2–3 h。OD 到 0.3 后每 30 min 监测一次。不超过 OD 0.6 — 感受态下降。

components.name: 3. Chill culture on ice 15–30 min; pre-chill all equipment (tubes, buffers, rotors)

note.en: Every step from here is at 4°C or on ice. Electrocompetent cells are highly temperature-sensitive.
note.zh: 从此步起所有操作在 4°C 或冰上进行。电转感受态细胞对温度极敏感。

note.en: Use pre-chilled bottles. Decant carefully — pellet is loose. Remove as much supernatant as possible (residual salt impairs electroporation).
note.zh: 使用预冷离心瓶。小心倾倒——沉淀松散。尽量去除上清（残留盐分影响电穿孔）。

note.en: Wash 1: resuspend in 500 mL 10% glycerol; spin 4,000×g 15 min 4°C. Wash 2: 250 mL. Wash 3: 50 mL. Then resuspend in 2 mL 10% glycerol. Conductivity must be <100 µS/cm (critical for electroporation efficiency).
note.zh: 洗涤 1：500 mL 10% 甘油重悬；4,000×g 15 min 4°C。洗涤 2：250 mL。洗涤 3：50 mL。最后 2 mL 10% 甘油重悬。电导率需 <100 µS/cm（电穿孔效率关键）。

components.name: 6. Aliquot 50 µL per tube; snap-freeze in liquid N₂; store −80°C

note.en: Single-use aliquots (do not refreeze). Efficiency should be ≥10⁹ CFU/µg pUC19 (verify with test transformation).
note.zh: 50 µL 单次用量分装（勿重复冻融）。效率应 ≥10⁹ CFU/µg pUC19（测试转化验证）。

note.en: Electroporate 1 µL pUC19 (10 pg/µL) with 25 µL cells. Time constant: ≥5 ms (1 mm cuvette). Expect ≥10⁸–10⁹ colonies/µg pUC19 for good batch.
note.zh: 用 1 µL pUC19（10 pg/µL）+ 25 µL 细胞测试电穿孔（1 mm 比色杯，时间常数 ≥5 ms）。优质批次应有 ≥10⁸–10⁹ 菌落/µg pUC19。

notes.en: Electrocompetent cells are 10–100× more efficient than chemical competent (CaCl₂) cells. Useful for: large libraries, low-concentration ligation products, fosmid/BAC transformation. Key: eliminate all salt from cells (LB → salt → arc during electroporation = cell death).
notes.zh: 电转感受态效率比化学法（CaCl₂）高 10–100 倍。适用于：大型文库、低浓度连接产物、fosmid/BAC 转化。关键：彻底去除细胞中所有盐分（LB→盐分→电穿孔时放弧 = 细胞死亡）。

ref: Dower et al. (1988) Nucleic Acids Res 16:6127–6145; Green & Sambrook (2012) Molecular Cloning 4th ed.; Sheng et al. (1995) BioTechniques 18:104

usage.en: Prepare electrocompetent E. coli cells for high-efficiency electroporation.
usage.zh: 制备电转化感受态大肠杆菌，用于高效电转化。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 6 hours，实操: 5 hours

note.en: −80°C in aliquots (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −80°C in aliquots (最长 6 months)

name: EMSA / Electrophoretic Mobility Shift Assay (Gel Shift)
nameCn: 凝胶阻滞实验（EMSA / 电泳迁移率变动分析）

components.name: 1. Prepare labeled probe (dsDNA or ssRNA, 20–40 bp)

note.en: Fluorescent (IRDye 700/800, FAM): anneal complementary oligos 95°C 5 min → slow cool to RT in TE. ³²P: T4 PNK 5'-end labeling 37°C 30 min; purify G-25 spin column. Final probe: 1–10 nM.
note.zh: 荧光标记（IRDye 700/800、FAM）：互补寡核苷酸 95°C 5 min → 缓慢降温至 RT。³²P 标记：T4 PNK 5' 末端标记 37°C 30 min；G-25 柱纯化。探针终浓度 1–10 nM。

note.en: emsa_binding_buffer + 1 µg poly(dI:dC) as nonspecific competitor. Titrate protein: 0, 10, 50, 100, 500 nM. Add all except probe/protein first.
note.zh: emsa_binding_buffer + 1 µg poly(dI:dC) 非特异性竞争。蛋白梯度：0、10、50、100、500 nM。先加除探针和蛋白外的所有组分。

components.name: 3. Add protein (last before probe); mix gently

note.en: Protein titration: 0.1 nM–1 µM. Add probe after protein. Do not vortex.
note.zh: 蛋白梯度 0.1 nM–1 µM。加完蛋白后再加探针。勿涡旋。

components.name: 4. Incubate 20–30 min, RT (or ice for unstable complexes)

note.en: RT for most TF-DNA. 4°C if RT gives smear (unstable complex).
note.zh: 大多数转录因子-DNA 互作在 RT。不稳定复合物在 4°C。

components.name: 5. Cast & pre-run native PAGE (5–10% acrylamide, 0.5× TBE)

note.en: Pre-run 100 V, 1 h, 4°C. 5% for large complexes; 8–10% for small probes (<100 bp).
note.zh: 预电泳 100 V，1 h，4°C。5% 适合大复合物；8–10% 适合小探针（<100 bp）。

components.name: 6. Load samples (no SDS); use 50% glycerol as loading aid

note.en: Add 2 µL 50% glycerol. Load free-probe-only control in last lane.
note.zh: 加 2 µL 50% 甘油助沉。最后泳道加游离探针对照。

note.en: Run slowly — complexes are fragile. BPB should migrate to ~¾ gel length.
note.zh: 慢速电泳（复合物脆弱）。溴酚蓝迁移至凝胶 ~¾ 处停止。

note.en: Fluorescent: scan wet or dry gel (LI-COR). ³²P: fix in 10% MeOH + 10% AcOH 30 min, vacuum dry, expose overnight. Shifted band = complex; free probe at bottom.
note.zh: 荧光：LI-COR 直接扫描。³²P：10% MeOH + 10% AcOH 固定 30 min，真空干燥，曝光过夜。上移条带 = 复合物；底部 = 游离探针。

components.name: 9. Supershift (optional): add antibody 1–5 µg, incubate 30 min before loading

note.en: Supershift = further retardation (confirms protein identity). Disruption = loss of shift.
note.zh: 超阻滞 = 进一步迁移率降低（确认蛋白身份）。抗体干扰 = 阻滞消失。

note.en: Specific competitor → signal disappears. Scrambled sequence → signal maintained. Proves binding specificity.
note.zh: 特异性竞争 → 信号消失。乱序序列 → 信号保留。证明结合特异性。

notes.en: Controls: (1) no protein, (2) excess unlabeled specific probe, (3) scrambled competitor. Kd ≈ [protein] at 50% probe shifted. Troubleshooting: no shift → more protein; smear → run at 4°C or reduce ionic strength.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 无蛋白、(2) 过量未标记特异探针、(3) 乱序竞争。Kd ≈ 50% 探针阻滞时的蛋白浓度。排查：无阻滞 → 增加蛋白；拖尾 → 4°C 电泳或降低离子强度。

ref: Hellman & Fried (2007) Nat Protoc 2:1849–1861; Fried & Liu (1994) Mol Microbiol 14:1083

usage.en: Detect protein-DNA interactions by electrophoretic mobility shift assay (EMSA/gel shift).
usage.zh: 电泳迁移率变动实验（EMSA）检测蛋白质-DNA 相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–5 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: Load immediately on gel (up to 30 min max)
note.zh: Load immediately on gel (最长 30 min max)

name: Enzyme Kinetics Assay (Michaelis-Menten)
nameCn: 酶动力学分析（米氏方程法）

components.name: 1. Purify enzyme to >90% homogeneity; determine concentration

note.en: SDS-PAGE + Coomassie; BCA/Bradford. Use freshly purified or aliquoted protein.
note.zh: SDS-PAGE + 考马斯蓝确认纯度；BCA/Bradford 定量。使用新鲜纯化或分装冻存蛋白。

note.en: Typical: 50 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 1–10 mM MgCl₂ (kinases/ATPases), 1 mM DTT, 0.01% BSA. Use kinase_buffer as start; optimize pH, ions, cofactors.
note.zh: 典型：50 mM HEPES pH 7.5、1–10 mM MgCl₂（激酶/ATPase）、1 mM DTT、0.01% BSA。以 kinase_buffer 为起点优化 pH、离子、辅因子。

note.en: Measure product vs time at saturating [S]. Ensure: (a) <10% substrate consumed, (b) linear product formation. Typical: 0–30 min, sample at 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30 min.
note.zh: 饱和底物浓度下测产物随时间变化。确保：(a) 底物消耗 <10%，(b) 产物线性生成。典型：0–30 min，在 0、5、10、15、20、30 min 取样。

note.en: E.g., 1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 250, 500 µM. Include [S]=0 (background). Prepare in assay buffer.

components.name: 5. Start reactions: add enzyme last; fixed temperature (25–37°C)

note.en: Fixed [E] (10–100 nM). ≥3 replicates per [S]. Water bath or thermocycler for temperature control.
note.zh: 固定 [E]（10–100 nM）。每个 [S] ≥3 重复。水浴或 PCR 仪控温。

components.name: 6. Stop reactions at fixed timepoint (within linear range)

note.en: Methods: (a) NADH-linked: continuous A₃₄₀ reading; (b) colorimetric: add TCA/HCl; (c) fluorescence: quench buffer; (d) radioactive: spot on P81 paper.
note.zh: 停止方法：(a) NADH 偶联：连续读 A₃₄₀；(b) 比色法：加 TCA/HCl；(c) 荧光：加淬灭液；(d) 放射性：点样于 P81 纸。

components.name: 7. Measure signal; calculate initial velocity V₀

note.en: V₀ = Δ[product]/Δtime in linear range. NADH: ε₃₄₀ = 6,220 M⁻¹cm⁻¹ (Beer-Lambert).
note.zh: V₀ = Δ[产物]/Δ时间（线性范围）。NADH 偶联：ε₃₄₀ = 6,220 M⁻¹cm⁻¹（Beer-Lambert 定律）。

components.name: 8. Fit V₀ vs [S] to Michaelis-Menten equation

note.en: V₀ = Vmax × [S] / (Km + [S]). Nonlinear regression: GraphPad Prism, scipy.optimize.curve_fit, or R nls(). Derive Km and Vmax.
note.zh: V₀ = Vmax × [S] / (Km + [S])。非线性回归：GraphPad Prism、scipy.optimize.curve_fit 或 R nls()。获得 Km 和 Vmax。

note.en: kcat (s⁻¹) = catalytic constant. kcat/Km (M⁻¹s⁻¹) = catalytic efficiency. Typical: kcat 0.001–10,000 s⁻¹; kcat/Km up to 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹ (diffusion limit).
note.zh: kcat（s⁻¹）= 催化常数。kcat/Km（M⁻¹s⁻¹）= 催化效率。典型范围：kcat 0.001–10,000 s⁻¹；kcat/Km 最高 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹（扩散极限）。

note.en: Competitive: Km↑, Vmax same. Noncompetitive: Vmax↓, Km same. Uncompetitive: both↓. Use Lineweaver-Burk or global fitting.
note.zh: 竞争性：Km↑、Vmax 不变。非竞争性：Vmax↓、Km 不变。反竞争性：两者↓。用 Lineweaver-Burk 双倒数图或全局拟合分析。

notes.en: Common coupled assays: LDH for pyruvate-generating; PK-LDH for ATPases; NADH at 340 nm. Controls: (a) no enzyme, (b) heat-inactivated, (c) no substrate. Report: Km, Vmax, kcat, kcat/Km, temp, pH, buffer.
notes.zh: 常用偶联法：LDH 偶联丙酮酸生成酶；PK-LDH 偶联 ATPase；NADH 340 nm。对照：(a) 无酶、(b) 热灭活、(c) 无底物。报告：Km、Vmax、kcat、kcat/Km、温度、pH、缓冲条件。

ref: Johnson & Goody (2011) Biochemistry 50:10785; Copeland (2000) Enzymes 2nd ed. Wiley-VCH; Bisswanger (2014) Perspect Sci 1:41–55

usage.en: Determine enzyme kinetic parameters (Km, Vmax) by Michaelis-Menten analysis.
usage.zh: Michaelis-Menten 分析测定酶动力学参数（Km、Vmax）。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 4 hours

name: ER and Golgi Isolation by Sucrose Density Gradient
nameCn: 内质网与高尔基体分离（蔗糖密度梯度法）

components.name: 1. Seed 1–2×10⁸ cells; wash 2× PBS; scrape in cold sucrose_gradient_homog buffer

note.en: Use 5 mL buffer per 10⁸ cells. Soft tissue (liver): 100–500 mg tissue, mince and wash. All steps 4°C.
note.zh: 每 10⁸ 细胞用 5 mL 缓冲液。软组织（肝脏）：100–500 mg，切碎后洗涤。全程 4°C。

components.name: 2. Homogenize: 30–40 Dounce strokes (tight pestle) until >80% cell lysis

note.en: Check by trypan blue every 10 strokes. ER is fragile — do not over-homogenize. N₂ cavitation (600–800 psi, 15 min) is gentler and gives higher ER yield.
note.zh: 每 10 次检查台盼蓝。ER 脆弱——勿过度匀浆。氮气空化（600–800 psi，15 min）更温和，ER 产量更高。

note.en: Postnuclear supernatant (PNS) contains all organelles except nuclei.
note.zh: 核后上清（PNS）含除核以外的所有细胞器。

note.en: Post-mitochondrial supernatant (PMS). Save 100 µL for WB input.
note.zh: 线粒体后上清（PMS）。保存 100 µL 作 WB 投入量对照。

components.name: 5. Crude microsome pellet: 100,000×g, 60 min, 4°C (Ti-70.1 or SW-55)

note.en: Pellet = crude microsomes (ER + Golgi + endosomes + plasma membrane fragments). Supernatant = cytosol. Resuspend crude microsomes in 0.5 mL 250 mM sucrose buffer.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 粗微粒体（ER + Golgi + 内体 + 质膜碎片）。上清 = 细胞质。粗微粒体用 0.5 mL 250 mM 蔗糖缓冲液重悬。

components.name: 6. Prepare discontinuous sucrose gradient in ultracentrifuge tube (SW-41 Ti, 11 mL)

note.en: Layer from bottom (pipette carefully, do not mix): 2.0 M sucrose (1.5 mL) → 1.3 M (3 mL) → 1.15 M (3 mL) → 0.86 M (2 mL). Load sample on top (0.5 mL). Place on ice.
note.zh: 从底部开始（小心不混层）：2.0 M 蔗糖（1.5 mL）→ 1.3 M（3 mL）→ 1.15 M（3 mL）→ 0.86 M（2 mL）。样品（0.5 mL）加在顶部。置于冰上。

components.name: 7. Ultracentrifuge: 100,000×g (25,000 rpm SW-41), 16–18 h, 4°C, no brake

note.en: Long spin for equilibrium banding. Slow acceleration (accel 3) and no brake (decel 0).
note.zh: 长时间离心达到平衡成带。慢加速（3 档）、无刹车（0 档）。

components.name: 8. Collect fractions from top (0.5–1 mL/fraction) using fraction collector or manual pipetting

note.en: Expected positions: Golgi (1.08–1.10 g/mL, at 0.86 M/1.15 M interface) and rough ER (1.17–1.20 g/mL, at 1.3 M/2.0 M interface). Smooth ER bands lighter (~1.14 g/mL).
note.zh: 预期位置：高尔基体（1.08–1.10 g/mL，0.86 M/1.15 M 界面）；粗面内质网（1.17–1.20 g/mL，1.3 M/2.0 M 界面）。光面 ER 较轻（~1.14 g/mL）。

components.name: 9. Identify fractions by Western blot markers

note.en: ER markers: Calnexin (transmembrane), PDI/PDIA3 (luminal), KDEL (lumenal). Golgi markers: GM130 (cis-Golgi), TGN46 (trans-Golgi). Dilute fractions 5× in PBS before WB.
note.zh: ER 标记：Calnexin（跨膜）、PDI/PDIA3（腔内）、KDEL（腔内序列）。高尔基标记：GM130（顺式）、TGN46（反式）。Western blot 前将组分用 PBS 稀释 5 倍。

components.name: 10. Pool and pellet organelle fractions: dilute 5×; 100,000×g 60 min 4°C

note.en: Removes sucrose. Resuspend in desired buffer (e.g., 50 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 150 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA). Protein yield: ~5–50 µg ER per 10⁷ cells.
note.zh: 去除蔗糖。用目标缓冲液（如 50 mM HEPES pH 7.4、150 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA）重悬。蛋白产量：约 5–50 µg ER/10⁷ 细胞。

notes.en: Alternative for Golgi: immunoprecipitation of Golgi membranes using anti-GM130 coated beads (faster, requires antibody). For live-cell ER/Golgi imaging: ER-Tracker (Thermo) or BODIPY-ceramide. Cross-contamination monitoring is essential — include mitochondria (COX IV), PM (Na/K-ATPase), lysosome (LAMP1) markers.
notes.zh: 高尔基体替代法：anti-GM130 磁珠免疫沉淀（更快，需要抗体）。活细胞 ER/Golgi 成像：ER-Tracker（Thermo）或 BODIPY-ceramide。必须监测交叉污染——包含线粒体（COX IV）、质膜（Na/K-ATPase）、溶酶体（LAMP1）标记。

ref: Bhatt et al. (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450; Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.8.1; Barr (2013) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 59:3.29.1

usage.en: Isolate endoplasmic reticulum and Golgi membrane fractions by sucrose density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: 蔗糖密度梯度离心分离内质网和高尔基体膜组分。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 days，实操: 6 hours

materials.name: Cells or tissue (>10⁸ cells or >1 g tissue)
Sucrose gradient solutions (0.25 M, 0.5 M, 0.86 M, 1.3 M)

note.en: Keep on ice, process immediately (up to 1 hour)
note.zh: Keep on ice, process immediately (最长 1 hour)

note.en: −80°C in aliquots (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C in aliquots (最长 1 month)

name: Ethanol Precipitation of Nucleic Acids

components.name: 1. 加 1/10 vol 3 M NaOAc (pH 5.2)
components.note: DNA 也可用 NaCl 或 NH₄OAc

components.name: 2. 加 2.5 vol 冰冷 100% 乙醇
components.note: RNA 或低浓度 DNA: 加 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) 做载体

components.name: 3. 混匀, -20°C 放置 ≥30 min
components.note: 过夜可提高低浓度样品回收率

components.name: 5. 弃上清 → 加 500 µL 冰冷 70% 乙醇
7. 彻底去除上清
components.note: 吸管小心吸, 勿碰沉淀

components.name: 9. 溶解于 TE 或 H₂O

notes.en: 70% ethanol wash removes residual salts. Isopropanol precipitation (0.7 vol, no salt needed) uses less volume, good for large samples, but pellet contains more salt — wash extra. SDS co-precipitates — remove with KOAc or phenol-chloroform first. Do not use ethanol precipitation to recover DNA from <10 µL volumes.
notes.zh: 70% 乙醇洗涤去除残余盐。异丙醇沉淀 (0.7 vol, 无需加盐) 体积更小，适合大体积样品，但沉淀含更多盐需多洗一次。SDS 会共沉淀——需先用 KOAc 沉淀去除或酚氯仿提取。不要使用乙醇沉淀从 <10 µL 体积回收 DNA。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; Green & Sambrook (2012) Molecular Cloning, 4th Ed

usage.en: Concentrate and purify DNA or RNA by ethanol precipitation.
usage.zh: 乙醇沉淀法浓缩和纯化 DNA 或 RNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: −20°C or −80°C (up to overnight to 1 week)
note.zh: −20°C or −80°C (最长 overnight to 1 week)

name: Exosome / Extracellular Vesicle Isolation (Differential Ultracentrifugation)
nameCn: 外泌体/胞外囊泡分离（差速超速离心法）

components.name: 1. Culture cells in EV-depleted medium (48–72 h conditioned medium)

note.en: EV-free FBS: ultracentrifuge commercial FBS at 100,000×g 18 h 4°C; collect supernatant. Or use serum-free medium for last 24–48 h (lower contamination, lower yield). Volume: ≥50 mL conditioned medium needed.
note.zh: 去 EV 血清：商业 FBS 100,000×g 4°C 18 h 超速离心；取上清。或最后 24–48 h 改无血清培养基（污染少，产量低）。需 ≥50 mL 条件培养基。

note.en: Remove cells. Keep supernatant.
note.zh: 去除细胞。保留上清。

note.en: Pellet = apoptotic bodies (discard). Keep supernatant.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 凋亡小体（弃去）。保留上清。

note.en: Pellet = large microvesicles/MVBs (200–1,000 nm). Can collect separately. Keep supernatant for exosome isolation.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 大型微囊泡/MVB（200–1,000 nm，可单独收集）。保留上清用于外泌体分离。

note.en: Removes residual large particles. PES membrane (low protein binding). Keep filtrate.
note.zh: 去除残余大颗粒。用低蛋白结合 PES 膜。保留滤液。

components.name: 6. Exosome pellet: 100,000×g, 70–90 min, 4°C (Ti-45 or SW-41 Ti rotor)

note.en: First 100k spin pellets exosomes (30–200 nm). Discard supernatant (cytosol + soluble proteins).
note.zh: 第一次 100k 离心沉淀外泌体（30–200 nm）。弃去上清（细胞质 + 可溶蛋白）。

components.name: 7. Wash: resuspend pellet in 10 mL cold PBS; 100,000×g, 70 min, 4°C

note.en: Removes contaminating soluble proteins. Repeat once more for higher purity.
note.zh: 去除污染的可溶蛋白。再重复一次可提高纯度。

components.name: 8. Resuspend final pellet in PBS or appropriate buffer (50–200 µL)

note.en: Pipette gently. Do not vortex. Store at −80°C (single-use aliquots) or use fresh. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw.
note.zh: 轻柔吸打重悬。不涡旋。−80°C 单次分装保存或新鲜使用。避免反复冻融。

note.en: MISEV2018 guidelines (Théry 2018): report at least 3 markers. NTA (NanoSight, ZetaView): size 50–200 nm, report concentration/mL. TEM: cup-shaped morphology. Negative markers: GM130 (no Golgi contamination), Cytochrome C (no mitochondria).
note.zh: MISEV2018 指南（Théry 2018）：至少报告 3 个标记。NTA（NanoSight、ZetaView）：尺寸 50–200 nm，报告浓度/mL。透射电镜：杯形形态。阴性标记：GM130（无 Golgi 污染）、细胞色素 c（无线粒体）。

notes.en: This protocol yields crude exosome preparation. For higher purity: further fractionate on iodixanol (OptiPrep) density gradient (top-loading, 40,000×g 18 h). Typical yield: 10⁹–10¹⁰ particles/mL from 50 mL conditioned medium. Alternative methods: SEC (size exclusion on qEV columns), precipitation (ExoQuick, fast but impure), immunoaffinity (anti-CD63 beads). All reported per MISEV2018 guidelines.
notes.zh: 本方案获得粗制外泌体制品。更高纯度：碘克沙醇（OptiPrep）密度梯度进一步分离（顶部上样，40,000×g 18 h）。典型产量：50 mL 条件培养基 → 10⁹–10¹⁰ 颗粒/mL。替代方法：SEC（qEV 柱分子排阻）、沉淀法（ExoQuick，快速但不纯）、免疫亲和法（anti-CD63 磁珠）。所有报告遵循 MISEV2018 指南。

ref: Théry et al. (2006) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.22.1; Théry et al. (2018) J Extracell Vesicles 7:1535750 (MISEV2018); Witwer et al. (2021) J Extracell Vesicles 10:e12080

usage.en: Isolate exosomes/small extracellular vesicles from cell culture medium by differential ultracentrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速超离法从细胞培养液中分离外泌体/小细胞外囊泡。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

materials.name: Conditioned cell culture medium (48–72 h, serum-free or exosome-depleted FBS)

note.en: −80°C (up to 3 months)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 3 months)

note.en: −80°C in PBS (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C in PBS (最长 1 month)

name: FBS Heat Inactivation & Aliquoting SOP
nameCn: FBS 热灭活与分装标准操作规程

components.name: Day 1 PM: Thaw FBS bottles (up to 4 × 500 mL) overnight at room temperature. Turn on 56°C water bath. Verify temperature with thermometer reads ~56°C.
Day 2 AM: Gently rotate thawed FBS (avoid excessive bubbles). Place bottles in 56°C water bath.

note.en: Confirm thermometer inside bath reads ~56°C before starting.
note.zh: 开始前确认浴槽内温度计显示 ~56°C。

components.name: Set timer. Heat-inactivate for EXACTLY 30 minutes. Do NOT exceed 30 min.

note.en: CRITICAL: Exceeding 30 min degrades growth factors.
note.zh: 关键：超过 30 分钟会降解生长因子。

components.name: Remove bottles. Turn off water bath.
Wipe bottles dry, spray with 70% ethanol, bring into biosafety cabinet.
Layout 25 × 50 mL tubes. Label caps 'FBS'. Aliquot ~40 mL per tube (2 bottles = ~25 tubes).

note.en: Aseptic technique is critical — change serological pipette at any sign of contamination.
note.zh: 无菌操作至关重要——如怀疑污染立即更换移液管。

components.name: Label storage with date and tube count.

notes.en: Heat inactivation at 56°C for 30 min destroys complement proteins while preserving growth factors. Do NOT heat-inactivate for longer — it reduces serum quality. Typical FBS: Characterized, Canadian origin (e.g. Cytiva SH30396.03). Each 500 mL bottle yields ~12 aliquots at 40 mL each.
notes.zh: 56°C 30 分钟热灭活破坏补体蛋白同时保留生长因子。不可加热过久——降低血清质量。每瓶 500 mL 约分装 12 管（每管 40 mL）。

ref: Standard cell culture protocol

usage.en: Standard operating procedure for heat-inactivating and aliquoting fetal bovine serum for cell culture use.
usage.zh: 胎牛血清热灭活及分装标准操作规程。

label.en: Protocol — 2 days (overnight thaw + processing), hands-on: 2 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days (overnight thaw + processing)，实操: 2 hours

note.en: RT thawing (up to Overnight)
note.zh: RT thawing (最长 Overnight)

note.en: -30°C or -20°C (up to 12 months)
note.zh: -30°C or -20°C (最长 12 months)

name: Flow Cytometry Surface Staining
nameCn: 流式细胞术表面染色流程

components.name: 3. Fc Block (人: Human TruStain; 鼠: anti-CD16/32)

notes.en: For intracellular staining: fix with 4% PFA 20 min, then permeabilize with 0.1% saponin. Titrate each antibody individually. Compensation controls required.
notes.zh: 胞内染色需先固定 (4% PFA 20 min) 再透化 (0.1% saponin)。每个抗体需单独滴度实验。compensation controls 必需。FMO controls 用于 gating。

ref: Cossarizza et al. (2019) Eur J Immunol 49:1457–1973; Perfetto et al. (2004) Nat Rev Immunol 4:648–655

usage.en: Analyze cell surface or intracellular markers by multi-color flow cytometry.
usage.zh: 多色流式细胞术分析细胞表面或胞内标志物。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: 4°C in dark (up to 24 hours)
note.zh: 4°C in dark (最长 24 hours)

name: Gel Extraction (DNA Recovery)

components.name: 1. 琼脂糖凝胶电泳分离 DNA 片段
2. UV/蓝光灯下切取目的条带
components.note: 低功率短时间暴露, 减少 UV 损伤; 蓝光更安全

components.name: 3. 称重胶块 → 加 3 vol Buffer QG
4. 50°C 孵育 10 min, 每 2–3 min 涡旋
components.note: 完全溶解, 颜色应为黄色 (pH ≤7.5)

components.name: 5. 加 1 gel vol 异丙醇 (>4 kb 片段可选)
6. 转移至柱, 离心 1 min
7. 洗涤 Buffer PE 750 µL, 离心 1 min
8. 空转离心 1 min 去残留乙醇
9. 洗脱: 30 µL EB 或 H₂O, 静置 1 min → 离心
components.note: 预热至 50°C 可提高大片段回收率

notes.en: Typical recovery 70-80%. Small fragments (<100 bp) recover poorly — use AMPure XP beads instead. Low-melting-point (LMP) agarose melts at 37°C, reducing DNA damage. TAE gels give better recovery than TBE. Do not use >2% agarose for large fragment recovery.
notes.zh: 回收率通常 70–80%。小片段 (<100 bp) 回收率低，建议用 Agencourt AMPure XP 磁珠代替。低熔点琼脂糖 (LMP agarose) 可直接在 37°C 溶解，减少 DNA 损伤。TAE 胶回收率优于 TBE。勿使用 >2% 琼脂糖凝胶做大片段回收。

ref: QIAGEN QIAquick Gel Extraction Kit Handbook; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: Purify specific DNA fragments from agarose gels by gel extraction.
usage.zh: 从琼脂糖胶中切胶回收纯化特定 DNA 片段。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes，实操: 30 minutes

materials.name: Agarose gel with separated DNA bands

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: −20°C (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 6 months)

name: Genomic DNA Extraction (Cells/Tissue)
nameCn: 基因组 DNA 提取（细胞/组织）

components.name: 1. 裂解：加 Lysis Buffer + Proteinase K
components.note: 56°C 孵育 1–3 h 或过夜; 组织需剪碎

components.name: 2. RNase A 处理 (可选, 37°C 30 min)
3. 蛋白沉淀 (加 Protein Precipitation Sol)
components.note: 涡旋 20 s → 冰上 5 min → 离心 16,000×g 3 min

components.name: 4. 异丙醇沉淀 DNA
components.note: 加等体积异丙醇到上清, 轻柔翻转

components.name: 7. 风干 5–15 min → 溶解于 TE
components.note: 室温或 65°C 孵育助溶解; 勿涡旋以避免剪切

notes.en: Phenol-chloroform method: replace step 3 with equal volume phenol:chloroform:IAA (25:24:1) extraction → chloroform:IAA extraction → ethanol precipitation. Use wide-bore tips for high-MW gDNA to avoid shearing. Blood samples: lyse RBCs first. FFPE tissue: deparaffinize first. Column extraction (DNeasy) is faster but yields lower MW DNA.
notes.zh: 酚氯仿提取法：步骤 3 换为等体积 phenol:chloroform:IAA (25:24:1) 提取 → 再用 chloroform:IAA 提取 → 乙醇沉淀。高分子量 gDNA 用宽口枪头操作，避免剪切。血液样品需先裂解红细胞。FFPE 组织需去石蜡。柱提取法 (DNeasy) 更快但产量和分子量较低。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; QIAGEN DNeasy Blood & Tissue Handbook

usage.en: Extract high-molecular-weight genomic DNA from cells or tissues.
usage.zh: 从细胞或组织中提取高分子量基因组 DNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: 55°C with proteinase K (up to overnight)
note.zh: 55°C with proteinase K (最长 overnight)

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: 4°C (short-term) or −20°C (long-term) (up to years)
note.zh: 4°C (short-term) or −20°C (long-term) (最长 years)

name: Gibson Assembly

components.name: 1. 设计引物 (15-25 bp 重叠区)
3. 冰上配制反应: Master Mix + DNA 片段

notes.en: Seamless, scarless DNA assembly. Joins 2-6 fragments with 15-25 bp overlaps in a single isothermal reaction. No restriction enzymes or ligase needed separately — T5 exonuclease, Phusion polymerase, and Taq ligase work together in one tube.
notes.zh: 无缝无疤 DNA 组装。通过 15-25 bp 重叠区在单一等温反应中连接 2-6 个片段。无需单独使用限制酶或连接酶——T5 外切酶、Phusion 聚合酶和 Taq 连接酶在同一管中协同工作。

ref: Gibson et al. (2009) Nat Methods 6:343–345; NEB Protocol E5510 (protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.bdddi226)

usage.en: Assemble multiple DNA fragments seamlessly using Gibson isothermal assembly.
usage.zh: Gibson 等温组装法无缝连接多个 DNA 片段。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 hour，实操: 20 minutes

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 week)

note.en: 4°C (plates) (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C (plates) (最长 1 week)

name: GST-Tag Protein Purification (Glutathione Sepharose)
nameCn: GST 标签蛋白纯化（谷胱甘肽琼脂糖亲和层析）

components.name: 1. Express GST-fusion protein in E. coli BL21(DE3)

note.en: IPTG 0.1–0.5 mM; 18°C overnight for soluble expression (preferred over 37°C 4 h). Harvest: 5,000×g 10 min 4°C.
note.zh: IPTG 0.1–0.5 mM；18°C 过夜低温诱导（优于 37°C 4 h 高温诱导）。5,000×g 10 min 4°C 收菌。

components.name: 2. Resuspend pellet in GST Lysis Buffer

note.en: PBS pH 7.4 + 1% Triton X-100 + 1 mM DTT + protease inhibitors + 1 mM PMSF; 5 mL/g wet weight
note.zh: PBS pH 7.4 + 1% Triton X-100 + 1 mM DTT + 蛋白酶抑制剂 + 1 mM PMSF；每克湿重加 5 mL

components.name: 3. Lyse: sonicate on ice (5 × 30 s, 40% amplitude, 1 min rest)

note.en: Keep sample below 10°C throughout. Pre-cool probe.
note.zh: 全程保持样品 <10°C。预冷超声探头。

note.en: Keep supernatant. Optional: 0.45 µm filter to protect column.
note.zh: 保留上清。可选：0.45 µm 过滤保护柱子。

components.name: 5. Equilibrate Glutathione Sepharose 4B: 10 CV PBS pH 7.4

note.en: Use 1 mL resin per 10 mg expected fusion protein. Or use GSTrap FF 5 mL column (AKTA).
note.zh: 每 10 mg 预估融合蛋白用 1 mL 树脂。或使用 GSTrap FF 5 mL 柱（AKTA）。

components.name: 6. Bind: load cleared lysate, flow rate ≤1 mL/min, 4°C

note.en: Gravity or peristaltic pump. Collect flow-through for SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 重力法或蠕动泵上样。收集穿透液做 SDS-PAGE 检测。

components.name: 7. Wash: 10–20 CV PBS pH 7.4 until A280 baseline

note.en: Optional high-salt wash: PBS + 500 mM NaCl, 5 CV.
note.zh: 可选高盐洗涤：PBS + 500 mM NaCl，5 CV。

components.name: 8. Elute: 5–10 CV gst_elution_reduced (10 mM GSH, 50 mM Tris pH 8.0)

note.en: Collect 0.5 mL fractions; protein peak in fractions 2–6.
note.zh: 收集 0.5 mL 组分；蛋白峰通常在第 2–6 组分。

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic; 3× changes at 4°C. Or desalt by HiTrap Desalting.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 透析换液；4°C 换 3 次。或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱。

components.name: 10. Optional: cleave GST-tag (thrombin or PreScission protease)

note.en: Thrombin: 1 U/100 µg, RT 2 h or 4°C overnight. PreScission: 1 U/µg, 4°C overnight. Reverse purification: pass through GSTrap → cleaved protein flows through.
note.zh: 凝血酶：1 U/100 µg，RT 2 h 或 4°C 过夜。PreScission：1 U/µg，4°C 过夜。反向纯化：过 GSTrap 柱 → 切割后蛋白在穿透液中。

note.en: Typical yield: 2–20 mg/L culture.
note.zh: 典型产量：2–20 mg/L 培养液。

notes.en: GST (26 kDa) may affect folding — consider PreScission cleavage. GST often dimerizes. Lower IPTG (0.1 mM) + 18°C dramatically improves solubility. Avoid detergents >0.1% in binding buffer (strips GST from beads).
notes.zh: GST 标签（26 kDa）可能影响蛋白折叠，建议 PreScission 蛋白酶切除。GST 易二聚化。低 IPTG（0.1 mM）+ 低温（18°C）显著提高可溶性。结合缓冲液洗涤剂 ≤0.1%。

ref: Harper & Speicher (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 6.6.1–26; GE Healthcare Glutathione Sepharose Handbook; Smith & Johnson (1988) Gene 67:31–40

usage.en: Purify GST-tagged recombinant proteins using glutathione affinity chromatography.
usage.zh: 谷胱甘肽亲和层析纯化 GST 标签重组蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 days，实操: 6 hours

note.en: 4°C on ice (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C on ice (最长 overnight)

note.en: −80°C + 10% glycerol (up to 12 months)
note.zh: −80°C + 10% glycerol (最长 12 months)

name: GST/His Pull-Down Assay (Protein-Protein Interaction)
nameCn: GST/His Pull-Down 蛋白互作实验

components.name: 1. Express and purify GST-bait protein (or His-bait) from E. coli

note.en: gst_tag_purification or his_tag_purification. Need ≥5 µg purified bait per reaction. Also purify GST-alone as negative control.
note.zh: gst_tag_purification 或 his_tag_purification。每个反应需 ≥5 µg 纯化诱饵蛋白。同时纯化 GST 单独作为阴性对照。

components.name: 2. Prepare prey protein: cell lysate or purified recombinant

note.en: Cell lysate: lyse 10⁷ cells in 500 µL NP-40 lysis buffer (np40_lysis + protease inhibitors), 30 min ice. Clarify: 16,000×g 15 min 4°C. Pre-clear lysate with empty beads (glutathione or Ni-NTA) 1 h 4°C.
note.zh: 细胞裂解物：10⁷ 细胞加 500 µL NP-40 裂解液（np40_lysis + 蛋白酶抑制剂），冰上 30 min。16,000×g 15 min 4°C 澄清。空白磁珠预清除 1 h 4°C。

components.name: 3. Immobilize bait: 5 µg GST-bait + 20 µL glutathione beads (or 5 µg His-bait + Ni-NTA beads)

note.en: Rotate 1 h 4°C in binding buffer (PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 1 mM DTT). Wash beads 3× to remove unbound bait.
note.zh: 结合缓冲液（PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 1 mM DTT）中 4°C 旋转 1 h。洗涤 3 次去除未结合诱饵。

components.name: 4. Add prey: 500 µg cell lysate (or 5 µg purified prey) to bait-beads

note.en: Final volume ~500 µL in binding buffer. Controls: (a) GST-alone beads + same prey (negative); (b) GST-bait beads + lysate buffer only (no-prey control).
note.zh: 终体积 ~500 µL 结合缓冲液。对照：(a) GST 空白磁珠 + 同样猎物（阴性）；(b) GST-诱饵磁珠 + 仅缓冲液（无猎物对照）。

note.en: Longer incubation = more background. Start with 2 h; optimize.
note.zh: 孵育时间越长背景越高。先试 2 h；后续优化。

components.name: 6. Wash beads 4–5× with wash buffer (PBS + 0.1–0.5% NP-40 + 150–300 mM NaCl)

note.en: High NaCl/detergent washes reduce background. Typical: 3× with 0.1% NP-40 + 150 mM NaCl; then 2× with 0.5% NP-40 + 300 mM NaCl. Centrifuge 2,500×g 2 min between washes.
note.zh: 高盐/高去污剂减少背景。典型：3× 0.1% NP-40 + 150 mM NaCl；2× 0.5% NP-40 + 300 mM NaCl。洗涤间离心 2,500×g 2 min。

components.name: 7. Elute: add 30 µL 2× Laemmli + boil 95°C 5 min; or 50 µL glutathione elution (10 mM GSH)

note.en: SDS elution: fast and complete but denatures proteins (no downstream native assay). Glutathione elution: native, lower yield.
note.zh: SDS 洗脱：快速完全但蛋白变性（无法用于后续天然条件实验）。谷胱甘肽洗脱：非变性条件，产量低。

components.name: 8. Western blot: detect prey protein with specific antibody

note.en: Load: 5% input, GST-bait pull-down, GST-alone pull-down. Blot for prey protein AND bait (Coomassie or anti-GST to show equal loading). Interaction confirmed if prey band appears only in bait lane (not GST-alone).
note.zh: 上样：5% input、GST-诱饵 pull-down、GST 空白 pull-down。检测猎物蛋白和诱饵蛋白（考马斯或 anti-GST 证明等量上样）。猎物条带仅在诱饵泳道出现（非 GST 空白）即确认互作。

notes.en: Pull-down is the in vitro version of Co-IP — uses purified recombinant bait. Advantages: no cross-reactivity of IP antibodies, controls for direct vs indirect interaction. Limitations: bait is bacterially expressed (no PTMs); overexpression artifacts. For in vivo interaction, use coip_protocol. For transient interactions: crosslink (DSP, 0.5 mM) before lysis.
notes.zh: Pull-down 是 Co-IP 的体外版——使用纯化重组诱饵蛋白。优势：避免 IP 抗体交叉反应，可区分直接/间接互作。局限：诱饵蛋白为原核表达（无 PTM）；过表达伪影。体内互作用 coip_protocol。短暂互作：裂解前交联（DSP，0.5 mM）。

ref: Brymora et al. (2004) Methods Mol Biol 261:247–262; Louche et al. (2017) Methods Mol Biol 1615:553–564

usage.en: Detect direct protein-protein interactions using an in vitro pulldown assay with tagged bait protein.
usage.zh: 体外 pulldown 实验检测标签蛋白与靶蛋白的直接相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 4 hours

note.en: −20°C in Laemmli buffer (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C in Laemmli buffer (最长 1 month)

name: His-Tag Protein Purification (Ni-NTA IMAC)
nameCn: His 标签蛋白纯化（Ni-NTA IMAC 亲和层析）

note.en: See bacterial_protein_expression; IPTG induction; harvest cells 5,000×g 10 min 4°C
note.zh: 参见 bacterial_protein_expression；IPTG 诱导；5,000×g 10 min 4°C 收菌

note.en: ~5 mL per gram wet pellet; lysis_buffer_mild or 50 mM NaH₂PO₄, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole, pH 8.0
note.zh: 每克湿菌体加 ~5 mL；lysis_buffer_mild 或 50 mM NaH₂PO₄、300 mM NaCl、10 mM imidazole，pH 8.0

components.name: 3. Lyse cells by sonication on ice

note.en: 3–5 × 30 s pulses, 30–40% amplitude, 60 s rest between pulses, ice bath; or French press 18,000 psi × 2 passes; or freeze-thaw 3× (−80°C/37°C)
Keep supernatant (soluble fraction). Save pellet for inclusion body protocol if needed. Optional: add 0.1% Triton X-100 before spin.
note.zh: 上清为可溶组分。保留沉淀做包涵体纯化（如需要）。可选：离心前加 0.1% Triton X-100 减少非特异结合。

components.name: 5. Equilibrate Ni-NTA resin with Binding Buffer

note.en: 1–2 mL resin per 50 mL lysate (batch) or 5 mL column for FPLC. Wash 5 CV his_binding buffer (20 mM imidazole)
note.zh: 批量法：每 50 mL 裂解液用 1–2 mL 树脂；FPLC 用 5 mL 柱。5 CV his_binding 缓冲液（20 mM imidazole）平衡

components.name: 6. Bind: incubate lysate with resin, 4°C rotate 1 h

note.en: Batch: rotate 1 h 4°C; Column: load 0.5–1 mL/min. Keep flow-through for SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 批量法：4°C 旋转 1 h；柱层析：0.5–1 mL/min 上样。保留穿透液做 SDS-PAGE 检测。

components.name: 7. Wash 1: 10 CV Binding Buffer (20 mM imidazole)

note.en: Remove bulk contaminants. Collect fractions for SDS-PAGE monitoring.
note.zh: 去除大部分杂蛋白。收集洗涤液做 SDS-PAGE 监测。

components.name: 8. Wash 2 (optional): 5 CV high-salt wash (500 mM NaCl, 50 mM imidazole)

note.en: imac_wash_highsalt; removes DnaK. Optional: add 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂.
note.zh: imac_wash_highsalt 高盐洗涤；去除 DnaK。可选加 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂。

note.en: imac_elution_500; collect 0.5–1 mL fractions. Pool peak A280 fractions; run SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: imac_elution_500；收集 0.5–1 mL 组分。合并 A280 峰组分；SDS-PAGE 检测。

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic, 2× changes 2 h 4°C; or HiTrap Desalting on FPLC (5 min). Imidazole absorbs UV and inhibits some assays.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 透析换液，4°C 每次 2 h 换 2 次；或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱（5 min）。咪唑有紫外吸收且抑制部分实验。

note.en: Expect >90% purity from single Ni-NTA step; 1–10 mg/L culture typical yield.
note.zh: 单步 Ni-NTA 纯度 >90%；典型产量 1–10 mg/L 培养液。

note.en: TEV: 1:50 enzyme:substrate, 4°C overnight or 30°C 2 h (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 0.5 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT). Reverse Ni-NTA: cleaved protein in flow-through; His-tag + uncleaved bind.
note.zh: TEV: 酶:底物 = 1:50，4°C 过夜或 30°C 2 h（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、0.5 mM EDTA、1 mM DTT）。反向 Ni-NTA：切割后蛋白在穿透液中；His-tag 和未切割蛋白结合。

note.en: Add 10% glycerol for cryoprotection. Stable 6–12 months at −80°C. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw.
note.zh: 加 10% 甘油冻存保护。−80°C 稳定 6–12 个月。避免反复冻融。

notes.en: Yield: 1–10 mg/L E. coli culture. For inclusion bodies: solubilize with 8 M urea or 6 M GuHCl; bind under denaturing conditions; refold by dialysis against decreasing denaturant. Monitor all fractions by SDS-PAGE. Use Bradford/BCA for quantification.
notes.zh: 产量：每升 E. coli 培养液 1–10 mg。包涵体蛋白：加 8 M 尿素或 6 M 盐酸胍溶解，变性条件下结合，通过梯度透析复性。全程收集 SDS-PAGE 监测。BCA 或 Bradford 定量。

ref: Kimple et al. (2013) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 73:9.9.1–23; Bornhorst & Falke (2000) Methods Enzymol 326:245; QIAGEN Ni-NTA Manual 5th ed.; Hochuli et al. (1988) Bio/Technology 6:1321

usage.en: Purify His-tagged recombinant proteins by Ni-NTA (IMAC) affinity chromatography.
usage.zh: Ni-NTA 亲和层析（IMAC）纯化 His 标签重组蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 days，实操: 6 hours

note.en: 4°C on ice (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C on ice (最长 overnight)

note.en: −80°C + 10% glycerol (up to 12 months)
note.zh: −80°C + 10% glycerol (最长 12 months)

name: Immunofluorescence (IF) Protocol

components.name: 7. 封闭 (3% BSA + 5% serum) 1 h RT
8. 一抗 (稀释于封闭液) 4°C 过夜
10. 荧光二抗 1 h RT 避光

notes.en: Secondary antibody: Alexa Fluor 488/555/647. Protect from light. Tissue sections require antigen retrieval (heat-induced or enzymatic). Confocal: recommend 63× oil immersion.
notes.zh: 二抗选择: Alexa Fluor 488/555/647 等。避光操作。组织切片需抗原修复 (热修复或酶消化)。共聚焦推荐 63× oil 物镜。

ref: Donaldson (2015) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 69:4.3.1; Im et al. (2019) STAR Protoc 1:100023; CSH Protocols

usage.en: Visualize protein localization in fixed cells using fluorescent antibody staining and microscopy.
usage.zh: 免疫荧光染色可视化固定细胞中蛋白质的定位。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 3 hours

materials.name: Cells on coverslips or chamber slides

note.en: 4°C in PBS (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C in PBS (最长 overnight)

note.en: 4°C in humidity chamber (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C in humidity chamber (最长 overnight)

note.en: 4°C in dark (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C in dark (最长 1 week)

name: Immunofluorescence Staining for Cryostat Sections
nameCn: 冰冻切片免疫荧光染色方案

components.name: Step 1: Fix tissue sections with 3.2% PFA (prewarmed at 37°C) for 15 min.
Step 2: Rinse 3× with PBS, 5 min each.
Step 3: Block for 30 min with blocking buffer (PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum).
Step 4: Prepare primary antibody in blocking buffer.

note.en: Typical: 1:200. Some antibodies (e.g. Ly6G 2 mg/mL): 1:800. Titrate if high background.
note.zh: 通常 1:200。某些抗体（如 Ly6G 2 mg/mL）：1:800。背景高则滴定优化。

components.name: Step 5: Incubate primary antibody overnight at 4°C.
Step 6: Wash 3× with PBS, 5 min each.
Step 7: Prepare secondary antibody (1:500 typical) in blocking buffer with DAPI (1:1000). Incubate 1 h at RT.

note.en: Some antibodies may need higher dilution to reduce background.
note.zh: 某些二抗可能需更高稀释倍数减少背景。

components.name: Step 9: Mount in anti-fade mounting buffer. Seal with nail polish. Dry overnight at RT.
Step 10: Image on fluorescence microscope, or store at -20°C for later use.

notes.en: Saponin-based blocking buffer is suitable for intracellular targets. For membrane-only targets, 0.1% Triton X-100 can substitute for saponin. Keep sections moist throughout — never let them dry. Use a humid dark box during antibody incubations.
notes.zh: 皂苷通透适合细胞内靶标。仅膜靶标可用 0.1% Triton X-100 替代皂苷。全程保持切片湿润——切勿干燥。抗体孵育时使用避光湿盒。

ref: Adapted from standard cryostat immunofluorescence protocol (2021)

usage.en: Immunofluorescence staining protocol for cryostat-sectioned frozen tissue with saponin-based permeabilization.
usage.zh: 冰冻切片免疫荧光染色方案，使用皂苷通透。

label.en: Protocol — 2 days (overnight primary antibody), hands-on: 2 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days (overnight primary antibody)，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Blocking buffer: PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum

note.en: 4°C in humidity chamber (up to Overnight (required))
note.zh: 4°C in humidity chamber (最长 Overnight (required))

note.en: -20°C protected from light (up to Weeks)
note.zh: -20°C protected from light (最长 Weeks)

name: Immunohistochemistry on Paraffin Sections (IHC-P)

note.en: 4–5 µm FFPE on positively charged slides (Superfrost Plus). Ensures adhesion & melts paraffin.
note.zh: 4–5 µm FFPE 切片贴附于正电荷载玻片（Superfrost Plus）。确保贴附并熔化石蜡。

components.name: 2. Deparaffinize: 3 × 5 min xylene → rehydrate: 100% EtOH × 2 → 95% → 70% → ddH₂O × 2

note.en: Each step 5 min. Fume hood for xylene.
note.zh: 每步 5 min。二甲苯需在通风橱操作。

note.en: Citrate pH 6.0 (citrate_buffer_ar): most cytoplasmic/ER antigens. EDTA pH 9.0 (ar_edta_ph9): nuclear/membrane antigens. Pressure cooker (15 psi, 3–4 min) or water bath (98°C, 20 min). Cool 20 min RT.
note.zh: 柠檬酸 pH 6.0（citrate_buffer_ar）：多数胞质/内质网抗原。EDTA pH 9.0（ar_edta_ph9）：核/膜抗原。高压锅（15 psi，3–4 min）或水浴（98°C，20 min）。RT 冷却 20 min。

components.name: 4. Block endogenous peroxidase: 3% H₂O₂ in PBS, 10–15 min RT

note.en: Prevents background from blood/liver peroxidases. Rinse 3× PBS.
note.zh: 防止血液/肝脏内源性过氧化物酶背景。PBS 冲洗 3 次。

components.name: 5. Block: 5–10% normal serum (same species as secondary Ab) in TBS, 1 h RT

note.en: Do NOT wash after — aspirate excess, apply primary Ab directly. Optional: avidin/biotin block if using ABC system.
note.zh: 封闭后不洗——吸去多余血清直接加一抗。ABC 系统需先做 avidin/biotin 封闭。

components.name: 6. Primary Ab: diluted in TBS + 1% BSA; 1 h RT or 4°C overnight (humidity chamber)

note.en: Typical 1:100–1:1000. PAP pen barrier. 4°C overnight often gives better S/N.
note.zh: 通常 1:100–1:1000 稀释。PAP 笔画疏水圈。4°C 过夜通常信噪比更好。

note.en: Do not let sections dry.
note.zh: 切勿让切片干燥。

note.en: Polymer-based (EnVision+, Dako) preferred over biotin-streptavidin (less background). Species-matched.
note.zh: 聚合物法（EnVision+，Dako）优于生物素-链霉亲和素（更低背景）。种属匹配。

components.name: 10. DAB development: apply DAB + H₂O₂, 2–10 min RT; monitor under microscope; stop in ddH₂O

note.en: Brown = positive signal. Do not over-develop. Fresh DAB only.
note.zh: 棕色 = 阳性信号。勿过度显色。DAB 需新鲜配制。

components.name: 11. Counterstain: Hematoxylin 1–5 min → differentiate in acid-alcohol → blue in running water 5 min

note.en: Harris or Mayer's Hematoxylin. Blue in tap water or Scott's Water (2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L).
note.zh: Harris 或 Mayer 苏木精。自来水返蓝或 Scott's 水（2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L）。

note.en: Each 2–5 min. Avoid air bubbles. Cure 24 h before imaging.
note.zh: 每步 2–5 min。避免气泡。封片后 24 h 再镜检。

notes.en: Controls: (1) positive tissue; (2) isotype control replacing primary Ab; (3) H&E on sequential section. Scoring: H-score = intensity(0–3) × %positive. Quantitative: QuPath/HALO software. For multiplex: Opal tyramide system (TSA amplification).
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 阳性组织；(2) 同型对照替代一抗；(3) 相邻切片 H&E。评分：H-score = 强度(0–3) × 阳性率。定量：QuPath/HALO 图像分析。多重免疫组化：Opal tyramide 系统（TSA 信号放大）。

ref: Ramos-Vara & Miller (2014) Vet Pathol 51:42–87; Taylor & Rudbeck (2013) Dako Education Guide; Shi et al. (1991) J Histochem Cytochem 39:741

usage.en: Detect protein expression in paraffin-embedded tissue sections using immunohistochemistry.
usage.zh: 免疫组化检测石蜡包埋组织切片中的蛋白表达。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

materials.name: FFPE tissue sections on charged slides
Antigen retrieval buffer (citrate pH 6.0 or EDTA pH 9.0)
HRP-conjugated secondary antibody or polymer detection system

note.en: 1× PBS at RT (up to 1 hour)
note.zh: 1× PBS at RT (最长 1 hour)

note.en: 4°C in humidity chamber (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C in humidity chamber (最长 overnight)

name: Immunoprecipitation (IP)

components.name: 1. 裂解细胞 (IP Lysis Buffer + protease inhibitors)
components.note: 冰上 30 min, 间歇涡旋

components.name: 3. 定量 → 取 500 µg–1 mg 总蛋白
4. 预清除 (Protein A/G beads, 4°C, 1 h)
components.note: 去除非特异结合; 可选

components.name: 6. 加抗体 (1–5 µg) → 4°C 旋转孵育 2–4 h 或过夜
7. 加 Protein A/G beads (20–40 µL) → 4°C 旋转 1–2 h
8. 洗涤 3–5 次 (Lysis Buffer, 4°C)
components.note: 每次 1 mL, 旋转 5 min, 磁力架吸附

components.name: 9. 洗脱: 2× SDS Loading Buffer, 95°C 5 min
10. Western Blot 检测
components.note: IP 样品 + Input + IgG 对照

notes.en: Controls: (1) Normal IgG (same species) negative control; (2) Input positive control. For Co-IP: use mild lysis buffer (avoid SDS). Ab light/heavy chain interference in WB: use Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent or crosslink Ab to beads. Magnetic beads have lower background than agarose. Endogenous IP is more physiologically relevant than overexpression IP.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) Normal IgG (同种属) 阴性对照; (2) Input 阳性对照。共免疫沉淀 (Co-IP)：使用温和裂解液（避免 SDS）。抗体轻链/重链干扰 WB 检测：用 Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent 或交联抗体到 beads。磁珠比琼脂糖珠背景更低。内源性 IP 比 overexpression IP 更有生理意义。

ref: Harlow & Lane (1988) Antibodies: A Laboratory Manual; Cell Signaling Technology IP Protocol

usage.en: Immunoprecipitate a target protein from cell lysates using antibody-bead capture.
usage.zh: 抗体-磁珠捕获法从细胞裂解液中免疫沉淀靶蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

note.en: −80°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: −20°C in Laemmli buffer (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C in Laemmli buffer (最长 1 month)

name: Inclusion Body Solubilization and Protein Refolding
nameCn: 包涵体溶解与蛋白复性

components.name: 1. Isolate inclusion bodies: lyse cells, wash pellet 3× with wash buffer

note.en: Lyse in lysis_buffer_mild + 1% Triton X-100. Sonicate 3× 30 s on ice. Centrifuge 15,000×g 15 min 4°C. Keep pellet. Wash pellet 3× with wash buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 0.5% Triton X-100) then 1× without Triton. Pellet = purified inclusion bodies.
note.zh: lysis_buffer_mild + 1% Triton X-100 裂解。冰上超声 3× 30 s。15,000×g 15 min 4°C。保留沉淀。洗涤缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、0.5% Triton X-100）洗 3 次，再无 Triton 洗 1 次。沉淀 = 纯化的包涵体。

components.name: 2. Solubilize: resuspend inclusion body pellet in denaturing buffer

note.en: Denaturing buffer: 6 M GuHCl (or 8 M urea), 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 10 mM β-ME (or 5 mM DTT). Resuspend at 5–20 mg/mL. Stir/rotate at RT 1–2 h until completely dissolved (solution clears).
note.zh: 变性缓冲液：6 M 盐酸胍（或 8 M 尿素）、50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、10 mM β-ME（或 5 mM DTT）。5–20 mg/mL 重悬。RT 搅拌 1–2 h 至完全溶解（溶液变透明）。

note.en: Remove insoluble debris. Supernatant = denatured soluble protein. Check purity by SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 去除不溶性碎片。上清 = 变性可溶蛋白。SDS-PAGE 检测纯度。

components.name: 4. Optional: Ni-NTA purification under denaturing conditions

note.en: Bind buffer: 6 M GuHCl, 50 mM NaH₂PO₄ pH 8.0, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole. Wash: same + 20 mM imidazole. Elute: same + 250 mM imidazole. Pool eluted fractions.
note.zh: 结合缓冲液：6 M GuHCl、50 mM NaH₂PO₄ pH 8.0、300 mM NaCl、10 mM imidazole。洗涤：同上 + 20 mM imidazole。洗脱：同上 + 250 mM imidazole。合并洗脱组分。

note.en: Dilute protein dropwise into 50–100× volume ice-cold refolding buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM oxidized glutathione, 5 mM reduced glutathione, 10% glycerol) with constant stirring. Final protein: 0.01–0.1 mg/mL. Stir 4°C, 12–24 h.
note.zh: 蛋白逐滴加入 50–100 倍体积的冰冷复性缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、150 mM NaCl、0.5 mM 氧化型谷胱甘肽、5 mM 还原型谷胱甘肽、10% 甘油），持续搅拌。终浓度 0.01–0.1 mg/mL。4°C 搅拌 12–24 h。

components.name: 6. Refolding Method B: Stepwise dialysis (higher yield)

note.en: Dialyze denatured protein against decreasing denaturant: 4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M urea in refolding buffer. Each step: 4°C, ≥4 h (or overnight). Slow removal of denaturant allows gradual refolding. protein_dialysis tubing or Slide-A-Lyzer.
note.zh: 变性蛋白对梯度去变性剂透析：4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M 尿素复性缓冲液。每步：4°C，≥4 h（或过夜）。缓慢去除变性剂促进逐步复性。protein_dialysis 透析袋或 Slide-A-Lyzer。

components.name: 7. Remove aggregates: centrifuge 20,000×g 30 min 4°C; filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Aggregated/misfolded protein pellets. Supernatant = soluble refolded protein. SEC (sec_purification) can separate properly folded monomers from misfolded aggregates.
note.zh: 聚集/错误折叠蛋白在沉淀中。上清 = 可溶复性蛋白。SEC（sec_purification）可分离正确折叠单体和错误折叠聚集体。

components.name: 8. Concentrate and verify activity: Amicon Ultra, then functional assay

note.en: protein_concentration_amicon. Verify folding: SEC (single peak), CD spectroscopy, thermal shift assay (DSF), enzyme activity assay. Typical refolding yield: 5–30% of total denatured protein.
note.zh: protein_concentration_amicon 浓缩。验证折叠：SEC（单峰）、CD 光谱、热迁移分析（DSF）、酶活力测定。典型复性产率：变性蛋白总量的 5–30%。

notes.en: Key factors affecting refolding: (1) Protein concentration during refolding (lower = better, ≤0.1 mg/mL); (2) Redox pair (GSH:GSSG 5:0.5 mM for disulfide-containing proteins); (3) Temperature (4°C preferred); (4) Additives: L-arginine (0.4–0.8 M) dramatically reduces aggregation (Tsumoto et al. 2004). Screen conditions with small-scale (1 mL) refolding trials before scale-up.
notes.zh: 影响复性的关键因素：(1) 复性时蛋白浓度（越低越好，≤0.1 mg/mL）；(2) 氧化还原对（含二硫键蛋白用 GSH:GSSG 5:0.5 mM）；(3) 温度（首选 4°C）；(4) 添加剂：L-精氨酸（0.4–0.8 M）显著减少聚集（Tsumoto et al. 2004）。大规模复性前先做小规模（1 mL）条件筛选。

ref: Singh & Bhatt (2015) Microb Cell Fact 14:41; Tsumoto et al. (2004) Biotechnol Prog 20:1301; Clark (2001) Curr Opin Biotechnol 12:202–207

usage.en: Solubilize and refold proteins from bacterial inclusion bodies using denaturant dilution or dialysis.
usage.zh: 变性剂稀释或透析法溶解和复性细菌包涵体蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 6 hours

materials.name: Solubilization buffer (6–8 M urea or guanidine HCl)

note.en: −80°C in denaturant (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C in denaturant (最长 1 month)

note.en: 4°C or −80°C with glycerol (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C or −80°C with glycerol (最长 varies)

name: Ion Exchange Chromatography (IEX)

components.name: 1. Choose ion exchange type based on protein pI

note.en: Anion exchange (Q/DEAE): protein pI < buffer pH → protein (−) binds to resin (+). Cation exchange (SP/CM): protein pI > buffer pH → protein (+) binds to resin (−). For unknown pI: run at two pH values.
note.zh: 阴离子交换（Q/DEAE）：蛋白 pI < 缓冲液 pH → 蛋白带负电结合正电树脂。阳离子交换（SP/CM）：蛋白 pI > 缓冲液 pH → 蛋白带正电结合负电树脂。pI 未知时：在两个 pH 条件下试运行。

components.name: 2. Prepare sample: dialyze into low-salt IEX buffer; centrifuge 20,000×g 20 min; filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Anion: 20 mM Tris pH 8.0. Cation: 20 mM sodium acetate pH 5.5 or 20 mM MES pH 6.0. Conductivity <5 mS/cm for binding.
note.zh: 阴离子：20 mM Tris pH 8.0。阳离子：20 mM 醋酸钠 pH 5.5 或 20 mM MES pH 6.0。电导率 <5 mS/cm 以确保结合。

note.en: Flow rate: 1–2 mL/min (1 mL column) or 2–5 mL/min (5 mL column). Monitor A280 baseline stable.
note.zh: 流速：1–2 mL/min（1 mL 柱）或 2–5 mL/min（5 mL 柱）。监测 A280 基线稳定。

components.name: 4. Load sample: apply at 0.5–1 mL/min; collect flow-through for SDS-PAGE

note.en: Loading at ≤1 mL/min maximizes binding. Capacity: ~20 mg protein/mL resin (depends on charge/size).
note.zh: 上样流速 ≤1 mL/min 以最大化结合。容量：约 20 mg 蛋白/mL 树脂（取决于电荷/大小）。

components.name: 5. Wash: 5–10 CV binding buffer until A280 returns to baseline

note.en: Removes loosely bound contaminants.
note.zh: 去除弱结合的杂蛋白。

components.name: 6. Elute with linear gradient: 0–100% elution buffer over 20 CV

note.en: Elution buffer: binding buffer + 1 M NaCl. Gradient: 0→100% over 20 CV (e.g., 0→500 mM NaCl). Collect 1 mL fractions. Alternative: step gradient (0, 100, 250, 500 mM).
note.zh: 洗脱缓冲液：结合缓冲液 + 1 M NaCl。梯度：0→100% 20 CV（如 0→500 mM NaCl）。收集 1 mL 组分。也可阶梯梯度（0、100、250、500 mM）。

components.name: 7. Pool peak fractions; verify by SDS-PAGE

note.en: Pool symmetric peak. Asymmetric = multiple species.
note.zh: 合并对称峰。不对称 = 多种组分。

components.name: 8. Dialyze or desalting to remove salt for storage

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic or HiTrap Desalting. Add 10% glycerol for storage.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐。加 10% 甘油保存。

notes.en: IEX is excellent for separating proteins by surface charge. Typically used after IMAC/GST (polishing step). Binding capacity: 10–40 mg/mL resin. Resolution depends on gradient length (longer = better). Run at 4°C for labile proteins. Buffer pH should be ≥1 pH unit away from protein pI for strong binding.
notes.zh: IEX 非常适合按表面电荷分离蛋白。通常在 IMAC/GST 后使用（精修步骤）。结合容量：10–40 mg/mL 树脂。分辨率取决于梯度长度（越长越好）。不稳定蛋白在 4°C 运行。缓冲液 pH 应距离蛋白 pI ≥1 个 pH 单位以确保强结合。

ref: GE Healthcare Ion Exchange Chromatography Manual; Shukla & Cramer (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 67:8.2.1

usage.en: Separate proteins by charge using anion or cation exchange chromatography.
usage.zh: 阴离子/阳离子交换层析按电荷分离蛋白质。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Ion exchange column (Q/SP/DEAE Sepharose or similar)
Low-salt buffer (Buffer A, 20 mM Tris, 0–50 mM NaCl)
High-salt buffer (Buffer B, 20 mM Tris, 1 M NaCl)

note.en: 4°C in buffer A (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C in buffer A (最长 overnight)

note.en: 4°C or −80°C (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C or −80°C (最长 varies)

name: Lentiviral Functional Titer (Infectious Units/mL)
nameCn: 慢病毒功能性滴度测定（感染单位/mL）

components.name: 1. Day 0: Seed HEK293T or HeLa cells in 24-well plate

note.en: 1×10⁵ cells/well (HEK293T) or 0.5×10⁵ (HeLa). Cells should be 20–30% confluent at time of infection (exponential growth). Avoid antibiotics.
note.zh: HEK293T：每孔 1×10⁵；HeLa：0.5×10⁵。感染时细胞汇合度 20–30%（指数生长期）。不加抗生素。

components.name: 2. Day 1: Prepare serial dilutions of virus (10-fold series)

note.en: In complete medium: undiluted, 1:10, 1:100, 1:1,000, 1:10,000. Add polybrene (8 µg/mL final). Infect in duplicate wells per dilution. Total volume: 500 µL/well.
note.zh: 完全培养基中：原液、1:10、1:100、1:1,000、1:10,000。加 Polybrene（终浓度 8 µg/mL）。每稀释度双复孔感染。每孔总体积 500 µL。

note.en: Increases transduction efficiency 2–5×. Preferred for hard-to-infect cells.
note.zh: 感染效率提高 2–5 倍。推荐用于难感染细胞。

components.name: 4. Day 2 (24 h): replace medium with fresh complete medium (remove virus)

note.en: Remove virus-containing medium to reduce toxicity.
note.zh: 去除含病毒培养基以减少毒性。

components.name: 5. Day 4–5 (72–96 h post-transduction): harvest cells for analysis

note.en: GFP/reporter virus: analyze by flow cytometry. Antibiotic resistance: fix at 72 h, select with antibiotic for 7 days, count colonies.
note.zh: GFP/报告基因病毒：流式细胞仪分析。抗生素抗性：72 h 固定，抗生素筛选 7 天，克隆计数。

note.en: Count % GFP+ cells (FITC channel). Gate on live cells (FSC/SSC + DAPI-). Use dilutions where 1–20% cells are GFP+ (linear range, MOI ≤0.2 ensures single integration).
note.zh: 计数 GFP+ 细胞百分比（FITC 通道）。门控活细胞（FSC/SSC + DAPI-）。使用 1–20% GFP+ 的稀释度（线性范围，MOI ≤0.2 确保单次整合）。

note.en: IU/mL = (% GFP+ / 100) × total cell count × dilution factor / volume infected (mL). Example: 10% GFP+, 10⁵ cells, 1:1,000 dilution, 0.5 mL → (0.10 × 10⁵ × 1,000) / 0.5 = 2×10⁷ IU/mL.

notes.en: Functional titer reports true infectious units (transducing units, TU). More accurate than p24 ELISA for biological experiments. Use MOI ≤0.2 for titer calculation (Poisson distribution: ensures single integration events). For non-GFP vectors, use qPCR-based titer: measure proviral DNA copies per cell at 72 h post-transduction.
notes.zh: 功能性滴度报告真实感染单位（转导单位，TU）。生物学实验比 p24 ELISA 更准确。计算滴度时 MOI ≤0.2（泊松分布确保单次整合事件）。非 GFP 载体可用 qPCR 法：72 h 后测每个细胞中病毒 DNA 拷贝数。

ref: Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505; Geraerts et al. (2006) Gene Ther 13:1294–1299; Salmon & Trono (2006) Curr Protoc Hum Genet 12.10.1

usage.en: Determine functional lentiviral titer by serial dilution and colony counting or antibiotic selection.
usage.zh: 连续稀释法通过菌落计数或抗生素筛选测定慢病毒功能性滴度。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–5 days，实操: 3 hours

name: Lentiviral Titer Determination by p24 ELISA
nameCn: 慢病毒滴度测定（p24 ELISA 法）

components.name: 1. Prepare standard: serial dilutions of p24 antigen (0–2,000 pg/mL)

note.en: Use kit-provided p24 standard. Typical 8-point curve: 2000, 1000, 500, 250, 125, 62.5, 31.25, 0 pg/mL in assay diluent. Prepare fresh each time.
note.zh: 使用试剂盒提供的 p24 标准品。典型 8 点曲线：2000、1000、500、250、125、62.5、31.25、0 pg/mL（用稀释液配制）。每次新鲜配制。

components.name: 2. Lyse virus: add Triton X-100 to virus sample (final 0.5%); incubate RT 1 h

note.en: Lysis disrupts viral envelope and releases p24 from intact virions. Mix gently. Dilute sample in assay diluent: test 1:10, 1:100 dilutions to fall within standard curve range.
note.zh: 裂解破坏病毒包膜，释放完整病毒颗粒中的 p24。轻柔混合。用稀释液稀释样品：测试 1:10、1:100 稀释，使读数落在标准曲线范围内。

components.name: 3. Coat ELISA plate: add anti-p24 capture antibody (2 µg/mL, 100 µL/well), 4°C overnight

note.en: Or use pre-coated kit plates (skip this step). Coating buffer: 0.05 M carbonate pH 9.6. Seal plate.
note.zh: 或使用试剂盒预包被板（跳过此步）。包被缓冲液：0.05 M 碳酸盐 pH 9.6。封板。

components.name: 4. Block: 200 µL/well 5% BSA in PBS-T; RT 1 h; wash 3× PBST

note.en: PBST: PBS + 0.05% Tween-20. Washing: 300 µL/well, 3×; flick and blot each wash.
note.zh: PBST：PBS + 0.05% Tween-20。洗涤：每孔 300 µL，3 次；每次甩干并吸干。
