components.name: 5. Add standards and samples (100 µL/well); RT 2 h or 4°C overnight

note.en: Duplicates for all. Shake plate gently at 150 rpm during incubation (orbital shaker).
note.zh: 所有样品做双复孔。孵育期间轻摇（150 rpm，摇床）。

components.name: 6. Wash 5× PBST; add detection antibody (anti-p24-HRP, 100 µL/well); RT 1 h

note.en: Dilute HRP-conjugated secondary per kit instructions (typically 1:1,000–1:5,000 in blocking buffer).
note.zh: 按试剂盒说明稀释 HRP 偶联二抗（通常封闭液 1:1,000–1:5,000）。

components.name: 7. Wash 5× PBST; add TMB substrate (100 µL/well); RT 15–30 min (dark)

note.en: Monitor color development (blue). Stop when highest standard is deep blue (~OD 2.0 at 450 nm).
note.zh: 监测显色（蓝色）。最高标准品显深蓝色时终止（450 nm OD ~2.0）。

components.name: 8. Stop reaction: add 50 µL 2 M H₂SO₄ (solution turns yellow)

note.en: Read A₄₅₀ nm within 30 min of stopping.
note.zh: 终止后 30 min 内读取 A₄₅₀ nm。

components.name: 9. Calculate titer: read pg/mL from standard curve; convert to IU/mL

note.en: Conversion: 1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁶–10⁷ IU (varies by vector/envelope). Accurate IU requires functional titer (lentiviral_titer_functional). ng/mL → pg/µL; multiply by dilution factor.
note.zh: 转换：1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁶–10⁷ IU（随载体/包膜变化）。精确 IU 需功能性滴度（lentiviral_titer_functional）。ng/mL → pg/µL；乘以稀释倍数得原液浓度。

notes.en: p24 ELISA measures total physical particles (infectious + non-infectious). Ratio of physical particles to infectious units: ~100:1. Recommended kits: Alliance HIV-1 p24 ANTIGEN ELISA (Perkin Elmer), INNOTEST HIV Antigen mAb. Typical unconcentrated lentiviral supernatant: 50–200 ng/mL p24 = ~5×10⁷–2×10⁸ physical particles/mL.
notes.zh: p24 ELISA 测定物理颗粒总数（含感染性和非感染性）。物理颗粒与感染单位比例约 100:1。推荐试剂盒：Alliance HIV-1 p24 ANTIGEN ELISA（Perkin Elmer）、INNOTEST HIV Antigen mAb。典型未浓缩慢病毒上清：50–200 ng/mL p24 ≈ 5×10⁷–2×10⁸ 物理颗粒/mL。

ref: Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505; Geraerts et al. (2006) Gene Ther 13:1294–1299; Perkin Elmer Alliance p24 ELISA kit manual

usage.en: Quantify lentiviral particles using p24 capsid protein ELISA.
usage.zh: p24 衣壳蛋白 ELISA 定量慢病毒颗粒数。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 3 hours

name: Lentivirus Production & Transduction

components.name: 1. Day −1: Seed 4×10⁶ HEK293T cells in 10 cm dish (DMEM + 10% FBS)

note.en: Cells should be 70–80% confluent on Day 0. Do not use antibiotics (impairs transfection).
note.zh: Day 0 细胞汇合度应为 70–80%。不用抗生素（影响转染效率）。

note.en: DNA ratio: Transfer vector : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1 (µg). E.g., 10 µg : 7.5 µg : 2.5 µg per 10 cm dish. Total DNA: 20 µg. Dilute in 500 µL Opti-MEM.
note.zh: 质粒比例：转移载体 : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1（µg）。10 cm 皿：10 µg : 7.5 µg : 2.5 µg。总 DNA：20 µg。加入 500 µL Opti-MEM 稀释。

components.name: 3. Day 0: Prepare transfection reagent (PEI or Lipo2000)

note.en: PEI (1 mg/mL linear PEI, MW 25,000): add 60 µL (3:1 PEI:DNA ratio by µg) to 500 µL Opti-MEM; mix 5 min RT. Add PEI+Opti-MEM to DNA+Opti-MEM; mix gently; incubate 20 min RT. Add dropwise to cells.
note.zh: PEI（1 mg/mL 线性 PEI，MW 25,000）：60 µL PEI（PEI:DNA = 3:1 质量比）加入 500 µL Opti-MEM，RT 5 min。PEI+Opti-MEM 加入 DNA+Opti-MEM，轻柔混合，RT 20 min。逐滴加入细胞。

components.name: 4. Day 1 (16–18 h): Replace medium with 12 mL fresh DMEM + 10% FBS + 10 mM HEPES

note.en: HEPES stabilizes virus at neutral pH. Medium change reduces transfection reagent toxicity. Do gently to avoid detaching 293T cells.
note.zh: HEPES 在中性 pH 下稳定病毒。换液减少转染试剂毒性。操作要轻柔，避免 293T 细胞脱落。

components.name: 5. Day 2 (48 h): First harvest — collect all supernatant; add 12 mL fresh medium

note.en: Filter through 0.45 µm PES membrane (NOT nitrocellulose — binds VSV-G). Keep harvest at 4°C or process immediately.
note.zh: 0.45 µm PES 膜过滤（不用硝酸纤维素膜——会结合 VSV-G）。上清 4°C 保存或立即处理。

components.name: 6. Day 3 (72 h): Second harvest — collect supernatant; pool with Day 2

note.en: Pool Day 2 + Day 3 harvests. Day 3 typically higher titer.
note.zh: 合并 Day 2 + Day 3 上清。Day 3 通常滴度更高。

components.name: 7. Concentrate virus (optional): 10,000×g 4°C 16 h (ultracentrifuge) or PEG precipitation

note.en: Ultracentrifugation: 25,000 rpm (SW-28 rotor) 2 h 4°C; resuspend pellet in PBS + 1% BSA. PEG-it (System Bio): add 1:4 PEG-it, 4°C overnight, 1,500×g 30 min 4°C.
note.zh: 超速离心：25,000 rpm（SW-28 转头）4°C 2 h；沉淀用 PBS + 1% BSA 重悬。PEG-it 沉淀：1:4 PEG-it，4°C 过夜，1,500×g 4°C 30 min。

components.name: 8. Titer determination: p24 ELISA or functional titer (IU/mL)

note.en: See lentiviral_titer_p24 or lentiviral_titer_functional. Typical unconcentrated: 10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL; concentrated: 10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL.
note.zh: 参见 lentiviral_titer_p24 或 lentiviral_titer_functional。未浓缩：10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL；浓缩后：10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL。

components.name: 9. Transduce target cells: virus + polybrene (8 µg/mL); MOI 0.3–5

note.en: MOI 0.3–1 for stable integration (low MOI ensures single integration). MOI 5–10 for transient or high-expression needs. Spinoculation optional (800×g 30 min RT) to increase efficiency.
note.zh: MOI 0.3–1 用于稳转（低 MOI 确保单拷贝整合）。MOI 5–10 用于瞬时或高表达需求。离心感染（800×g 30 min RT）可选，提高效率。

components.name: 10. Day 2 post-transduction: replace medium; Day 3+: add selection (Puromycin 1–2 µg/mL)

note.en: Kill curve: first establish Puromycin kill curve in untransduced cells (48–72 h for clean kill). GFP-virus: verify by flow cytometry before antibiotic selection.
note.zh: 先在未转导细胞中建立嘌呤霉素杀灭曲线（48–72 h 彻底杀灭）。GFP 病毒：抗生素筛选前先用流式细胞仪验证。

components.name: 11. Store virus: −80°C in single-use aliquots; avoid freeze-thaw

note.en: VSV-G lentivirus loses ~50% titer per freeze-thaw cycle. Add 10% trehalose or sucrose as cryoprotectant.
note.zh: VSV-G 慢病毒每次冻融损失约 50% 滴度。可加 10% 海藻糖或蔗糖作冻存保护剂。

notes.en: BSL-2 work: use BSL-2 practices for VSV-G pseudotyped virus. HEK293T must be >85% confluent at transfection. P24 ELISA: 1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁷ IU/mL (approximate). Typical issues: low titer → check psPAX2/pMD2.G ratio, 293T health; no selection → confirm antibiotic resistance in plasmid.
notes.zh: 生物安全：VSV-G 假型慢病毒需 BSL-2 操作。转染时 HEK293T 需 >85% 汇合度。P24 ELISA：1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁷ IU/mL（近似）。常见问题：滴度低→检查包装质粒比例、293T 细胞状态；无筛选→确认质粒含抗生素耐药基因。

ref: Tiscornia et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:241–245; Mochizuki et al. (1998) J Virol 72:8873; Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505

usage.en: Produce lentiviral particles by transient transfection of HEK293T cells with packaging plasmids.
usage.zh: 瞬时转染 HEK293T 细胞生产慢病毒颗粒。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 5–7 days，实操: 3 hours

note.en: 4°C (up to 48 hours)
note.zh: 4°C (最长 48 hours)

note.en: −80°C single-use aliquots (up to 12 months)
note.zh: −80°C single-use aliquots (最长 12 months)

name: Lipofection Transfection Protocol

components.name: 1. 转染前一天铺板 (60–80% 汇合度)
2. 管 A: 质粒 DNA in Opti-MEM
6. 6–8 h 后换新鲜完全培养基

notes.en: siRNA: 25–50 pmol per well + 5 µL Lipo RNAiMAX. Switching to serum-free medium before transfection improves efficiency.
notes.zh: siRNA 转染: 每孔 25–50 pmol siRNA + 5 µL Lipo RNAiMAX。转染前换无血清培养基效果更好。DNA:Lipo 比例需优化 (1:2–1:4)。

ref: Dalby et al. (2004) Methods 33:95–103; Bhatt et al. (2012) Methods Mol Biol 869:29–40; Thermo Fisher Lipofectamine Protocol

usage.en: Introduce exogenous DNA or RNA into mammalian cells using lipid-based transfection.
usage.zh: 脂质体法将外源 DNA 或 RNA 导入哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 1 hour

name: Lysosome Isolation by Differential and Density Gradient Centrifugation
nameCn: 溶酶体分离（差速离心 + 密度梯度法）

components.name: 1. Seed 5×10⁷–1×10⁸ cells; wash 2× ice-cold PBS; scrape on ice

note.en: Use HeLa, HEK293, fibroblasts or liver tissue (100–200 mg). Scale up for low-yield cell types. Pre-chill all equipment at 4°C overnight.
note.zh: 使用 HeLa、HEK293、成纤维细胞或肝组织（100–200 mg）。低产量细胞类型需放大规模。所有器材 4°C 预冷过夜。

components.name: 2. Resuspend in 1 mL cold sucrose_gradient_homog buffer (250 mM sucrose, 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4)

note.en: Per 5×10⁷ cells. Include protease inhibitors + 1 mM PMSF.
note.zh: 每 5×10⁷ 细胞用 1 mL。加蛋白酶抑制剂 + 1 mM PMSF。

components.name: 3. Lyse cells with Dounce homogenizer: 25–30 strokes with tight pestle, 4°C

note.en: Monitor lysis by trypan blue (~80% cells ruptured, nuclei intact). Syringe method: 25G needle × 10 passes. Do NOT sonicate (destroys lysosomes).
note.zh: 台盼蓝监测裂解（~80% 细胞破裂，核完整）。注射器法：25G 针头 × 10 次。不可超声（会破坏溶酶体）。

note.en: Keep postnuclear supernatant (PNS). Save 100 µL PNS as total homogenate control.
note.zh: 保留核后上清（PNS）。保存 100 µL PNS 作为总匀浆对照。

note.en: Pellet = mitochondria-rich. Supernatant = post-mitochondrial supernatant (PMS).
note.zh: 沉淀富含线粒体。上清 = 线粒体后上清（PMS）。

note.en: Pellet contains lysosomes, ER fragments, mitochondrial contaminants. Supernatant = cytosol + microsomes.
note.zh: 沉淀含溶酶体、ER 碎片、线粒体污染物。上清 = 细胞质 + 微粒体。

components.name: 7. Resuspend crude pellet in 0.5 mL 250 mM sucrose buffer; layer on Percoll/sucrose gradient

note.en: Step gradient (bottom to top in 10 mL SW-41 tube): 2 mL 2.0 M sucrose → 3 mL 1.3 M → 3 mL 0.86 M → 2 mL 0.25 M → load sample on top. OR: use 20% Percoll in sucrose buffer, self-generate gradient at 40,000×g 30 min 4°C.
note.zh: 阶梯梯度（从下到上，10 mL SW-41 管）：2 mL 2.0 M 蔗糖 → 3 mL 1.3 M → 3 mL 0.86 M → 2 mL 0.25 M → 顶部加样。或：20% Percoll 溶于蔗糖缓冲液，40,000×g 30 min 4°C 自动成梯度。

components.name: 8. Ultracentrifuge: 30,000×g (25,000 rpm SW-41), 60 min, 4°C, slow brake

note.en: Lysosome density: 1.10–1.12 g/mL → bands between 0.86 M and 1.3 M layers. Mitochondria (1.18 g/mL) pellet. ER (1.07 g/mL) bands higher. Collect 0.5–1 mL fractions from top.
note.zh: 溶酶体密度 1.10–1.12 g/mL → 在 0.86 M 和 1.3 M 层间成带。线粒体（1.18 g/mL）沉底。ER（1.07 g/mL）成带位置更高。从顶部收集 0.5–1 mL 组分。

components.name: 9. Identify lysosome fractions: assay β-hexosaminidase or LAMP1 western blot

note.en: β-hexosaminidase activity assay: add 10 µL fraction + 90 µL substrate (4-methylumbelliferyl-2-acetamido-2-deoxy-β-D-glucopyranoside, 1 mM in citrate buffer pH 4.5), 37°C 30 min → stop with 1 M Glycine pH 10.5 → read fluorescence Ex 365/Em 450. Western blot: LAMP1 (lysosomal), Cathepsin D.
note.zh: β-半乳糖苷酶活性法：10 µL 组分 + 90 µL 底物（4-甲基伞形酮 β-D-氨基葡萄糖苷，1 mM 柠檬酸缓冲液 pH 4.5），37°C 30 min → 1 M 甘氨酸 pH 10.5 终止 → 荧光（Ex 365/Em 450）。Western blot：LAMP1（溶酶体）、Cathepsin D。

components.name: 10. Pool lysosome fractions; dilute 5× with PBS; re-pellet 17,000×g 20 min 4°C

note.en: Removes sucrose/Percoll from lysosome fraction. Resuspend in desired assay buffer. Yield: ~1–5 µg lysosome protein per 10⁷ cells. Use immediately or flash-freeze in liquid N₂.
note.zh: 去除溶酶体组分中的蔗糖/Percoll。用目标实验缓冲液重悬。产量：~1–5 µg 溶酶体蛋白/10⁷ 细胞。立即使用或液氮快速冷冻。

notes.en: Alternative method: LysoIP (Ballabio lab, Nat Methods 2019) — express TMEM192-HA, immunoprecipitate with anti-HA beads (10 min, 4°C); rapid and specific but requires stable cell line. Marker verification: LAMP1/LAMP2 (membrane), Cathepsin B/D (luminal), ATP6V1A (vacuolar ATPase). Purity assessment: minimize mitochondrial (COX IV) and ER (PDI) markers.
notes.zh: 替代法：LysoIP（Ballabio 实验室，Nat Methods 2019）——表达 TMEM192-HA，anti-HA 磁珠免疫沉淀（4°C 10 min）；快速特异但需要稳转细胞系。标记蛋白验证：LAMP1/LAMP2（膜）、Cathepsin B/D（腔内）、ATP6V1A（液泡 ATPase）。纯度评估：尽量减少线粒体（COX IV）和 ER（PDI）标记。

ref: Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.9.1; Abu-Remaileh et al. (2017) Science 358:807–813 (LysoIP); Walkley (2009) J Inherit Metab Dis 32:181

usage.en: Isolate lysosome-enriched fractions by differential and density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速和密度梯度离心分离富集溶酶体组分。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 6 hours

note.en: Keep on ice, process immediately (up to 1 hour)
note.zh: Keep on ice, process immediately (最长 1 hour)

note.en: −80°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 1 month)

name: Mitochondria Isolation by Differential Centrifugation
nameCn: 差速离心法分离线粒体

components.name: 1. Collect tissue (0.5–2 g liver/heart) or cells (≥5×10⁷); keep ice-cold

note.en: All steps at 4°C. Pre-chill all tools, buffers, centrifuge rotors.
note.zh: 全程 4°C 操作。预冷所有工具、缓冲液、离心转头。

note.en: Transfer to Dounce homogenizer, 5–10 mL buffer/g tissue.
note.zh: 转入 Dounce 匀浆器，每克组织加 5–10 mL 缓冲液。

note.en: Gentle, even pressure. Over-homogenization destroys mitochondria. Cells: N₂ cavitation (1,000 psi, 10 min, 4°C) or 25G syringe needle × 10 strokes.
note.zh: 轻柔均匀推拉。过度匀浆破坏线粒体。细胞：氮气空化（1,000 psi，10 min，4°C）或 25G 针头 × 10 次。

note.en: Keep supernatant (PNS). Discard pellet (nuclei, unbroken cells). Repeat if pellet is large.
note.zh: 保留上清（PNS）。弃沉淀（核、未破碎细胞）。沉淀大时重复一次。

note.en: Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction. Pellet = crude mitochondria.
note.zh: 上清 = 细胞质组分。沉淀 = 粗线粒体。

components.name: 6. Wash: resuspend pellet in 5 mL buffer; repeat 7,000×g spin (×2–3)

note.en: Pellet becomes tighter and less brownish with each wash.
note.zh: 每次洗涤后沉淀更紧实、颜色更浅（去除肌红蛋白和细胞色素 c）。

components.name: 7. Optional: Percoll gradient for pure mitochondria

note.en: 18%/30% Percoll gradient in buffer. 95,000×g 30 min 4°C (SW-41 Ti). Mitochondria at 18/30% interface. Wash 2× at 6,000×g 10 min.
note.zh: 18%/30% Percoll 梯度（缓冲液配制）。95,000×g 30 min 4°C（SW-41 Ti 转头）。线粒体在 18/30% 界面。6,000×g 洗 2 次。

components.name: 8. Resuspend in assay buffer (without BSA for functional assays); quantify by BCA

note.en: 1–10 mg/mL protein. Integrity: cytochrome c oxidase activity ± detergent.
note.zh: 蛋白浓度 1–10 mg/mL。完整性验证：细胞色素 c 氧化酶活性（± 去污剂）。

components.name: 9. Functional integrity check: OCR (Seahorse/Clark electrode) or JC-1/TMRM

note.en: Healthy mito: JC-1 red aggregates; depolarized: green monomers. Use within 4–6 h of isolation.
note.zh: 健康线粒体：JC-1 红色聚集体；去极化：绿色单体。分离后 4–6 h 内使用。

notes.en: Differential centrifugation gives ~70% pure mitochondria. For functional studies, Percoll gradient recommended. Keep at 4°C; use within 4–6 h. WB markers: VDAC/TOMM20 (outer membrane), HSP60 (matrix), cytochrome c (IMS).
notes.zh: 差速离心纯度约 70%。功能性实验推荐 Percoll 梯度纯化。4°C 保存，4–6 h 内使用。WB 标记：VDAC/TOMM20（外膜）、HSP60（基质）、细胞色素 c（膜间隙）。

ref: Frezza et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:287–295; Wieckowski et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:1582–1590

usage.en: Isolate intact mitochondria from cells or tissues by differential centrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速离心从细胞或组织中分离完整线粒体。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 3 hours

materials.name: Cells or tissue (>10⁸ cells or >0.5 g tissue)

note.en: −80°C in isolation buffer (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C in isolation buffer (最长 1 month)

name: Mouse Genotyping PCR Workflow
nameCn: 小鼠基因分型 PCR 流程

components.name: Step 1 (Tail lysis): Spin plate 3000 rpm, 4°C, 3 min to position tails. Prepare fresh lysis buffer: 17.5 µL 10 M NaOH + 14 µL 0.5 M EDTA + H₂O to 10 mL (per 130 tails). Add 75 µL per well.

note.en: Scale down to 5 mL for 65 tails.
note.zh: 65 个样本可缩至 5 mL。

components.name: Step 2: Seal plate. Run 'Tail-Lyse' thermal cycler protocol (~46 min).
Step 3: Spin 1000 rpm, 4°C, 1 min. Add 75 µL 40 mM Tris-HCl. Mix with pipette. Seal. Spin 1000 rpm, 4°C, 2 min. Store plate at 4°C.
Step 4 (Master mix): Prepare gene-specific master mix. Add Taq polymerase last.

note.en: Do NOT vortex or shake enzymes!
note.zh: 绝对不要涡旋或摇晃酶！

components.name: Step 5 (PCR setup): Add 22.5 µL master mix + Taq per well. Add 2.5 µL lysate sample. Seal and spin down briefly.
Step 6: Run PCR program (~2.5 h). Store at 4°C.
Step 7 (Gel): Prepare 2% agarose-TAE gel (4 g agarose + 200 mL TAE + 5 µL EtBr for large gel). Some genes need 3%.

note.en: Check gene-specific gel % requirements.
note.zh: 查阅各基因所需凝胶浓度。

components.name: Step 8: Load 20 µL sample per well (8 µL 100 bp ladder in middle well). Run at 150-200 V for 15-20 min.
Step 9 (Imaging): Select 'Nucleic Acids / Ethidium Bromide', optimize 'Faint Bands', Filter 1. Position gel, run protocol, invert to view.

notes.en: Lysis buffer composition: ~17.5 mM NaOH + ~0.7 mM EDTA. After lysis, Tris-HCl neutralizes the NaOH. Master mix recipes are gene-specific — refer to genotyping database for primer sequences and PCR conditions. Some genes (2C-TCR, Pygo2) require overnight high-quality DNA isolation with proteinase K instead of quick alkaline lysis.
notes.zh: 裂解液组成：约 17.5 mM NaOH + 0.7 mM EDTA。裂解后 Tris-HCl 中和 NaOH。Master mix 配方因基因而异——参考基因分型数据库获取引物序列和 PCR 条件。某些基因（如 2C-TCR、Pygo2）需过夜 proteinase K 高质量 DNA 提取。

ref: Adapted from standard alkaline tail lysis protocol

usage.en: Complete workflow for mouse genotyping from tail lysis through PCR and gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 小鼠基因分型完整流程：尾巴裂解 → PCR → 琼脂糖凝胶电泳。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 2 hours

name: MTT Cell Viability Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate (5,000–10,000 cells/well, 100 µL)

note.en: Add PBS to all outer-edge wells (replace medium) to prevent evaporation. Triplicate wells per condition. Allow cells to attach overnight at 37°C, 5% CO₂.
note.zh: 96 孔板边缘孔加 PBS（替代培养基）防蒸发。每组处理设三复孔。37°C 5% CO₂ 过夜贴壁。

note.en: Dilute drugs in complete medium. Include: (a) untreated control, (b) blank (medium only, no cells), (c) solvent control (DMSO ≤0.1%). Volume per well: 100 µL. Refresh medium at 48 h if treatment >48 h.
note.zh: 药物用完全培养基稀释。设置：(a) 未处理对照；(b) 空白（仅培养基，无细胞）；(c) 溶剂对照（DMSO ≤0.1%）。每孔 100 µL。处理超过 48 h 时在 48 h 换液。

components.name: 3. Prepare MTT stock: 5 mg/mL in PBS; filter-sterilize (0.22 µm); protect from light

note.en: Store at 4°C (≤4 weeks) or −20°C (months). MTT is light-sensitive (keep foil-covered). Warm to 37°C before use. Do NOT use if solution is purple (pre-reduced).
note.zh: 4°C 保存（≤4 周）或 −20°C（数月）。MTT 避光（锡纸包裹）。使用前温热至 37°C。如溶液已变紫色（预还原）则弃用。

components.name: 4. Add 10 µL MTT stock (5 mg/mL) to each well; final 0.5 mg/mL

note.en: Use multi-channel pipette. Add directly to medium — do NOT remove medium first. Mix gently by pipetting once.
note.zh: 用多道移液器加入。直接加入培养基中——不要先去除培养基。轻柔吸打一次混匀。

components.name: 5. Incubate 2–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂ (monitor purple crystal formation)

note.en: Stop when crystals visible under microscope but medium still orange (2–4 h typical). Over-incubation: crystals dissolve back, false low readings. Under-incubation: insufficient signal.
note.zh: 显微镜可见紫色结晶且培养基仍呈橙色时终止（通常 2–4 h）。过度孵育：结晶重溶，读数假低。孵育不足：信号不够。

components.name: 6. Remove ALL medium carefully by aspiration (do not disturb crystals)

note.en: Tilt plate, aspirate from corner of well. Residual phenol-red medium interferes with absorbance. Blot plate on paper towel gently.
note.zh: 倾斜培养板，从孔角吸液。残余酚红培养基会干扰吸光度。将板轻扣在纸巾上吸干。

components.name: 7. Add 100–150 µL DMSO per well; shake 10 min RT to dissolve crystals

note.en: Orbital shaker 150–200 rpm. Crystals should fully dissolve (solution homogeneous purple). If crystals persist: warm plate to 37°C briefly.
note.zh: 150–200 rpm 振荡器。结晶应完全溶解（溶液均匀紫色）。结晶未溶：短暂温热至 37°C。

components.name: 8. Read absorbance at 570 nm (reference: 630–650 nm) within 30 min

note.en: OD must be read within 30 min (DMSO-formazan degrades). Reference wavelength corrects for plate/background. % Viability = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100.
note.zh: 30 min 内读数（DMSO-甲臜降解）。参考波长校正背景。% 活力 = (OD处理 − OD空白) / (OD对照 − OD空白) × 100。

notes.en: MTT is endpoint assay — cells are killed by DMSO. For non-destructive repeated measurement use CCK-8 (cck8_proliferation) or resazurin_assay. MTT can give false positives with: strong reducing agents (NAC, ascorbic acid, β-ME), high serum, some antioxidants. Verify cytotoxicity with morphology (phase contrast) or trypan blue.
notes.zh: MTT 是终点法——DMSO 杀死细胞。需重复测量同一孔用 CCK-8（cck8_proliferation）或 resazurin_assay。假阳性干扰物：强还原剂（NAC、维生素 C、β-ME）、高血清、抗氧化剂。结合形态学（相差显微镜）或台盼蓝验证细胞毒性。

ref: Mosmann (1983) J Immunol Methods 65:55–63; van Meerloo et al. (2011) Methods Mol Biol 731:237–245; Stockert et al. (2012) Acta Histochem 114:785–796

usage.en: Measure cell viability and proliferation using MTT colorimetric assay.
usage.zh: MTT 比色法检测细胞活力和增殖。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 days，实操: 2 hours

name: Multi-Color Flow Cytometry Surface & Intracellular Staining
nameCn: 多色流式细胞术（表面 + 胞内蛋白染色）

components.name: 1. Prepare single-cell suspension; count and adjust to 2–5×10⁶/mL

note.en: Dissociate tissue with gentleMACS or collagenase/trypsin. Pellet: 400×g 5 min. Resuspend in FACS buffer (facs_buffer). Aliquot 100 µL (2–5×10⁵ cells) per staining tube.
note.zh: 组织用 gentleMACS 或胶原酶/胰酶解离。400×g 5 min 沉淀。FACS 缓冲液重悬。每管分 100 µL（2–5×10⁵ 细胞）。

components.name: 2. Fc block: add anti-FcγIII/II receptor (BD Fc Block, 5 µg/mL), 15 min, 4°C

note.en: Prevents non-specific binding of antibodies to Fc receptors on monocytes/macrophages/NK cells. For human cells: CD16/CD32 block. For mouse: 2.4G2 clone. Omit for epithelial/cancer cell lines.
note.zh: 防止单核细胞/巨噬细胞/NK 细胞 Fc 受体非特异性结合。人细胞：CD16/CD32 封闭。小鼠：2.4G2 克隆。上皮/肿瘤细胞系可省略。

components.name: 3. Viability dye staining: add Live/Dead dye (DAPI 1 µg/mL or Zombie dye), 15–30 min, RT or 4°C

note.en: Must stain before surface antibodies (in PBS only — no serum/BSA). DAPI (UV), 7-AAD (PE channel), Live/Dead Aqua (DAPI channel), Zombie dyes (various). Dead cells = high staining.
note.zh: 必须在表面抗体染色前进行（仅用 PBS——不含血清/BSA）。DAPI（UV 激发）、7-AAD（PE 通道）、Live/Dead Aqua（DAPI 通道）、Zombie 染料（多种）。死细胞染色强。

components.name: 4. Surface antibody staining: add antibody cocktail in FACS buffer (50–100 µL/tube), 20–30 min, 4°C, dark

note.en: Pre-titrate each antibody (typical: 0.1–1 µg/mL). Keep cold throughout. Label/mark tubes. Prepare single-color controls and FMO (fluorescence minus one) controls.
note.zh: 每种抗体需预先滴定（通常 0.1–1 µg/mL）。全程保持冷冻。准备单色对照和 FMO（少一荧光）对照。

components.name: 5. Wash 2×: add 3 mL FACS buffer; 400×g 5 min 4°C; decant; repeat

note.en: Decant briskly or aspirate. Do not disrupt pellet. Residual wash is OK.
note.zh: 快速倾倒或抽吸。勿破坏沉淀。少量残余洗液无影响。

components.name: 6. For surface-only panel: fix in 100 µL 1–4% PFA, 20 min RT, wash 2×

note.en: Skip fixation if: (a) running live cells, (b) calcium flux assay, (c) sorting for downstream culture. Fixed cells: stable ≥48 h at 4°C in dark.
note.zh: 如需活细胞（钙流、分选后培养）则跳过固定。固定细胞：4°C 避光稳定 ≥48 h。

components.name: 7. Intracellular staining (if needed): fix+permeabilize with Cytofix/Cytoperm or FoxP3 buffer set

note.en: Cytofix/Cytoperm (BD): 4°C 20 min, wash 2× in Perm/Wash, then add intracellular Ab (cytokines, Ki67) in Perm/Wash, 30 min 4°C. For transcription factors (FoxP3, T-bet): FoxP3/Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set (eBioscience), 4°C overnight.
note.zh: Cytofix/Cytoperm（BD）：4°C 20 min，Perm/Wash 洗 2 次，胞内抗体（细胞因子、Ki67）加入 Perm/Wash，4°C 30 min。转录因子（FoxP3、T-bet）：FoxP3/转录因子染色缓冲液套装（eBioscience），4°C 过夜。

components.name: 8. Final wash: 2× FACS buffer; resuspend in 200–500 µL FACS buffer; run on cytometer

note.en: Run within 4 h for best results. Acquire ≥10,000 cells (lymphocytes) or 50,000 events in gate of interest. Set voltages using unstained controls.
note.zh: 4 h 内上机效果最佳。采集 ≥10,000 个细胞（淋巴细胞）或门内 ≥50,000 个事件。用无染色对照设置电压。

notes.en: Panel design rules: (1) brightest fluorochrome (PE, APC) for lowest-expression markers; (2) avoid spectral overlap of similar channels; (3) tandem dyes degrade (use fresh, avoid freeze-thaw). Compensation: required for all multicolor panels. Use UltraComp eBeads or anti-mouse Igκ beads for compensation controls. Analysis: FlowJo, FCS Express, Cytobank.
notes.zh: 面板设计原则：(1) 最亮荧光素（PE、APC）用于低表达标记；(2) 避免相邻通道光谱重叠；(3) 串联染料易降解（新鲜使用，避免冻融）。补偿校正：多色面板必须做。用 UltraComp eBeads 或抗小鼠 Igκ 磁珠做补偿对照。分析软件：FlowJo、FCS Express、Cytobank。

ref: Mahnke & Roederer (2007) Clin Lab Med 27:469–485; Chattopadhyay et al. (2014) Nat Protoc 9:147–154; Cossarizza et al. (2021) Eur J Immunol 51:2708

usage.en: Perform multi-parameter flow cytometry staining panel for immunophenotyping.
usage.zh: 多参数流式染色 panel 进行免疫表型分析。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–6 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: 4°C in dark (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C in dark (最长 1 week)

name: Multiple Immunofluorescence Protocol (FFPE & Frozen)
nameCn: 多重免疫荧光染色方案（石蜡切片及冰冻切片）

components.name: Section A — FFPE Deparaffinize: 3×5 min xylene → 2×5 min 100% EtOH → 5 min 95% → 1 min 70% → 1 min 50% → 2×5 min dH₂O.
Section B — Antigen Unmasking: Place in citrate buffer pH 6.0. Pressure cooker: 95°C 30 min (slow cook, vent open), then 115°C 1 min (close vent). Cool ≥30 min before opening.

note.en: For frozen fixed tissue: rewarm 20 min RT, then go to staining. For unfixed frozen: fix with 4% PFA 15 min, wash 3×5 min TBST.
note.zh: 冰冻固定组织：室温复温 20 分钟后直接染色。未固定冰冻：4% PFA 固定 15 分钟，TBST 洗 3×5 分钟。

components.name: Section C Step 1: Wash in dH₂O 5 min.
Step 2: Draw rectangle around tissue with liquid blocker pen.
Step 4: Block with 100-200 µL blocking buffer for 1 h.

note.en: Choose blocking serum from host species of secondary antibody (e.g. goat serum for goat anti-rabbit/mouse secondaries).
note.zh: 封闭血清选二抗的宿主（如山羊二抗用山羊血清封闭）。

components.name: Step 5: Apply 100 µL primary antibody mixture (in antibody dilution buffer) overnight at 4°C in dark humid box.
Step 7: Apply 100 µL fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody mixture, 1-2 h at RT in dark.
Step 9 (if using conjugated primary Ab): After secondary staining, incubate conjugated primary antibody 1-2 h RT in dark, then wash 3×5 min TBST.
Step 10: Aspirate liquid outside tissue. Apply 20 µL anti-fade mounting medium along rectangle margin. Carefully place coverslip (avoid bubbles). Seal with nail polish.
Step 11: Image after ≥4 h. Best results: cure overnight at RT. Long-term storage: 4°C protected from light.

notes.en: Panel design: ensure primary antibodies are from different host species (or use directly conjugated primaries). Match secondary antibodies to primary host species. Cannot use goat serum blocking if a primary antibody is raised in goat. Do not let sections dry at any point — use humid box with water during all incubations.
notes.zh: 面板设计：确保一抗来自不同宿主（或使用直接标记一抗）。二抗与一抗宿主匹配。一抗是山羊来源时不能用山羊血清封闭。整个过程切勿让切片干燥——所有孵育使用加水的避光湿盒。

ref: Adapted from Cell Signaling Technology IF Guide; multiplex IF best practices (2019)

usage.en: Multiplex immunofluorescence staining of FFPE or frozen tissue sections with multiple primary antibodies and fluorochrome-conjugated secondaries in a single tissue section.
usage.zh: FFPE 或冰冻切片的多重免疫荧光染色方案，在同一组织切片上使用多种一抗和荧光标记二抗。

label.en: Protocol — 2 days (overnight primary antibody), hands-on: 3-4 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days (overnight primary antibody)，实操: 3-4 hours

materials.name: Citrate unmasking buffer (10 mM sodium citrate pH 6.0)
Antibody dilution buffer: 1% BSA + 0.3% Triton X-100 in PBS, pH 8
Blocking buffer: 5% normal goat serum in TBST (or 2-5% FBS + 0.3% Triton in PBS)

note.en: 4°C overnight in humidity chamber (up to Required overnight)
note.zh: 4°C overnight in humidity chamber (最长 Required overnight)

note.en: 4°C protected from light (up to Weeks)
note.zh: 4°C protected from light (最长 Weeks)

name: Mycoplasma Detection by PCR

components.name: 6. 判读: ~270 bp 条带 = 阳性

notes.en: Fast, sensitive PCR-based detection of mycoplasma contamination in cell cultures. Uses universal primers GPO-3/MGSO targeting 16S rRNA gene. Positive result: ~270 bp band. Test every cell line every 2-4 weeks.
notes.zh: 快速灵敏的 PCR 法检测细胞培养支原体污染。使用靶向 16S rRNA 基因的通用引物 GPO-3/MGSO。阳性结果：约 270 bp 条带。每 2-4 周检测一次。

ref: van Kuppeveld et al. (1994) Appl Environ Microbiol 60:149-152; Young et al. (2010) Nat Protoc 5:929-934

usage.en: Detect mycoplasma contamination in cell cultures by PCR amplification of mycoplasma 16S rRNA genes.
usage.zh: PCR 扩增支原体 16S rRNA 基因检测细胞培养物支原体污染。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: Cell culture supernatant (48 h, no antibiotics)

name: Mycoplasma Testing and Cell Authentication (STR Profiling)
nameCn: 支原体检测与细胞鉴定（STR 图谱分析）

components.name: 1. Mycoplasma PCR: collect 1 mL conditioned medium (48–72 h culture)

note.en: From 70–90% confluent culture, 48–72 h without medium change. Centrifuge 250×g 5 min to pellet cells. Keep supernatant. Boil 100 µL supernatant 10 min at 95°C → template.
note.zh: 70–90% 汇合度培养物，48–72 h 不换液。250×g 5 min 去除细胞。保留上清。取 100 µL 上清 95°C 煮 10 min → 模板。

note.en: Use mycoplasma_pcr protocol. Universal primers targeting 16S rRNA: Forward 5'-GGGAGCAAACAGGATTAGATACCCT-3', Reverse 5'-TGCACCATCTGTCACTCTGTTAACCTC-3'. Product: ~280 bp (positive). Positive control: MycoAlert PLUS or spiked DNA.
note.zh: 参考 mycoplasma_pcr。通用引物靶向 16S rRNA：正向/反向引物（见英文）。产物：~280 bp（阳性）。阳性对照：MycoAlert PLUS 或阳性 DNA。

components.name: 3. Agarose gel: run 2% gel; check for ~280 bp amplicon

note.en: Positive: band at ~280 bp → contamination confirmed. Negative: no band → clean. Repeat test monthly.
note.zh: 阳性：~280 bp 条带 → 确认污染。阴性：无条带 → 无污染。建议每月检测一次。

note.en: Faster (20 min): measures mycoplasma enzymes in supernatant. Add 100 µL MycoAlert Reagent to 100 µL supernatant; read luminescence (Reading A). Add 100 µL MycoAlert Substrate; incubate 10 min; read again (Reading B). Ratio B/A < 0.9 = negative; 0.9–1.2 = borderline; >1.2 = positive.
note.zh: 更快（20 min）：检测上清中支原体酶活性。100 µL MycoAlert 试剂 + 100 µL 上清；读数（A）。加 100 µL 底物；10 min；再读数（B）。比值 B/A < 0.9 = 阴性；0.9–1.2 = 可疑；>1.2 = 阳性。

components.name: 5. If positive: treat with Plasmocin (InvivoGen) 25 µg/mL × 2 weeks OR discard and thaw clean stock

note.en: BM Cyclin (Roche): treatment 1 (3 days) → treatment 2 (4 days) × 2 cycles. Verify clearance by re-testing 2 weeks after treatment ends. If persistent: discard cells entirely.
note.zh: BM Cyclin（Roche）：处理 1（3 天）→ 处理 2（4 天）× 2 个循环。停药 2 周后重新检测确认清除。持续阳性：彻底丢弃细胞。

components.name: 6. STR profiling for cell authentication (send to service)

note.en: Collect ≥10⁶ cells; extract gDNA (genomic_dna_extraction). Send to service (ATCC, DSMZ, or in-house). Compare STR profile against ATCC/DSMZ/Cellosaurus database (≥80% match = same cell line). Must authenticate before publication.
note.zh: 收集 ≥10⁶ 细胞；提取 gDNA（genomic_dna_extraction）。送检服务（ATCC、DSMZ 或自行检测）。比对 STR 图谱数据库（≥80% 匹配 = 同一细胞系）。发表前必须鉴定。

notes.en: ICCLC/NIH require mycoplasma testing before publication. Test every cell line monthly. Cross-contamination of cell lines (especially HeLa) is widespread — STR authentication is mandatory per NIH/ATCC guidelines. Common mycoplasma species: M. hyorhinis, M. arginini, M. orale, Acholeplasma laidlawii.
notes.zh: ICCLC/NIH 要求发表前进行支原体检测。每月检测所有细胞系。细胞系交叉污染（特别是 HeLa）普遍存在——NIH/ATCC 指南要求 STR 鉴定。常见支原体：M. hyorhinis、M. arginini、M. orale、Acholeplasma laidlawii。

ref: Drexler & Uphoff (2002) Cytotechnology 39:75–90; Young et al. (2010) Nat Protoc 5:929–937; ATCC Cell Line Authentication Technical Bulletin; Reid et al. (2017) Int J Cancer 140:1209

usage.en: Test cell cultures for mycoplasma contamination using PCR or biochemical assay.
usage.zh: PCR 或生化法检测细胞培养物是否存在支原体污染。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Cell culture supernatant (48 h without antibiotics)

name: Ngn2 Induced Neuron Differentiation from Human ES/iPS Cells
nameCn: Ngn2 诱导人 ES/iPS 细胞神经元分化方案

components.name: Day -1: Coat matrigel ≥1 h. Split ES/iPS with accutase (1 mL/well 6-well, check at 3 min). Collect, spin 1000 rpm 5 min, count. Plate 30-45k cells/mL in mTeSR + Thiazovivin. Infect with lentivirus (TetO-Ngn2-Puro + Ubi-rtTA).

note.en: Cell density depends on cell line fragility. For H1: 0.5-1M per 24-well plate.
note.zh: 密度取决于细胞系脆弱程度。H1: 0.5-1M/24 孔板。

components.name: Day 0: Switch to N2 medium + BDNF (10 ng/mL) + NT3 (10 ng/mL) + Laminin (0.2 µg/mL) + Doxycycline (2 µg/mL).
Day 1: Add Puromycin (1 µg/mL) to N2 medium with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox.
Day 3: Add glia (1 confluent T75 glia for 2-3 × 24-well plates) in B27 medium + BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox + Ara-C (2 µM).
Day 4-7: Change half B27 medium (with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox/Ara-C) every 2-3 days.
Day 7-10: Change half medium with neuronal growth medium + Ara-C (± Dox).
Day 10-21: Add neuronal growth medium to 1 mL, change 1/3 medium weekly.
After Day 21: Change ≥75% medium at least once per week for maintenance.

notes.en: N2 medium: DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 supplement + 1× NEAA. B27 medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27. Neuronal growth medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS. Glia can be p0 or p1, dissociated with trypsin. Virus volume may need optimization per batch (~0.3 µL concentrated virus per well of 24-well).
notes.zh: N2 培养基：DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 + 1× NEAA。B27 培养基：Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27。神经元生长液：Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS。胶质细胞用 p0 或 p1，胰蛋白酶消化。病毒用量需按批次优化。

usage.en: Doxycycline-inducible Ngn2 overexpression protocol for rapid generation of glutamatergic neurons from human ES or iPS cells, with glia co-culture for maturation.
usage.zh: 多西环素诱导 Ngn2 过表达方案，从人 ES 或 iPS 细胞快速生成谷氨酸能神经元，配合胶质细胞共培养促进成熟。

label.en: Protocol — 21+ days, hands-on: Intermittent, ~30 min per media change
label.zh: 实验方案 — 21+ days，实操: Intermittent, ~30 min per media change

materials.name: Neuronal growth medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS

note.en: Neurons on glia, B27 medium (up to Continue culture)
note.zh: Neurons on glia, B27 medium (最长 Continue culture)

name: Northern Blot

components.name: 1. RNA 提取 + 定量 (5–30 µg total RNA)
2. 变性琼脂糖凝胶（1.2% + 甲醛）
3. RNA 变性：65°C 15 min + 冰上
6. 毛细转印至尼龙膜 (过夜, 20× SSC)
8. 预杂交 (42°C, 1 h)
components.note: 含 50% 甲酰胺的杂交液

components.name: 9. 杂交 (探针 + 杂交液, 42°C 过夜)
components.note: DIG 标记或 ³²P 标记探针

components.name: 10. 低严格洗涤 (2× SSC/0.1% SDS, RT, 2×5 min)
12. 检测（放射自显影 / DIG 化学发光）

notes.en: Use RNase-free reagents and equipment throughout. Run formaldehyde gel in fume hood. DIG-labeled probes are safer than radioactive, slightly less sensitive. Positive control: housekeeping gene (GAPDH, β-actin). RNA quality assessed by 28S/18S ratio (~2:1).
notes.zh: 所有操作使用 RNase-free 试剂和器具。甲醛凝胶在通风橱中操作。DIG 标记探针比放射性标记更安全，灵敏度稍低。阳性对照：管家基因（GAPDH, β-actin）。RNA 质量可通过 28S/18S 比值（~2:1）评估。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, Ch. 7; Alwine et al. (1977) PNAS 74:5350

usage.en: Detect specific RNA transcripts by size separation on denaturing gel, membrane transfer, and hybridization.
usage.zh: Northern blot 检测特定 RNA 转录本：变性胶分离、转膜、杂交。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 8 hours

note.en: RT, dry (up to months (after UV crosslinking))
note.zh: RT, dry (最长 months (after UV crosslinking))

note.en: −20°C wrapped in plastic wrap (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C wrapped in plastic wrap (最长 1 month)

name: Patient-Derived Xenograft (PDX) Subcutaneous Implantation

components.name: Step 1 (Thaw frozen tissue): Roll vial between hands 10-15 s. Thaw in 37°C water bath until small ice crystal remains (~2 min). Spray with 70% ethanol.

note.en: Wear eye protection — vials may explode from LN₂ storage.
note.zh: 戴护目镜——液氮储存的冻存管可能爆裂。

components.name: Step 2 (Wash): Pour tissue into 50 mL tube. Slowly add 10 mL culture medium. Mix gently. Spin 200 g, 5 min, RT. Remove supernatant. Repeat wash once.

note.en: Add medium slowly to prevent osmotic shock.
note.zh: 缓慢加培养基防止渗透冲击。

components.name: Step 3: Resuspend in 0.5 mL PBS. Keep on ice. ~0.5 cm³ tissue per implant.
Step 4: Anesthetize mouse — ketamine 10 mg/mL, 100 µL per 10 g body weight (IP), or isoflurane per institutional protocol.
Step 5: Shave between shoulder blades. Spray shaved area with 70% ethanol.
Step 6: Make 2-3 mm skin incision. Insert curved mosquito forceps 1-1.5 cm into deep fascia toward flank.
Step 7: Implant ~0.5 cm³ prepared tumor tissue into pocket. Collect spilled cells with 1 mL syringe (no needle) and inject into pocket.
Step 8: Close with 1-2 wound clips. Monitor 24 h for distress or missing clips. Remove clips at 10-14 days (manual restraint only).
Step 9 (Propagation): Harvest tumors at ≤1.5 cm longest dimension (3-12 weeks). Clean tumor of connective/necrotic tissue. Cut into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. Implant into new recipients.

Step 10 (Freezing): Cut tumor into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. Place in cryovials with 1.5 mL freezing medium (50% FBS + 40% DMEM + 10% DMSO). Slow-freeze in Nalgene container at -80°C overnight, then transfer to liquid nitrogen.

notes.en: Tumor growth varies by xenograft line (3-12 weeks to 1.5 cm). Monitor twice weekly. Save representative tissue for histology (formalin), protein/RNA (snap freeze), and OCT embedding. Freezing medium: 50% FBS, 40% DMEM, 10% DMSO — prepare fresh.
notes.zh: 肿瘤生长因品系而异（3-12 周至 1.5 cm）。每周检查两次。保留代表性组织用于组织学（福尔马林）、蛋白/RNA（速冻）和 OCT 包埋。冻存液：50% FBS、40% DMEM、10% DMSO——现配现用。

ref: Adapted from NCI PDXNet recommendations; JoVE Protocol 54393

usage.en: Subcutaneous implantation of frozen or fresh patient-derived tumor xenograft tissue into immunodeficient mice, with propagation and tissue banking procedures.
usage.zh: 将冻存或新鲜的 PDX 肿瘤组织皮下移植到免疫缺陷小鼠，包括传代和组织冻存流程。

label.en: Protocol — 2-3 hours, hands-on: 30 min per mouse
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2-3 hours，实操: 30 min per mouse

materials.name: Sterile surgical tools, clean surgical blades
1 mL syringe (no needle, for spilled cells)
Cryogenic vials and freezing container (Nalgene Cryo 1°C)

note.en: Keep tissue on ice in PBS (up to 1-2 hours)
note.zh: Keep tissue on ice in PBS (最长 1-2 hours)

note.en: Liquid nitrogen (up to Years)
note.zh: Liquid nitrogen (最长 Years)

name: PBMC Isolation by Density Gradient Centrifugation (Ficoll)
nameCn: 密度梯度离心法分离 PBMC（外周血单个核细胞）

components.name: 1. Collect blood into EDTA or heparin tube; process within 2 h at RT

note.en: EDTA: 1.8 mg/mL (purple-top Vacutainer). Heparin: 10–20 U/mL (green-top). Do NOT use SST (serum-separator) or clotted blood. Keep at RT (not on ice — cold causes platelet/lymphocyte aggregation).
note.zh: EDTA（紫色管）或肝素（绿色管）采血管。禁用 SST（血清分离管）或已凝固血液。室温保存（不可冰上——冷藏导致血小板/淋巴细胞聚集）。采血后 2 h 内处理。

components.name: 2. Dilute blood 1:1 with RT DPBS (without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺)

note.en: Dilution reduces viscosity and improves separation. Use DPBS at RT (not cold). Gently invert to mix. 20 mL diluted blood is typical starting volume.
note.zh: 稀释降低黏度，改善分离效果。用室温 DPBS（不用冷的）。轻柔颠倒混匀。典型起始体积：20 mL 稀释血液。

components.name: 3. Add Ficoll-Paque (1.077 g/mL) to conical tube: 10 mL Ficoll per 20 mL diluted blood

note.en: Warm Ficoll-Paque to RT (critical — cold Ficoll gives poor separation). For SepMate tubes (Stem Cell Tech): add Ficoll first, then pour blood on top — faster and cleaner. Use 15 mL Ficoll for 50 mL tube; 3 mL for 15 mL tube.
note.zh: Ficoll-Paque 必须恢复至室温（关键——冷的会导致分离失败）。SepMate 管（Stem Cell Tech）：先加 Ficoll 再倒血液——更快更干净。50 mL 管用 15 mL Ficoll；15 mL 管用 3 mL。

components.name: 4. Layer diluted blood slowly over Ficoll (do not mix layers)

note.en: Tilt tube 45°; pipette diluted blood down the tube wall so it floats gently on top of Ficoll. Two distinct layers must be visible. Alternatively, underlay Ficoll under blood using a long needle.
note.zh: 将管倾斜 45°，沿管壁缓慢加入稀释血液，使其轻轻漂浮在 Ficoll 上方。必须可见明显两层界面。也可用长针在血液下方注入 Ficoll（倒置法）。

components.name: 5. Centrifuge: 400×g, 30–35 min, RT (no brake, no acceleration ramp)

note.en: CRITICAL: acceleration = 9 (slow), brake = 0 (NO BRAKE). Deceleration with brake disrupts the density interface. RT (18–25°C). Most centrifuges: set to slowest decel (0 or 1).
note.zh: 关键：加速度 = 9（慢速），刹车 = 0（无刹车）。刹车会扰乱密度界面。室温（18–25°C）。大多数离心机：设置最慢减速（0 或 1）。

note.en: Top: plasma + platelets. Buffy coat (white ring at Ficoll interface): PBMCs. Ficoll layer: granulocytes settling. Pellet (red): erythrocytes + granulocytes. PBMC band may be thin — collect carefully.
note.zh: 顶层：血浆 + 血小板。白膜层（Ficoll 界面白色环）：PBMC。Ficoll 层：粒细胞。红色沉淀：红细胞 + 粒细胞。PBMC 带可能较薄——小心收集。

components.name: 7. Collect buffy coat (PBMC layer): insert pipette just above Ficoll interface; aspirate 2–4 mL

note.en: Collect in a clean 15 or 50 mL tube. Taking ≤1 mL of Ficoll is acceptable. Avoid disturbing lower layers.
note.zh: 收集到干净的 15 或 50 mL 管中。带入少量（≤1 mL）Ficoll 可接受。避免扰动下层。

components.name: 8. Wash 1: add 40 mL RT DPBS; 300×g 10 min RT (WITH brake); decant supernatant

note.en: This wash removes residual Ficoll and platelets. Pellet should be white/cream (PBMCs). If red → erythrocyte contamination → add 2 mL ACK lysis buffer (150 mM NH₄Cl, 10 mM KHCO₃, 0.1 mM EDTA, pH 7.2), 5 min RT.
note.zh: 此步去除残余 Ficoll 和血小板。沉淀应为白色/奶油色（PBMC）。如偏红 → 红细胞污染 → 加 2 mL ACK 裂解液（150 mM NH₄Cl、10 mM KHCO₃、0.1 mM EDTA，pH 7.2），RT 5 min。

components.name: 9. Wash 2: resuspend in 10 mL DPBS; 200×g 10 min RT; decant

note.en: Second wash at lower g-force to remove most remaining platelets (platelets sediment at higher g, are discarded with supernatant).
note.zh: 第二次洗涤用较低离心力去除残余血小板（血小板在较高 g 时沉淀，随上清丢弃）。

components.name: 10. Resuspend in RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS or DPBS; count and assess viability

note.en: cell_counting_hemocytometer with trypan blue. Typical yield: 1–2×10⁶ PBMCs/mL blood. Viability should be >90%. PBMC composition: ~80% lymphocytes (T, B, NK), ~15% monocytes, ~5% dendritic cells.
note.zh: cell_counting_hemocytometer 台盼蓝计数。典型产量：每毫升血液 1–2×10⁶ PBMC。活率应 >90%。PBMC 组成：约 80% 淋巴细胞（T、B、NK）、约 15% 单核细胞、约 5% 树突状细胞。

notes.en: Critical success factors: (1) Fresh blood at RT throughout; (2) Ficoll at RT; (3) NO BRAKE on centrifuge deceleration; (4) Careful harvesting of buffy coat. For cryopreservation: resuspend at 10–20×10⁶ cells/mL in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO (cell_freezing); rapid cooling in Mr. Frosty to −80°C; transfer to liquid N₂. For immediate downstream: proceed to magnetic bead depletion (MACS), activation, or flow staining (flow_panel_staining).
notes.zh: 成功关键因素：(1) 全程血液保持室温；(2) Ficoll 恢复至室温；(3) 离心减速无刹车；(4) 小心收集白膜层。冻存：10–20×10⁶ cells/mL 重悬于 90% FBS + 10% DMSO（cell_freezing），Mr. Frosty 缓慢降温至 −80°C，后转液氮。下游实验：磁珠分选（MACS）、细胞激活或流式染色（flow_panel_staining）。

ref: Boyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; Ulmer et al. (1984) Immunobiology 166:238–250; Kleiveland (2015) Handbook of Cell Biology; STEMCELL Technologies EasySep Manual

usage.en: Isolate peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from whole blood by Ficoll density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: Ficoll 密度梯度离心从全血中分离外周血单个核细胞（PBMC）。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Whole blood (anticoagulated with EDTA or heparin)

note.en: Cryopreserve in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO → liquid N₂ (up to indefinite)
note.zh: Cryopreserve in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO → liquid N₂ (最长 indefinite)

name: Plasmid Maxiprep (Alkaline Lysis)

components.name: 1. 过夜培养 100–500 mL LB + 抗性
3. 重悬 (Buffer P1/Resuspension)
components.note: 含 RNase A, 彻底重悬无颗粒

components.name: 4. 碱裂解 (Buffer P2/Lysis)
components.note: 轻柔翻转 4–6 次, 室温 ≤5 min

components.name: 5. 中和 (Buffer P3/Neutralization)
components.note: 立即翻转混匀, 冰上 15–20 min

components.name: 12. 70% 乙醇洗涤 → 风干 → TE 溶解

notes.en: Typical yield: 100 mL high-copy plasmid culture → 500-1000 µg DNA. Endotoxin-free plasmid for transfection/in vivo use requires endotoxin removal column. Avoid excessive vortexing to prevent genomic DNA contamination.
notes.zh: 典型产量：100 mL 高拷贝质粒 → 500–1000 µg DNA。Endotoxin-free 质粒用于转染/体内实验需使用 endotoxin removal column。避免过度涡旋导致基因组 DNA 污染。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd Ed; QIAGEN Plasmid Purification Handbook

usage.en: Isolate large-scale, high-purity plasmid DNA from E. coli cultures for transfection.
usage.zh: 大量提取高纯度质粒 DNA，用于转染等应用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: −20°C (up to years)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 years)

name: Plasmid Miniprep (Alkaline Lysis)

components.name: 3. 250 µL Buffer P2 裂解 (颠倒混匀)
4. 350 µL Buffer P3 中和 (颠倒混匀)
7. 加 0.7 倍体积异丙醇沉淀
10. 风干 → 30–50 µL TE/H₂O 溶解

notes.en: Dilute to 1× before use. Classic alkaline lysis method. Yields 5–20 µg from 3 mL overnight culture. A260/280 should be 1.8–2.0 for pure DNA.
notes.zh: 经典碱裂解法。3 mL 过夜培养物可获 5–20 µg 质粒 DNA。A260/280 应为 1.8–2.0。如需更高纯度，使用商业柱提试剂盒。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513–1523; Sambrook & Russell (2001)

usage.en: Isolate small-scale plasmid DNA from E. coli cultures using alkaline lysis.
usage.zh: 碱裂解法小量提取大肠杆菌质粒 DNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes，实操: 30 minutes

materials.name: Overnight bacterial culture (2–5 mL in LB + antibiotic)

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: −20°C (up to years)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 years)

name: Protein Concentration by Centrifugal Ultrafiltration (Amicon Ultra)
nameCn: 离心超滤浓缩蛋白（Amicon Ultra）

note.en: MWCO should be 3–6× smaller than protein MW. Common: 3 kDa (peptides/small proteins), 10 kDa (general), 30 kDa (>60 kDa proteins), 50 kDa (>100 kDa). Amicon Ultra-4 (4 mL), Ultra-15 (15 mL), Ultra-0.5 (0.5 mL) available.
note.zh: MWCO 应为蛋白 MW 的 1/3–1/6。常用：3 kDa（多肽/小蛋白）、10 kDa（通用）、30 kDa（>60 kDa 蛋白）、50 kDa（>100 kDa）。可选 Amicon Ultra-4（4 mL）、Ultra-15（15 mL）、Ultra-0.5（0.5 mL）。

components.name: 2. Pre-wet membrane: add 500 µL storage buffer; spin 2 min at 4,000×g; discard

note.en: Removes glycerol storage solution from new membranes. Some protocols skip this step.
note.zh: 去除新膜上的甘油储存液。部分方案可跳过此步。

components.name: 3. Load protein sample into concentrator (do not exceed max volume)

note.en: Max fill: 4 mL (Ultra-4), 15 mL (Ultra-15). Leave 10% headspace. Apply sample gently (do not pipette directly onto membrane).
note.zh: 最大体积：Ultra-4 为 4 mL，Ultra-15 为 15 mL。留 10% 空间。轻柔加样（勿直接往膜上吸打）。

note.en: Do NOT exceed 4,000×g (damages membrane). 4°C preferred for protein stability. Check volume every 5–10 min — do not let membrane go dry (protein aggregates irreversibly on dry membrane).
note.zh: 不超过 4,000×g（损坏膜）。4°C 保护蛋白稳定性。每 5–10 min 检查一次体积——绝不让膜干燥（蛋白会不可逆地聚集在干膜上）。

components.name: 5. Continue centrifugation until desired volume reached

note.en: Typical: 50-fold concentration takes ~30–60 min. Stop at ≥50 µL (Amicon Ultra-4) to allow easy recovery. Mix gently by pipetting up/down every 15–20 min to prevent boundary layer effect.
note.zh: 典型 50 倍浓缩约 30–60 min。停在 ≥50 µL（Ultra-4）以便回收。每 15–20 min 轻柔吸打混匀，防止边界层效应。

note.en: Invert device, place in recovery tube, spin 2 min at 1,000×g. Typical recovery: 90–95%. Rinse membrane with 20–50 µL buffer for maximum recovery.
note.zh: 倒置装置，放入回收管，1,000×g 离心 2 min。典型回收率：90–95%。用 20–50 µL 缓冲液冲洗膜，最大化回收。

components.name: 7. Buffer exchange (optional): dilute 10× in new buffer, repeat concentration (×3 cycles)

note.en: 3 cycles of 10× dilution + concentration removes >99.9% of original buffer components. Equivalent to dialysis but much faster (30 min vs 6–12 h).
note.zh: 3 次 10 倍稀释 + 浓缩循环，去除 >99.9% 原缓冲液成分。效果等同透析，但速度快（30 min vs 6–12 h）。

components.name: 8. Quantify concentrated protein (BCA or Bradford); run SDS-PAGE QC

note.en: Compare before and after by SDS-PAGE to check for aggregation or protein loss.
note.zh: 浓缩前后 SDS-PAGE 对比，检查是否有聚集或蛋白损失。

notes.en: Troubleshooting: Slow filtration → protein aggregating on membrane (reduce concentration, add mild detergent 0.01% Tween-20, or switch to lower MWCO). Protein in filtrate → wrong MWCO or membrane integrity issue. Sticky proteins: add BSA 0.1% carrier, or use PES membranes instead of regenerated cellulose.
notes.zh: 排查：过滤慢→蛋白在膜上聚集（降低浓度、加 0.01% Tween-20 或换更小 MWCO）；蛋白在滤液中→MWCO 选错或膜破损；粘性蛋白：加 0.1% BSA 载体蛋白，或换 PES 膜替代再生纤维素膜。

ref: Millipore Amicon Ultra User Guide; Wingfield (2015) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 80:A.3F.1

usage.en: Concentrate and buffer-exchange proteins using Amicon centrifugal ultrafiltration units.
usage.zh: Amicon 超滤离心管浓缩和换液蛋白质。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 hours，实操: 1 hour

note.en: 4°C (short) or −80°C with glycerol (long) (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C (short) or −80°C with glycerol (long) (最长 varies)

name: Protein Dialysis and Buffer Exchange

components.name: 1. Prepare dialysis tubing or membrane device

note.en: Tubing: boil in 2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 10 min, rinse thoroughly. Slide-A-Lyzer: soak in buffer 2 min. MWCO: 3.5 kDa (<20 kDa protein), 12–14 kDa (most proteins), 50 kDa (large complexes).
note.zh: 透析袋：2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 煮 10 min，彻底冲洗。Slide-A-Lyzer：缓冲液浸泡 2 min。MWCO：3.5 kDa（<20 kDa 蛋白）、12–14 kDa（大多数蛋白）、50 kDa（大型复合体）。

note.en: Sample expands ~10–20% by osmosis. Seal securely.
note.zh: 渗透作用导致样品膨胀 ~10–20%。密封牢固。

components.name: 3. Dialyze change 1: 500 mL buffer, 2 h, 4°C, gentle stirring

note.en: ≥200× volume ratio. Slow stir bar (no foam = no protein denaturation).
note.zh: ≥200 倍体积比。慢速搅拌（无泡沫 = 无蛋白变性）。

components.name: 4. Dialyze change 2: fresh 500 mL buffer, 2 h, 4°C

note.en: Each change removes >90% of target small molecule.
note.zh: 每次换液去除 >90% 的目标小分子。

note.en: Add 10% glycerol to final buffer if storing at −80°C.
note.zh: 若需 −80°C 保存，末次透析液加 10% 甘油。

note.en: Volume may increase. Quantify: Bradford or BCA. Concentrate if needed: Amicon Ultra (4,000×g, 4°C).
note.zh: 体积可能增加。Bradford 或 BCA 定量。如需浓缩：Amicon Ultra（4,000×g，4°C）。

notes.en: Faster alternatives: (a) HiTrap Desalting column (5 mL, 5 min on AKTA); (b) Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter + dilution (3 cycles removes >99.9%); (c) ZebaSpin Desalting Column (2 min spin). Amicon: do not let protein dry on membrane.
notes.zh: 更快替代方案：(a) HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱（5 mL，AKTA 5 min）；(b) Amicon Ultra 离心浓缩管 + 稀释换液（3 次去除 >99.9%）；(c) ZebaSpin 脱盐柱（2 min）。Amicon 注意勿让蛋白干在膜上。

ref: Scopes (1994) Protein Purification 3rd ed.; Wingfield (2001) Curr Protoc Protein Sci A.3B.1; ThermoFisher Slide-A-Lyzer Manual

usage.en: Remove small molecules, exchange buffer, or desalt proteins by dialysis.
usage.zh: 透析法去除小分子、换液或蛋白脱盐。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 6–12 hours，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: Magnetic stir bar and stir plate

note.en: 4°C in final buffer or −80°C with glycerol (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C in final buffer or −80°C with glycerol (最长 varies)

name: Proximity Ligation Assay (PLA)

notes.en: Each fluorescent dot = one interaction (<40 nm). Include single-Ab controls. Quantify dots per cell with ImageJ.
notes.zh: 每个荧光点 = 一次互作（<40 nm）。包含单抗体对照。用 ImageJ 定量每细胞点数。

ref: Söderberg et al. (2006) Nat Methods 3:995

usage.en: Detect protein-protein interactions in situ using proximity ligation assay (PLA/Duolink).
usage.zh: 原位邻近连接实验（PLA/Duolink）检测蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 5 hours

materials.name: Cells on coverslips or tissue sections
Two primary antibodies from different species

note.en: 4°C in PBS (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C in PBS (最长 overnight)

note.en: 4°C in humidity chamber (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C in humidity chamber (最长 overnight)

name: Recombinant Protein Expression in E. coli
nameCn: 大肠杆菌重组蛋白表达

note.en: Heat shock (heat_shock_transformation): 42°C 30 s → 2 min ice → 200 µL SOC → 37°C 45 min. Plate on LB+antibiotic agar, 37°C overnight.
note.zh: 热激（heat_shock_transformation）：42°C 30 s → 2 min 冰 → 200 µL SOC → 37°C 45 min。涂 LB+抗生素平板，37°C 过夜。

components.name: 2. Inoculate starter culture: 5–10 mL LB+antibiotic, 37°C, 200 rpm, overnight

note.en: Pick single colony. Grow 12–16 h.
note.zh: 挑单克隆。培养 12–16 h。

components.name: 3. Dilute 1:50–1:100 into expression medium (LB or TB), shake 37°C 200 rpm

note.en: 10 mL starter into 500 mL TB (tb_media) in 2 L flask. TB gives ~2× higher cell density than LB.
note.zh: 10 mL 过夜培养物加入 500 mL TB（tb_media），2 L 摇瓶。TB 培养密度比 LB 高 ~2 倍。

components.name: 4. Monitor OD₆₀₀; at OD 0.6–0.8 cool to induction temperature

note.en: Soluble: cool to 18°C (~15 min ice-water bath). High yield/inclusion body: stay at 37°C.
note.zh: 可溶表达：降温至 18°C（~15 min 冰水浴）。高产量/包涵体：保持 37°C。

note.en: Soluble: 0.1–0.5 mM, 18°C, 16–20 h overnight. Inclusion body: 1 mM, 37°C, 3–4 h. Test conditions for new proteins!
note.zh: 可溶：0.1–0.5 mM IPTG，18°C，16–20 h 过夜。包涵体：1 mM IPTG，37°C，3–4 h。新蛋白务必先做条件摸索！

note.en: Discard supernatant. Pellets storable at −80°C (weeks–months). Weigh pellet.
note.zh: 弃上清。菌体沉淀可 −80°C 保存数周至数月。称量湿重。

components.name: 7. Check expression: SDS-PAGE on pre/post-induction samples

note.en: Take 1 mL at OD 0.6 (T=0) and post-induction. Pellet → SDS buffer → boil 5 min. Expect new band at target MW.
note.zh: 分别取 OD 0.6 时（T=0）和诱导后各 1 mL。离心收菌 → SDS 上样缓冲液 → 煮 5 min。应见目标 MW 新带。

components.name: 8. Solubility check: lyse aliquot → 20,000×g 10 min 4°C → SDS-PAGE pellet vs supernatant

note.en: Protein in pellet = inclusion body. Try: lower temp (16°C), less IPTG (0.05 mM), co-express chaperones (GroEL/ES, DnaK), or different strains (Rosetta, SoluBL21, ArcticExpress).
note.zh: 蛋白在沉淀 = 包涵体。试：更低温度（16°C）、更少 IPTG（0.05 mM）、共表达分子伴侣（GroEL/ES、DnaK）、或换菌株（Rosetta、SoluBL21、ArcticExpress）。

note.en: See his_tag_purification or gst_tag_purification.
note.zh: 参见 his_tag_purification 或 gst_tag_purification。

notes.en: Troubleshooting: Low expression → verify plasmid, antibiotic. Insoluble → lower temp, auto-induction (ZYM-5052), solubility tags (MBP, SUMO, NusA). Proteolysis → protease inhibitors, BL21 strain. Codon optimization for eukaryotic genes.
notes.zh: 排查：表达低→检查质粒、抗生素；包涵体→降温、自诱导培养基（ZYM-5052）、可溶性标签（MBP、SUMO、NusA）；降解→加蛋白酶抑制剂、用 BL21 菌株。真核基因注意密码子优化。

ref: Rosano & Ceccarelli (2014) Front Microbiol 5:172; Studier (2005) Protein Expr Purif 41:207–234; Graslund et al. (2008) Nat Methods 5:135–146

usage.en: Express recombinant proteins in E. coli using IPTG induction.
usage.zh: 通过 IPTG 诱导在大肠杆菌中表达重组蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 4 hours

materials.name: Expression plasmid (pET, pGEX, etc.) in BL21(DE3) or similar

note.en: −80°C (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 6 months)

name: Resazurin (alamarBlue) Cell Viability Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate; overnight attachment

note.en: 5,000–20,000 cells/well, 100 µL complete medium. Fill edge wells with PBS. For bacteria/yeast: use 200 µL/well. Same edge-effect precautions as MTT/CCK-8.
note.zh: 每孔 5,000–20,000 细胞，100 µL 完全培养基。边缘孔加 PBS。细菌/酵母用 200 µL/孔。与 MTT/CCK-8 相同的边缘效应注意事项。

components.name: 2. Prepare resazurin stock: 0.15 mg/mL (440 µM) in PBS; filter-sterilize 0.22 µm

note.en: Stock: dissolve 1.5 mg resazurin sodium salt (MW 251.17) in 10 mL PBS. Sterile filter. Store 4°C in dark (stable 3 months) or −20°C long-term. Solution should be dark blue/purple (oxidized = non-fluorescent).
note.zh: 母液：1.5 mg 刃天青钠盐（MW 251.17）溶于 10 mL PBS。0.22 µm 过滤除菌。4°C 避光保存（稳定 3 个月）或 −20°C 长期保存。溶液应为深蓝/紫色（氧化态 = 无荧光）。

note.en: Same controls as MTT: untreated cells, blank (medium only), solvent control. For multi-timepoint: plate separate plates per timepoint.
note.zh: 与 MTT 相同对照：未处理细胞、空白孔（仅培养基）、溶剂对照。多时间点测定：每个时间点单独铺板。

components.name: 4. Add resazurin: 10 µL of 0.15 mg/mL stock per 100 µL medium (final 0.015 mg/mL = 10% v/v)

note.en: OR: use commercial alamarBlue (BioRad) at 10% v/v directly. Do NOT remove medium. Wrap plate in foil.
note.zh: 或：直接用商品化 alamarBlue（BioRad）按 10% v/v 加入。不去除培养基。用锡纸包裹培养板。

components.name: 5. Incubate 1–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂ (or overnight for slow metabolizers)

note.en: Monitor color shift: blue → pink/red = reduction by viable cells. Optimal: 20–40% reduction at midpoint. Bacteria/yeast: 2–6 h at appropriate growth temperature.
note.zh: 监测颜色变化：蓝色→粉红/红色 = 活细胞还原。最佳：中间时间点还原率 20–40%。细菌/酵母：在适当生长温度下 2–6 h。

components.name: 6A. Fluorometric reading (preferred): Ex 560 nm / Em 590 nm

note.en: 10–100× more sensitive than absorbance. Use black-sided clear-bottom 96-well plates. Gain: set to give RFU ~50,000–100,000 for controls.
note.zh: 灵敏度比比色法高 10–100 倍。使用黑边透明底 96 孔板。增益：设定使对照孔 RFU 约 50,000–100,000。

note.en: Less sensitive but works with standard plate reader. % Reduction = [(εox at 600 × A570) − (εox at 570 × A600)] / [(εred at 570 × A600_control) − (εred at 600 × A570_control)] × 100. Or use simplified: OD570/OD600 ratio.
note.zh: 灵敏度较低但普通酶标仪即可。公式见英文（需使用摩尔吸收系数）。简化版：OD570/OD600 比值。

note.en: % Viability = (RFU_treated − RFU_blank) / (RFU_control − RFU_blank) × 100. Non-destructive: can remove 10 µL aliquot for reading, return plate to incubator, re-read at later timepoints.
note.zh: % 活力 = (RFU处理 − RFU空白) / (RFU对照 − RFU空白) × 100。非破坏性：取 10 µL 读完后放回孵育箱，可在不同时间点重复读取。

notes.en: Key advantages: (1) Fully non-destructive — can continue culturing after reading; (2) Fluorometric mode: highly sensitive for low cell numbers (100–500 cells); (3) Works with all cell types including primary cells, bacteria, yeast, fungi. Pitfalls: some compounds (quinones, flavonoids) directly reduce resazurin (false positive) — confirm with alternative assay. Stable endpoint: resorufin (pink) is stable for hours; fully reduced = colorless (false low if over-reduced).
notes.zh: 关键优势：(1) 完全非破坏性——读取后可继续培养；(2) 荧光模式灵敏度极高，适合低细胞数（100–500 个细胞）；(3) 适用于所有细胞类型，包括原代细胞、细菌、酵母、真菌。注意：某些化合物（醌类、黄酮类）可直接还原刃天青（假阳性）——用其他方法验证。终点稳定：resorufin（粉红色）稳定数小时；过度还原会变无色（假阴性）。

ref: O'Brien et al. (2000) Eur J Biochem 267:5421–5426; Rampersad (2012) Sensors 12:12347–12360; alamarBlue Assay User Guide (BioRad #BUL0012)

usage.en: Measure cell viability and proliferation using resazurin (alamarBlue) fluorometric assay.
usage.zh: 刃天青（alamarBlue）荧光法检测细胞活力和增殖。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 days，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: Microplate reader (fluorescence: Ex 560 nm / Em 590 nm, or absorbance 570/600 nm)

name: Restriction Enzyme Digestion

components.name: DNA template
components.note: 质粒 0.5–1 µg; 基因组 DNA 5–10 µg

components.name: Restriction Enzyme(s)
components.note: 5–10 U per µg DNA; 体积 ≤10% 总反应 (避免甘油抑制)

components.name: 2. 37°C 孵育 1–2 h（或按酶推荐温度）
3. 热灭活 65°C 20 min（如适用）
components.note: 部分酶不可热灭活，需柱纯化

notes.en: For double digestion, confirm buffer compatibility (NEB recommends rCutSmart universal buffer). Star activity: avoid excess enzyme, prolonged incubation, high glycerol. Methylation-sensitive enzymes (DpnI cuts only methylated DNA, used for template removal). Some sticky ends may need blunting (Klenow) before ligation.
notes.zh: 双酶切时确认 buffer 兼容性（NEB 推荐使用 rCutSmart 通用 buffer）。Star activity：避免过量酶、长时间孵育、高甘油浓度。甲基化敏感酶（DpnI 仅切甲基化 DNA，用于去除模板）。部分粘性末端可能需要补平（Klenow）后连接。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; NEB Technical Reference: Restriction Enzymes

usage.en: Cut DNA at specific recognition sites using restriction endonucleases.
usage.zh: 限制性内切酶在特定识别位点切割 DNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 hours，实操: 20 minutes

note.en: −20°C or heat-inactivate enzyme (up to 1 week)
note.zh: −20°C or heat-inactivate enzyme (最长 1 week)

name: RNA Agarose Gel Electrophoresis (Denaturing)
nameCn: RNA 琼脂糖凝胶电泳（变性条件）

note.en: Wipe gel tank, comb, tray with RNase Away (RNaseZap). Use RNase-free water (DEPC-treated or nuclease-free). Wear gloves throughout.
note.zh: 用 RNase Away（RNaseZap）擦拭电泳槽、梳子、胶托。使用 RNase-free 水（DEPC 水或无核酸酶水）。全程戴手套。

components.name: 2. Prepare 1% formaldehyde agarose gel (50 mL, fume hood)

note.en: Melt 0.5 g agarose in 40 mL DEPC-ddH₂O; cool to 55°C. Add: 5 mL 10× MOPS buffer + 5 mL 37% formaldehyde (fume hood!). Mix, pour immediately, let solidify 30 min RT. Formaldehyde denatures RNA secondary structure.
note.zh: 0.5 g 琼脂糖溶于 40 mL DEPC 水；冷至 55°C。通风橱中加：5 mL 10× MOPS 缓冲液 + 5 mL 37% 甲醛。混合后立即倒胶，RT 凝固 30 min。甲醛变性 RNA 二级结构。

components.name: 3. Prepare RNA samples: denature with formaldehyde loading buffer

note.en: Mix: RNA (0.5–5 µg) + 5× formaldehyde loading buffer (formamide:formaldehyde:10×MOPS = 500:165:100 µL, + 35 µL DEPC water + 1 µg/mL EtBr). Heat 65°C 15 min; chill on ice 2 min. Add 1 µL 6× DNA loading dye.
note.zh: 混合：RNA（0.5–5 µg）+ 5× 甲醛上样缓冲液（甲酰胺:甲醛:10×MOPS = 500:165:100 µL，+ 35 µL DEPC 水 + 1 µg/mL EtBr）。65°C 15 min 变性；冰 2 min 急冷。加 1 µL 6× DNA 上样缓冲液。

components.name: 4. Pre-run gel in 1× MOPS running buffer, 5 min at 100 V

note.en: MOPS buffer must be fresh (yellowing indicates degradation). Fill tank until buffer just covers gel.
note.zh: MOPS 缓冲液需新鲜配制（变黄表示降解）。缓冲液液面刚好覆盖凝胶。

components.name: 5. Load samples + RNA ladder (e.g., 0.2–10 kb); run at 80 V, ~1.5 h

note.en: Constant voltage 80 V. Running in fume hood recommended (formaldehyde fumes). BPB should run 2/3 of gel.
note.zh: 恒压 80 V。推荐在通风橱中电泳（甲醛挥发）。BPB 跑至凝胶 2/3 处。

note.en: Intact total RNA: 28S band ~2× intensity of 18S. Degraded RNA: smear below 18S, no discrete bands. mRNA appears as smear 0.5–10 kb. Note: 28S (4,718 bp), 18S (1,868 bp) for human.
note.zh: 完整总 RNA：28S 带约为 18S 的 2 倍亮度。降解 RNA：18S 以下有拖尾，无清晰条带。mRNA 呈 0.5–10 kb 弥散带。参考：人类 28S（4,718 bp）、18S（1,868 bp）。

notes.en: Alternative (faster): non-denaturing 1% agarose gel in 1× TAE — suitable for checking RNA integrity only (not size accuracy). Bioanalyzer (Agilent 2100) or TapeStation is more sensitive and quantitative (RIN score). Discard gel and buffer containing formaldehyde in hazardous waste.
notes.zh: 替代方案（更快）：1% 琼脂糖凝胶 1× TAE 非变性电泳——仅用于检查 RNA 完整性（尺寸不准确）。Bioanalyzer（Agilent 2100）或 TapeStation 更灵敏定量（RIN 评分）。含甲醛的凝胶和缓冲液作为危险废弃物处置。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed. Ch. 7.14; Masek et al. (2005) Electrophoresis 26:4709

usage.en: Assess RNA integrity and size by denaturing formaldehyde agarose gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 变性甲醛琼脂糖胶电泳检测 RNA 完整性和大小。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 1.5 hours

name: RNA Column Extraction (Silica-based)

components.name: 1. 裂解：加 Buffer RLT + β-ME，涡旋
2. 匀浆（组织用匀浆器/针头 5–10 次）
3. 加等体积 70% 乙醇，混匀
4. 转移至 RNeasy 柱，离心 15 s ≥8,000×g
6. On-column DNase I 消化（可选）
components.note: 加 80 µL DNase I mix, 室温 15 min

components.name: 8. 洗涤 Buffer RPE 2× (500 µL)
components.note: 第二次离心 2 min 干燥膜

components.name: 9. 洗脱：30–50 µL RNase-free H₂O
components.note: 静置 1 min → 离心, 可重复一次提高产量

notes.en: Fast (~30 min) and reproducible. Lower yield than TRIzol but higher purity, ideal for RT-qPCR/RNA-seq. Small RNAs (<200 nt, including miRNA) require miRNA enrichment column. Tissue must be stored in RNAlater or flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen.
notes.zh: 快速（~30 min）且重现性好。产量低于 TRIzol，但纯度高，适合 RT-qPCR/RNA-seq。小量 RNA（<200 nt, 含 miRNA）需用 miRNA enrichment column。组织需在 RNAlater 中保存或液氮速冻。

ref: QIAGEN RNeasy Mini Handbook; Chomczynski & Sacchi (2006) Nat Protoc 1:581

usage.en: Extract total RNA from cells or tissues using silica column-based purification.
usage.zh: 硅胶柱法从细胞或组织中提取总 RNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: −80°C or in RNAlater (up to months)
note.zh: −80°C or in RNAlater (最长 months)

note.en: −80°C (up to 1 year)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 1 year)

name: RNA-seq Library Preparation (PolyA Selection)

note.en: trizol_extraction or rna_column_extraction. Bioanalyzer RIN ≥7.0 (≥8 preferred). Nanodrop: A260/280 ≥2.0, A260/230 ≥1.8. Qubit RNA HS for accurate quantification.
note.zh: trizol_extraction 或 rna_column_extraction。Bioanalyzer RIN ≥7.0（≥8 优选）。Nanodrop：A260/280 ≥2.0、A260/230 ≥1.8。Qubit RNA HS 精确定量。

components.name: 2. Input: 100 ng–1 µg total RNA (optimal 500 ng)

note.en: Degraded RNA: use RiboZero rRNA depletion instead of polyA. Single-cell: 10× Chromium or Smart-seq2.
note.zh: 降解 RNA：用 RiboZero rRNA 去除替代 polyA。单细胞：10× Chromium 或 Smart-seq2。

components.name: 3. PolyA selection: oligo-dT magnetic beads, 65°C 5 min → RT 5 min → wash × 2 → elute 80°C 2 min; repeat once

note.en: 2× binding buffer: 10 mM Tris pH 7.5, 500 mM LiCl, 1 mM EDTA. Double selection reduces rRNA contamination to <5%.
note.zh: 2× 结合缓冲液：10 mM Tris pH 7.5、500 mM LiCl、1 mM EDTA。双次选择将 rRNA 污染降至 <5%。

components.name: 4. Fragmentation: 94°C, 2–8 min in First Strand Buffer

note.en: Target 150–300 bp inserts for Illumina short-read. Stop with 0.5 M EDTA. 2 min → ~300 bp; 8 min → ~130 bp.
note.zh: 目标片段 150–300 bp（Illumina 短读）。0.5 M EDTA 终止。2 min → ~300 bp；8 min → ~130 bp。

components.name: 5. First-strand cDNA: random hexamers + RT (SuperScript III/IV)

note.en: 65°C 5 min (denature) → ice 1 min → add RT mix (1× FS Buffer, 5 mM DTT, RNaseOUT, RT enzyme) → 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min → RNase H 37°C 20 min.
note.zh: 65°C 5 min（变性）→ 冰 1 min → 加 RT 混合物（1× FS 缓冲液、5 mM DTT、RNaseOUT、逆转录酶）→ 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min → RNase H 37°C 20 min。

components.name: 6. Second-strand cDNA: DNA Pol I + E. coli ligase + RNase H, 16°C 2.5 h

note.en: For strand-specific: replace dTTP with dUTP. Purify with 1.8× AMPure XP (SPRI) beads.
note.zh: 链特异性建库：将 dTTP 替换为 dUTP。1.8× AMPure XP（SPRI）磁珠纯化。

note.en: End repair: T4 DNA Pol + T4 PNK + Klenow, 30°C 30 min. dA-tailing: Klenow (exo-), 37°C 30 min. Purify 1× AMPure XP.
note.zh: 末端修复：T4 DNA Pol + T4 PNK + Klenow，30°C 30 min。加 A 尾：Klenow（exo-），37°C 30 min。1× AMPure XP 纯化。

components.name: 8. Adapter ligation: dual-index Y-adapters, T4 ligase, RT 15 min

note.en: Adapter:insert 10:1 molar. Heat inactivate 65°C 10 min. Size select: 0.8× then 0.2× AMPure XP (removes adapter-dimers at ~130 bp).
note.zh: 接头:插入片段 10:1 摩尔比。65°C 10 min 灭活。双面选择：0.8× + 0.2× AMPure XP（去除 ~130 bp 接头二聚体）。

note.en: 8 cycles for 500 ng input; 12–14 for <100 ng. KAPA HiFi or Q5 polymerase. 1× AMPure XP cleanup.
note.zh: 500 ng 投入量 8 个循环；<100 ng 用 12–14 个循环。KAPA HiFi 或 Q5 聚合酶。1× AMPure XP 纯化。

note.en: Expect ~280–350 bp (insert + adapters). No adapter-dimer (<1% at 130 bp). Qubit dsDNA HS + NEBNext Library Quant qPCR. Sequence: 20–50 M 150 bp PE reads/sample.
note.zh: 预期 ~280–350 bp（插入片段 + 接头）。无接头二聚体（130 bp 处 <1%）。Qubit dsDNA HS + NEBNext Library Quant qPCR 定量。测序：每样品 2,000–5,000 万条 150 bp PE reads。

notes.en: Strand-specific: replace dTTP with dUTP, then UNG digest before PCR → preserves strand info. Low input (<10 ng): Smart-seq2 or NEBNext Single Cell. rRNA depletion (RiboZero) for degraded RNA or non-polyA transcripts (lncRNA, histone mRNA).
notes.zh: 链特异性：第二链合成 dTTP→dUTP，PCR 前 UNG 酶切 → 保留链信息。低投入（<10 ng）：Smart-seq2 或 NEBNext Single Cell。降解 RNA 或非 polyA 转录本：RiboZero rRNA 去除。

ref: Illumina TruSeq Stranded mRNA Reference Guide 15031047; Adiconis et al. (2013) Nat Methods 10:623–629

usage.en: Prepare strand-specific RNA-seq libraries for next-generation sequencing.
usage.zh: 链特异性 RNA-seq 文库构建，用于下一代测序。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 8 hours

materials.name: mRNA enrichment beads (poly-dT) or rRNA depletion kit
End repair, A-tailing, and adapter ligation reagents
PCR master mix for library amplification

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 week)

note.en: −20°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 1 month)

note.en: −20°C (up to 12 months)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 12 months)

name: RT-qPCR Protocol
nameCn: 实时荧光定量 PCR 流程

notes.en: Reference genes: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA. Analysis: 2^(−ΔΔCt) method. ≥3 technical replicates, ≥3 biological replicates. Primer efficiency should be 90–110%.
notes.zh: 内参基因: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA。分析: 2^(-ΔΔCt) 法。技术重复 ≥3，生物学重复 ≥3。引物效率应在 90–110%。NTC (no template control) 必需。

ref: Bustin et al. (2009) Clin Chem 55:611–622 (MIQE Guidelines); Livak & Schmittgen (2001) Methods 25:402–408

usage.en: Quantify gene expression or DNA copy number by real-time quantitative PCR.
usage.zh: 实时定量 PCR 定量基因表达或 DNA 拷贝数。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: qPCR master mix (SYBR Green or TaqMan)
Forward and reverse primers (10 µM each)

note.en: −20°C (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −20°C (最长 6 months)

note.en: 4°C in dark (up to 2 hours)
note.zh: 4°C in dark (最长 2 hours)

name: Sandwich ELISA

notes.en: 7-point standard curve + blank. High-binding plates. Wash 3-5× PBST between steps. R² > 0.99.
notes.zh: 7 点标准曲线 + 空白。高结合力板。每步间用 PBST 洗 3-5 次。R² > 0.99。

ref: Engvall & Perlmann (1971) Immunochemistry 8:871

usage.en: Quantify target protein in samples using sandwich ELISA with capture and detection antibody pair.
usage.zh: 夹心 ELISA 法定量样品中的靶蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 4 hours

note.en: 4°C sealed (up to overnight (or up to 48 h))
note.zh: 4°C sealed (最长 overnight (or up to 48 h))

name: Sanger Sequencing Sample Preparation

components.name: 1. Prepare DNA template: miniprep or PCR product

note.en: Plasmid (miniprep): 100–500 ng/µL recommended. PCR product: must be gel-purified (gel_extraction) or ExoSAP-IT cleaned (incubate PCR product with ExoSAP-IT 37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min inactivate). Residual primers/dNTPs interfere with sequencing.
note.zh: 质粒（miniprep）：100–500 ng/µL。PCR 产物：必须胶回收纯化（gel_extraction）或 ExoSAP-IT 处理（37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min 灭活）。残留引物/dNTP 会干扰测序。

note.en: Most providers require 3.2 pmol/µL (= 3.2 µM). Common universal primers: M13F (-20): 5'-GTAAAACGACGGCCAGT-3'; M13R: 5'-CAGGAAACAGCTATGAC-3'; T7: 5'-TAATACGACTCACTATA-3'; SP6: 5'-ATTTAGGTGACACTATAG-3'. Custom primers: Tm 55–65°C, length 18–24 nt, GC content 40–60%.
note.zh: 多数服务商要求 3.2 pmol/µL（= 3.2 µM）。通用引物：M13F (-20)、M13R、T7、SP6（见英文）。自定义引物：Tm 55–65°C，长度 18–24 nt，GC 40–60%。

note.en: Premix submission (Genewiz/Azenta): 5 µL DNA (100–500 ng plasmid or 5–20 ng/100 bp PCR) + 5 µL primer (3.2 pmol/µL) = 10 µL total. Tube-only submission: DNA and primer in separate tubes. Follow provider-specific guidelines.
note.zh: 预混提交（Genewiz/Azenta）：5 µL DNA（100–500 ng 质粒或 5–20 ng/100 bp PCR）+ 5 µL 引物（3.2 pmol/µL）= 10 µL。独立管提交：DNA 和引物分管。按服务商说明操作。

components.name: 4. Label tubes clearly; keep on ice; submit same day

note.en: Label with date, sample ID, primer name. Avoid freeze-thaw of sequencing samples. Most sequencing services: results in 24–48 h.
note.zh: 清晰标注日期、样品编号、引物名称。避免冻融。多数测序服务 24–48 h 出结果。

components.name: 5. Analyze results: align chromatogram to expected sequence

note.en: Tools: Benchling, SnapGene Viewer, 4Peaks, ApE. BLAST against reference. Check: (a) expected insert present, (b) correct reading frame, (c) no frame-shift mutations from PCR. Reliable reads typically start at bp 50–100, end at bp 700–900.
note.zh: 工具：Benchling、SnapGene Viewer、4Peaks、ApE。BLAST 比对参考序列。检查：(a) 预期插入片段存在；(b) 正确阅读框；(c) 无 PCR 引入移码突变。可靠读取通常从第 50–100 bp 开始，到第 700–900 bp 结束。

notes.en: Read length: typical Sanger = 700–1,000 bp per reaction. For long inserts: design primers every 600–700 bp (primer walking). Troubleshooting: no reads → check DNA purity (A260/280 ≥1.8, no salt/ethanol contamination); noisy reads → secondary structure (use DMSO additive); short reads → primer-template mismatch.
notes.zh: 读取长度：典型 Sanger = 700–1,000 bp/反应。长插入片段：每 600–700 bp 设计一个引物（引物步进法）。排查：无读取→检查 DNA 纯度（A260/280 ≥1.8，无盐/乙醇污染）；噪声大→二级结构（加 DMSO 添加剂）；读取短→引物-模板不匹配。

ref: Sanger et al. (1977) PNAS 74:5463–5467; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed.; Genewiz/Azenta Sequencing Guidelines

usage.en: Prepare DNA samples and primers for Sanger sequencing submission.
usage.zh: 准备 DNA 样品和引物，提交 Sanger 测序。

label.en: Protocol — 30 minutes + 24–48 h service, hands-on: 30 minutes
label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes + 24–48 h service，实操: 30 minutes

materials.name: 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes or strip tubes

note.en: 4°C (short) or −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C (short) or −20°C (最长 1 week)

name: Silver Stain (SDS-PAGE)

components.name: 1. Fix gel: 50% MeOH + 12% AcOH + 0.05% formaldehyde, ≥1 h (overnight OK), RT

note.en: Fix in 200 mL fixer per standard mini gel. Removes SDS and stops protein migration. Minimum 1 h; overnight improves sensitivity.
note.zh: 每块标准 mini 胶用 200 mL 固定液。去除 SDS 并停止蛋白迁移。最少 1 h；过夜固定可提高灵敏度。

note.en: Removes acetic acid and most methanol. Fresh EtOH each wash.
note.zh: 去除乙酸和大部分甲醇。每次用新鲜乙醇。

components.name: 3. Sensitize: 0.02% Na₂S₂O₃ (sodium thiosulfate) in water, exactly 1 min, RT

note.en: CRITICAL: exactly 1 min. Sensitization enhances silver binding to proteins. Immediately wash 3 × 20 s ddH₂O after.
note.zh: 关键：精确计时 1 min。增强银与蛋白的结合。立即用 ddH₂O 洗 3 × 20 s。

note.en: Rapid rinses only — do not over-wash here.
note.zh: 快速冲洗——此步不可过长。

components.name: 5. Silver impregnation: 0.2% AgNO₃ + 0.075% formaldehyde, 20 min, 4°C or RT

note.en: Prepare fresh: 0.2 g AgNO₃/100 mL ddH₂O + 75 µL 37% formaldehyde. 4°C gives more uniform staining. Protect from light.
note.zh: 新鲜配制：0.2 g AgNO₃/100 mL 水 + 75 µL 37% 甲醛。4°C 染色更均匀。避光操作。

note.en: Removes unbound silver. Do not over-rinse.
note.zh: 去除未结合的银。不可过长冲洗。

components.name: 7. Develop: 6% Na₂CO₃ + 0.05% formaldehyde + 0.0004% Na₂S₂O₃, RT; monitor until bands appear

note.en: Develop time: 30 s – 10 min. Monitor carefully — over-development gives dark background. Fresh developer required. Swirl gently throughout.
note.zh: 显影时间：30 s – 10 min。仔细监控——过度显影导致背景过深。需新鲜配制显影液。轻柔摇动。

components.name: 8. Stop: 50% MeOH + 12% AcOH, 10 min; rinse 3 × ddH₂O, 5 min each

note.en: Immediately add stop solution as soon as desired staining intensity is reached. Final rinse in ddH₂O before imaging.
note.zh: 达到所需染色强度后立即加终止液。成像前用 ddH₂O 末次冲洗。

components.name: 9. Image gel on white-light transilluminator or scanner

note.en: Use flatbed scanner (600 dpi minimum) or gel documentation system with white light. For densitometry: Image Lab or ImageJ.
note.zh: 用平板扫描仪（至少 600 dpi）或凝胶成像系统（白光）拍照。密度扫描：Image Lab 或 ImageJ。

notes.en: Sensitivity: 1–10 ng protein/band (10–100× more sensitive than Coomassie). MS-compatible silver stain: omit glutaraldehyde and formaldehyde (use Shevchenko MS-compatible protocol: sensitizer = sodium thiosulfate, developer = Na₂CO₃ only). Interference: keratin (skin) gives false bands — wear gloves, use clean reagents. Contamination with dust/fingerprints ruins gel.
notes.zh: 灵敏度：1–10 ng 蛋白/条带（比考马斯蓝灵敏 10–100 倍）。质谱兼容银染：省去戊二醛和甲醛（用 Shevchenko MS 兼容方案：仅用硫代硫酸钠增敏，Na₂CO₃ 显影）。干扰：角蛋白（皮肤来源）产生假阳性条带——戴手套，使用清洁试剂。灰尘/指纹会损坏结果。

ref: Shevchenko et al. (1996) Anal Chem 68:850–858; Blum et al. (1987) Electrophoresis 8:93–99; Mortz et al. (2001) Proteomics 1:1359

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: 50% MeOH/12% AcOH at RT (up to overnight)
note.zh: 50% MeOH/12% AcOH at RT (最长 overnight)

name: Single Colony Picking and Screening

components.name: 1. Prepare transformation plates: use LB agar + appropriate antibiotic

note.en: Plate density: 50–200 colonies/plate is ideal. Too dense (>500) → colonies too small; too sparse → wasted space. Cool agar to 55°C before pouring (25 mL/plate for 10 cm). Pre-warm plates at 37°C 30 min before use.
note.zh: 理想菌落密度：50–200 个/板。过密（>500）菌落太小；过稀浪费空间。琼脂冷至 55°C 后倒板（10 cm 皿约 25 mL）。用前 37°C 预热 30 min。

note.en: Add 40 µL X-gal (20 mg/mL in DMF) + 4 µL IPTG (100 mM) per plate; spread, let dry 30 min. White colonies = insert present; blue = self-ligation/empty vector. Requires lacZα vectors (pUC, pGEM, pBlueScript).
note.zh: 每板加 40 µL X-gal（20 mg/mL in DMF）+ 4 µL IPTG（100 mM）；涂抹，晾干 30 min。白色 = 含插入片段；蓝色 = 自连/空载体。需要 lacZα 载体（pUC、pGEM、pBlueScript）。

note.en: Move plates to 4°C after 16 h if not picking immediately — colonies stop growing and are easier to distinguish. Blue-white screen: return to 4°C 1–2 h to develop color.
note.zh: 16 h 后如不立即挑取，移至 4°C——菌落停止生长，更易分辨。蓝白筛选：返回 4°C 1–2 h 充分显色。

components.name: 4. Prepare culture tubes: 1.5–2 mL LB + antibiotic per clone

note.en: Use 14 mL round-bottom or 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes. Label carefully. Prepare 10–24 clones per ligation to ensure ≥1 correct clone.
note.zh: 使用 14 mL 圆底管或 1.5 mL Eppendorf 管。认真标记。每次连接挑 10–24 个克隆以确保 ≥1 个正确克隆。

components.name: 5. Pick colonies with sterile toothpick or 10 µL pipette tip

note.en: Touch colony center with toothpick tip. Inoculate tube AND streak onto numbered grid on a fresh LB+antibiotic plate (master plate). Master plate: incubate 37°C overnight, store at 4°C as backup.
note.zh: 用牙签或 10 µL 枪头尖端触碰菌落中心。同时接种培养管并在备用板（主板）上划线编号。主板：37°C 过夜，4°C 保存备用。

note.en: Eppendorf tubes: tape closed at angle, place in shaker. Round-bottom: use at 45° angle in rack.
note.zh: Eppendorf 管：斜插入摇床。圆底管：45° 角放置。

components.name: 7. Screen by colony PCR or diagnostic restriction digest

note.en: Colony PCR (colony_pcr): take 1 µL of overnight culture as template; use vector-based primers (M13/T7/SP6) or gene-specific primers flanking insert. Expect correct band size. Restriction digest: miniprep first, then diagnostic digest with 1–2 enzymes that distinguish insert orientation/size.
note.zh: 菌落 PCR（colony_pcr）：取 1 µL 过夜培养液作模板；用载体通用引物（M13/T7/SP6）或跨插入片段的基因特异引物。预期正确条带大小。限制酶消化：先 miniprep，再用 1–2 种酶进行诊断性酶切，区分插入方向/大小。

components.name: 8. Select positive clones; send for Sanger sequencing

note.en: sanger_sequencing_prep. Send miniprep DNA (50–100 ng/µL) + sequencing primer. Verify full insert sequence, no PCR errors. Select 2–3 positive + sequencing-confirmed clones.
note.zh: sanger_sequencing_prep。送 miniprep DNA（50–100 ng/µL）+ 测序引物。验证完整插入序列，无 PCR 错误。选择 2–3 个阳性且测序确认的克隆。

components.name: 9. Prepare glycerol stocks from confirmed positive clones

note.en: bacterial_glycerol_stock: 1 mL overnight culture + 1 mL 50% glycerol → store −80°C. Label with: clone ID, date, insert, antibiotic.
note.zh: bacterial_glycerol_stock：1 mL 过夜培养液 + 1 mL 50% 甘油 → −80°C 保存。标注：克隆编号、日期、插入片段、抗生素。

notes.en: Colony number vs insert probability: ligation efficiency ~20–50% with directional cloning; ~5–15% without blue-white selection. Colony appearance timing: Amp resistance ~ 12 h; Kan/Cm ~ 14–16 h. White colonies in blue-white: ~50% correct by PCR; confirm all positives by sequencing.
notes.zh: 菌落数 vs 插入概率：定向克隆连接效率约 20–50%；无蓝白筛选约 5–15%。菌落出现时间：Amp 约 12 h；Kan/Cm 约 14–16 h。蓝白筛选白色菌落约 50% PCR 阳性；测序确认所有候选。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed. Ch. 1; Green & Sambrook (2012) Molecular Cloning 4th ed.; Ausubel et al. Current Protocols in Molecular Biology Unit 1.5

usage.en: Pick isolated bacterial colonies for liquid culture and downstream analysis.
usage.zh: 挑取单克隆菌落进行液体培养和下游分析。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 1 hour

name: siRNA-Mediated Gene Knockdown
nameCn: siRNA 基因沉默（RNAi 干扰）

components.name: 1. Design siRNA: order 2–3 independent siRNAs per target gene

note.en: 19–21 nt duplex with 2 nt 3' overhangs. Sources: Qiagen, Dharmacon, IDT. Resuspend 20 µM in RNase-free water; store −80°C.
note.zh: 19–21 nt 双链，3' 端 2 nt 突出。来源：Qiagen、Dharmacon、IDT。RNase-free 水溶解至 20 µM；−80°C 保存。

components.name: 2. Day 0: seed cells in antibiotic-free media

note.en: 24-well: 5–8×10⁴ cells; 6-well: 2–4×10⁵; 10 cm: 1.5–2×10⁶. Target 40–70% confluency at transfection.
Tube A: 3 µL RNAiMAX + 47 µL Opti-MEM, 5 min RT. Tube B: 1 µL siRNA (20 µM) + 49 µL Opti-MEM. Combine A+B, mix gently, 20 min RT. [24-well scale; final siRNA ~20 nM].
note.zh: 管 A：3 µL RNAiMAX + 47 µL Opti-MEM，RT 5 min。管 B：1 µL siRNA（20 µM）+ 49 µL Opti-MEM。A+B 混合，轻混，RT 20 min。[24 孔规模；siRNA 终浓度 ~20 nM]。

components.name: 4. Add complex dropwise to cells; gentle plate rocking

note.en: Remove old media; add 400 µL fresh (no antibiotics) + 100 µL complex = 500 µL total. Do NOT change media for 6 h.
note.zh: 去旧培养基；加 400 µL 新鲜培养基（无抗生素）+ 100 µL 复合物 = 500 µL。6 h 内不换液。

note.en: 48 h: fast-turnover proteins. 72 h: most targets. 96 h + re-transfection at 48 h: stable proteins.
note.zh: 48 h：快速周转蛋白。72 h：大多数靶标。96 h + 48 h 时再转染：稳定蛋白。

note.en: qpcr_protocol for mRNA (≥70% reduction expected). wb_protocol for protein (≥60% reduction). Include siNC + siGAPDH controls.
note.zh: qpcr_protocol 检测 mRNA（预期 ≥70% 下调）。wb_protocol 检测蛋白（预期 ≥60% 下调）。对照：siNC + siGAPDH。

note.en: Proliferation: cck8_proliferation; Migration: scratch_assay/transwell_migration; Apoptosis: annexin_v_apoptosis.
note.zh: 增殖：cck8_proliferation；迁移：scratch_assay / transwell_migration；凋亡：annexin_v_apoptosis。

notes.en: Controls: (1) siNC (non-targeting); (2) siGAPDH (positive KD); (3) untreated; (4) lipid-only (toxicity). Toxicity high? Reduce RNAiMAX to 1.5 µL/well. Hard-to-transfect cells: Nucleofection, electroporation, or lentiviral shRNA.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) siNC（非靶向）；(2) siGAPDH（阳性 KD）；(3) 未处理；(4) 仅脂质体（毒性）。毒性大？减少 RNAiMAX 至 1.5 µL/孔。难转染细胞：核转染、电穿孔或慢病毒 shRNA。

ref: Elbashir et al. (2001) Nature 411:494–498; Reynolds et al. (2004) Nat Biotechnol 22:326; Qiagen siRNA Transfection Handbook

usage.en: Knock down target gene expression using small interfering RNA (siRNA) transfection.
usage.zh: 小干扰 RNA（siRNA）转染敲低靶基因表达。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 days，实操: 2 hours

note.en: 37°C incubator (up to 24–72 h (wait for knockdown))
note.zh: 37°C incubator (最长 24–72 h (wait for knockdown))

name: Site-Directed Mutagenesis (Q5/KLD)

components.name: 2. Q5 反向 PCR 扩增

notes.en: Introduce point mutations, insertions, or deletions into plasmid DNA. Based on inverse PCR with phosphorylation, ligation, and DpnI digestion of template in a single KLD step.
notes.zh: 在质粒 DNA 中引入点突变、插入或缺失。基于反向 PCR，在单一 KLD 步骤中完成磷酸化、连接和 DpnI 消化模板。

ref: NEB Q5 SDM Kit Protocol E0554 (protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.bddei23e)

usage.en: Introduce specific point mutations into plasmid DNA by site-directed mutagenesis.
usage.zh: 定点突变在质粒 DNA 中引入特定点突变。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Template plasmid (methylated, from dam⁺ E. coli)

note.en: 4°C (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C (最长 overnight)

note.en: Transform immediately or store at −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: Transform immediately or store at −20°C (最长 1 week)

name: Size Exclusion Chromatography (SEC / Gel Filtration)
nameCn: 分子排阻色谱（SEC / 凝胶过滤）蛋白纯化

components.name: 1. Prepare sample: ≥1 mg/mL, centrifuge 20,000×g 20 min 4°C, filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Remove aggregates before injection. Analytical: ≤500 µL; preparative: ≤5 mL (16/60 column).
note.zh: 进样前去除聚集体。分析型：≤500 µL；制备型：≤5 mL（16/60 柱）。

components.name: 2. Select SEC column by MW range

note.en: Superdex 75 (3–70 kDa), Superdex 200 (10–600 kDa), Superose 6 (5–5,000 kDa). Analytical: 10/300 GL (24 mL). Preparative: 16/60 (120 mL) or 26/60 (320 mL).
note.zh: Superdex 75（3–70 kDa）、Superdex 200（10–600 kDa）、Superose 6（5–5,000 kDa）。分析型：10/300 GL（24 mL）。制备型：16/60（120 mL）。

note.en: Flow rate: 0.4–0.5 mL/min (10/300 GL); 1.0–1.5 mL/min (16/60). Pressure limit: 1.5–1.8 MPa. Monitor A280 baseline stability.

components.name: 4. Inject sample via clean sample loop

note.en: Rinse loop with water then running buffer before injection. Inject at 0.5 mL/min.
note.zh: 上样环先用水再用运行缓冲液冲洗。0.5 mL/min 注入。

components.name: 5. Run: 1.2 CV at constant flow; collect 0.5 mL (analytical) or 1–2 mL (preparative) fractions

note.en: Monitor A280 (protein), A260 (nucleic acids). V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV; Vt ≈ CV.
